TOP NEWS "2 men accused of plotting to shoot at immigrants are convicted of attempting to kill federal agents, " AP'sJohn Hanna -- "Two men who co-founded a militia group have been convicted of attempting to murder federal agents ahead of a planned trip to the Texas-Mexico border to shoot at immigrants illegally crossing there and any federal agents who might try to stop them. A jury at the U.S. District Court in the Missouri state capital of Jefferson City found Jonathan S. O 'Dell, 34, of Warshaw, Missouri, and Bryan C. Perry , 39, of Clarksville, Tennessee, guilty of more than 30 felony counts each, the chief federal prosecutor for western Missouri, Teresa Moore , announced Friday. The convictions Thursday came after jurors deliberated for more than two hours. O'Dell's attorney, Jonathan Truesdale , declined comment, but Perry's attorney, Thomas Kirsch , said his client plans to appeal the verdict. Kirsch said Perry is disappointed in the verdict but said he is grateful for jurors' dedication and the opportunity to exercise "his fundamental right" of trial by jury. "My client has a deep love and passion for our country and the values it stands for and what the Constitution stands for, including his right to a trial by jury," Kirsch said. A sentencing date for either man has not yet been set. They both face at least 10 years in prison, and possibly life. Perry also pled guilty to three charges, including escaping from federal custody. Held for trial in a county jail in Rolla, Missouri, he escaped in September 2023 but was captured two days later and about 160 miles to the northwest, outside Kansas City, following a high-speed chase. The two men formed the 2nd Amendment Militia and then in the summer and fall of 2022 tried recruit others to join them, prosecutors said. In September 2022, O'Dell's home about 100 miles became a staging site as the two men collected firearms, ammunition, paramilitary gear and other supplies, according to the government's evidence. Prosecutors said Perry posted a TikTok video in September saying that their militia group was going to "go protect this country," and another in early October saying the group would be "out huntin'." Prosecutors said the two men viewed U.S. Border Patrol agents as traitors for allowing immigrants to cross into Texas. The day before they planned to leave for Texas, an FBI team using an armored vehicle served a search warrant on O'Dell's home, and prosecutors said Perry fired 11 rifle shots at them. O'Dell and his girlfriend surrendered, but after exiting the house, Perry fought with agents. The charges against the two men also included using a firearm in a violent crime, illegal gun possession and damaging federal property. Perry couldn't legally have a gun because in 2004, he pled guilty in Tennessee to a felony aggravated robbery charge and served about four years in prison, according to online records." 2024 "Texas Democrats' longtime chairman steps down after big losses continue for the party, " AP's Valerie Gonzalez -- "The longtime leader of the Texas Democratic Party announced his resignation Friday after another election cycle of lopsided defeats and voters making a dramatic swing toward the GOP on the heavily Hispanic southern border. Gilberto Hinojosa , a native of the Rio Grande Valley, has served as the Texas Democratic Party chair since 2012. During that time, Democrats have not won any statewide offices and badly lost key races Tuesday. All but two counties along the Texas-Mexico border, long considered Democratic strongholds, . It included Hidalgo and Cameron, the two most populous counties in the Rio Grande Valley. President-electDonald Trump easily won Texas by 14 points, which was more than double his margin of victory in 2020 and a sign of eroding Democratic support. Hinojosa said he would step down in March 2025. "In the days and weeks to come, it is imperative that our Democratic leaders across the country reevaluate what is best for our party and embrace the next generation of leaders to take us through the next four years of Trump and win back seats up and down the ballot," Hinojosa said. His announcement also came just a day after issuing an apology over comments he made to Austin public radio station KUT after Tuesday's election. "You could, for example, you can support transgender rights up and down all the categories where the issue comes up, or you can understand that there's certain things that we just go too far on, that a big bulk of our population does not support," Hinojosa . Hinojosa later issued an apology on social media, saying that LGBTQ+ persons in Texas "deserve to feel seen, valued and safe in our state and our party."" #TXLEGE "Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick names private school vouchers as his top legislative priority, " Texas Tribune's James Barragan -- "Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick on Friday declared private school voucher legislation his number one issue for the legislative session beginning in January and called on Gov. Greg Abbott to declare it an emergency item. "School choice is my top policy priority," Patrick said in a statement. "Thirty-two states, both Republican and Democrat, have enacted some form of school choice legislation. There is absolutely no reason why Texas children and parents should be left behind." Patrick, who presides over the Texas Senate and exerts considerable influence over the legislative process, has reserved Senate Bill 2 for the yet-to-be-authored proposal, emphasizing the importance he's placing on the measure. Senate Bill 1, he said, will be the state budget, the only bill the Legislature is legally required to pass every session. "Texans across the political spectrum agree that parents must have options to choose the school that best fits the needs of their child to ensure their success," Patrick added. "Voters have spoken clearly during the primary and general elections; the time for school choice in Texas is long overdue." School choice is a term frequently used to describe school vouchers, programs that use taxpayer money to help pay for students' private schooling. During last year's session, supporters pushed for a voucher-like program called , which would give public funds directly to families who opt out of the state's public education system so they can pay for private school tuition and other education-related expenses. Patrick called on Abbott to declare school vouchers an emergency item to allow lawmakers to get a head start on pushing the bill through the Legislature. By law, the Legislature cannot pass any bills within the first 60 days of the session unless the governor has deemed them emergency items. "If Gov. Abbott names school choice an emergency item, the Senate will take up and pass school choice in the early weeks of session, instead of having to wait 60 days until March," Patrick said. Abbott has made school vouchers his top priority in the last two years and went to war with fellow Republicans in the House who joined Democrats to block school voucher legislation last session. He successfully ousted many of them and replaced them with Republicans who support the idea of using public funds to pay for education at private schools. Abbott now believes he has 79 ," more than the simple majority required to pass a bill in the 150-member chamber." Bryan Hughes guest column : "I wrote Texas' abortion law. It's clear about medical emergencies, " via Houston Chronicle** \-- "Recently, ProPublica published articles about two Texas women who died, allegedly because of Texas' abortion ban.Josseli Barnica and Nevaeh Crain tragically passed away after doctors wrongfully denied care to them as they were miscarrying. I'm the author of the Texas Heartbeat Law. And sadly, I believe that these articles were written with the goal of misrepresenting that law. Like every Texas abortion law dating all the way back to the 1800s, the Heartbeat Law provides a clear exception for medical emergencies. ProPublica claims that Texas' abortion ban does not define "medical emergency," leading the reader to believe that doctors have no guidance as to what the term means. Yet the articles fail to tell the reader that the term was already defined in the Texas Health and Safety Code. The definition of a medical emergency was explicitly written in that code's : " Medical emergency" means a life-threatening physical condition aggravated by, caused by, or arising from a pregnancy that, as certified by a physician, places the woman in danger of death or a serious risk of substantial impairment of a major bodily function unless an abortion is performed. When we drafted the Heartbeat Law, we did not want to risk confusing medical providers by changing the definition, so we kept the language that had been in Texas law for years -- language that physicians and hospitals should be familiar with. Under Texas law, Mrs. Barnica and Ms. Crain were experiencing medical emergencies, and doctors should have intervened to save their lives. In June, the Texas Medical Board even issued clarification that there is keeping physicians from doing what is medically necessary to prevent the risk of death or substantial impairment of a bodily function to the mother. Thankfully, cases like these, in which the pregnant mother's life is in jeopardy, are rare, but sadly, they do happen. And when they do, most Texas doctors treating these pregnant mothers do act to help their patients. Records maintained by the Texas Health and Human Services Commission show that since the U.S. Supreme Court's Dobbs decision overturning Roe v. Wade, doctors in Texas have . We don't know why doctors treating Mrs. Barnica and Ms. Crain did not intervene. Sadly, the most likely explanation is that the hospitals and their doctors were afraid to treat the women because of articles like these published by ProPublica. Pro-abortion groups and their allies in the left-wing media have been relentless in their attempts to scare doctors, pregnant mothers and the general public into believing that Texas law prevents doctors from helping patients and saving lives. We are thankful that most Texas doctors are getting this right. Clearly, however, more needs to be done to make sure that doctors and the hospitals know the law: When a mother's life or major bodily function are in jeopardy, doctors are not only allowed to act, but they are legally required to act. The standard of care as well as their moral and ethical duty compel them to act. And contrary to what ProPublica would have us believe, Texas law does not prevent them from aiding their patients and saving their lives. Texas Sen. Bryan Hughes represents District 1 in northeast Texas. " ($) STATE GOVERNMENT "What happens if Trump calls on Texas officials go to Washington? " San Antonio Express-News' Jeremy Wallace -- "Speculation is running rampant that President-elect Donald Trump could pick Texas Republicans, such as Gov. Greg Abbott or Attorney General Ken Paxton , for various roles in his next administration. Much of those backroom discussions are hard to confirm, but what is certain is what the Texas Constitution says about potential vacancies if Trump starts calling up elected officials with whom he's built a deep relationship with over the years. The biggest name is Abbott, who Trump singled out earlier this year as a "spectacular man" who had "done a great job" in Texas. Trump said Abbott was one of the people he would consider for a running mate, though he ultimately picked Ohio Sen.J.D. Vance. Abbott's experience on border security issues and his past as Texas' attorney general could make him an option for all kinds of roles - if he wants it. Trump has more than 4,000 political appointments to fill. Abbott has been pretty consistent in telling reporters that he wants to help Trump but from Texas. Abbott has already said he'll run for re-election in 2026. "I'm staying in Texas," Abbott said at a press conference earlier this year. If he changes his mind, the Texas Constitution is pretty clear about what happens next. Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick , who oversees the Texas Senate, would become the governor for the remainder of Abbott's current term in office, said Brandon Rottinghaus , a University of Houston political science professor. Texas has seen this play out before. On Dec. 21, 2000, then-Lt. Gov. Rick Perry became the state's governor for the remainder of Gov. George W. Bush 's term after he went to the White House. Even if Abbott stays put, Patrick could get an offer to join Trump's administration in some capacity. Not only was Patrick Trump's campaign chair in Texas, but the two built a close relationship during Trump's first term in office as Patrick offered advice on immigration and border security issues. Before Trump's first televised national address from the Oval Office in 2019, the White House was in frequent communication . Like Abbott, Patrick consistently has shot down talk about going to Washington. On Friday he posted on the social media platform X that while he would be honored to serve . "My best opportunity to serve the people is right here," Patrick wrote. "I love what I do." But if Patrick did leave his post to either replace Abbott or go to D.C., the state constitution temporarily gives the job to the Senate Pro Tem, which is selected by members of the Texas Senate before each session. In January, Sen. Brandon Creighton , R-Conroe, will be next in line for that post. The assignment would be only be temporary, and give him the power to convene the Senate within 30 days so they can pick a replacement to serve as lieutenant governor until the next election in 2026. The law says they must choose from one of their members. In 2000, senators used a secret ballot to make Northeast Texas Republican Bill Ratliff, then the Senate Finance Chair, the leader after Perry moved up to the governor's office. Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller and Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton are also showing up on short lists for potential jobs with Trump. If either leaves state government, the governor would have the power to choose a replacement until the next election in 2026. Finally, Trump could come calling for a member of Congress like he has done before. U.S. Rep. Wesley Hunt , R-Houston, has been one of Trump's most trusted surrogates, traveling to 15 states during the campaign season to advocate for his re-election. If Trump did pick a member of Congress from Texas, whether Hunt or someone else, Abbott couldn't pick a replacement, but would have the authority to set the special election for the open seat." ($) "Rolling blackouts possible in Texas during severe winter storms, " Dallas Morning News' Philip Jankowski -- "Texas power grid operator ERCOT's "worst-case" models show Texas would have a nearly 50% chance of rolling blackouts if hit by winter weather on par with the storm that pummeled the state in December 2022. The chance of rolling blackouts jumps to nearly 80% if the state experiences a more severe winter barrage on par with the February 2021 storms that caused widespread power outages and killed more than 200 Texans. The scenarios were analyzed in a the grid operator published earlier this month. The numbers are alarming but not surprising given the intensity of the two winter blasts, according to one energy expert. The probabilistic model is not a forecast, ERCOT said. Kristi Hobbs , ERCOT's vice president of system planning and weatherization, said the report represents a "worst-case scenario." "You shouldn't expect something like a Winter Storm Uri where [blackouts] went on for days," Hobbs said, referring to the 2021 storm. "These would be shorter in duration." In 2021, many homes were without power for five consecutive days as the grid operator and local utilities struggled to meet power demands as temperatures remained below freezing. ERCOT officials said the chance of rolling blackouts has decreased since the 2021 winter storm due to state-mandated power plant weatherization and programs that provide incentives for many power generators to keep backup fuel sources on site. The modeling also doesn't account for large industrial-level power users turning off the lights during times of intense electricity demand, ERCOT officials said. High energy prices likely would trigger many large-scale users to shut off power, but ERCOT said it models as if nearly all users kept operating, as required by state law." ($) BUSINESS NEWS "American Airlines loses appeal in JetBlue alliance case, " via Reuters -- "A U.S. appeals court on Friday held that a trial judge correctly found that violated federal antitrust law. Siding with the U.S. Department of Justice, the Boston-based 1st U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals affirmed a trial judge's ruling blocking the airlines' "Northeast Alliance," which had allowed the two carriers to coordinate flights and pool revenue. U.S. Circuit Judge William Kayatta , writing for a three-judge panel, said the trial judge had been "presented with an arrangement that had many of the essential attributes of an agreement between two powerful competitors sharing revenues and divvying up highly concentrated markets." He said the judge, Leo Sorokin , following a non-jury trial, had in May 2023 issued a ruling with "detailed findings of fact, many key ones of which were unfavorable to American," and none of which were clearly wrongly legally analyzed. American Airlines, JetBlue and the Justice Department did not immediately respond to requests for comment. was announced in July 2020 and approved by the U.S. Transportation Department just days before the end of Republican President-elect Donald Trump 's first administration in January 2021. The new Trump administration is expected to be than the outgoing administration of Democratic President Joe Biden , whose Justice Department sued to block the alliance in September 2021 along with six states. Through their partnership, American, the nation's largest airline, and JetBlue, the sixth-largest, joined forces for flights in and out of New York City and Boston, coordinating schedules and pooling revenue. Following Sorokin's ruling, JetBlue terminated the alliance, as it unsuccessfully sought to bolster its efforts to win approval for the now-dropped $3.8-billion purchase of Spirit Airlines, which the Justice Department also challenged. American Airlines, though, pressed ahead with an appeal, saying the ruling would prevent the company from entering into any similar future arrangement, including with JetBlue." ($) BIDEN ADMINISTRATION "Judge strikes down Biden administration program shielding immigrant spouses from deportation, " AP's Hannah Schoenbaum \-- "A federal judge on Thursday struck down a Biden administration policy that aimed to ease a path to citizenship for some undocumented immigrants who are married to U.S. citizens. The program, lauded as one of the biggest presidential actions to help immigrant families in years, allowed of U.S. citizens to apply for a green card without first having to leave the country. The temporary relief from deportation brought a to some 500,000 immigrants estimated to benefit from the program before Texas-based U.S. District Judge J. Campbell Barker in August, days after applicants filed their paperwork. Barker ruled Thursday that the Biden administration had overstepped its authority by implementing the program and had stretched the legal interpretation of relevant immigration law "past its breaking point." The short-lived Biden administration initiative known as "Keeping Families Together" would have been unlikely to remain in place after Donald Trump took office in January. But its early termination creates greater uncertainty for immigrant families as many are bracing for Trump's return to the White House. Trump's election victory this week sets the stage for a swift crackdown on undocumented individuals after the Republican ran on promises of The president-elect energized his supporters on the campaign trail with a litany of anti-immigrant statements, including that immigrants were "poisoning the blood" of the nation. During his first term, Trump appointed Barker as a judge in Tyler, which lies in the 5th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals, a favored venue for advocates pushing conservative arguments. Barker had placed the immigration initiative on hold after Texas and 15 other states, led by their Republican attorneys general, filed a accusing the executive branch of bypassing Congress to help immigrant families for "blatant political purposes." Republicans argued the initiative created costs for their states and could draw more migrants to the U.S. The policy would have applied to people who have been living continuously in the U.S. for at least 10 years, do not pose a security threat and have utilized the existing legal authority known as "parole in place" that offers deportation protections. Those married to a citizen by June 17, the day before the program was announced, could pay a $580 application fee and fill out a lengthy application explaining why they deserve humanitarian parole. If approved, applicants would have three years to and obtain work authorization. It was not immediately clear Thursday whether anyone had received approval under the program, which only accepted applications for about a week before the judge placed it on hold. Noncitizen spouses are already eligible for legal status but often have to apply from their home countries. The process typically includes a yearslong wait outside of the U.S., which can separate family members with different immigration statuses." name: Office of Delegate Briana D. Sewell
subject: Virtual Bill Workshop Announcement - Nov 12, 7pm via Zoom
body:
| |
---
# You're Invited! District 25 Virtual Bill Workshop Nov 12th, 7pm - Zoom Link with RSVP
---
| [ ](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/m56t8qWhk5H-qlrJ-aI9RA~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpES5EP0QjaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvWkhYVGZaWFJKdURvZ3JldDlXA3NwY0IKZytEqS5n_cAKclIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~)
---
Dear
---
The Office of Delegate Sewell is pleased to invite you to her virtual bill workshop this upcoming Tuesday, Nov 12th. We will provide an overview of Virginia's legislative process and go over some frequently asked questions. Then, we invite you to take part in an open discussion where we discuss community concerns and build them into bill ideas. I always carry your feedback with me to Richmond! [Please complete this RSVP form to receive the Zoom link for the event. ](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/m56t8qWhk5H-qlrJ-aI9RA~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpES5EP0QjaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvWkhYVGZaWFJKdURvZ3JldDlXA3NwY0IKZytEqS5n_cAKclIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAACu4~)You will be emailed the link in advance of the meeting Tuesday so keep an eye on your inbox! These events are non-partisan and family-friendly. All constituents are welcome to join as we respectfully discuss the legislative process.
Questions? Contact my office at DelBSewell@virginia.house.gov
---
In Service,
---
|
---
|
---
_The Honorable Briana D. Sewell \-- 25th House District_ _DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov_
---
[**Unsubscribe**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/hImNCH8MJ0iBLZ-SiNYimw~~/AAS2ygA~/RgRpES5EP0SxaHR0cHM6Ly9hcHAuaW5kaWdvdi5jb20vcHViLzk0YWIzZmY2LTY3NzgtNDY3YS04NDA1LTYyNmI4YjkyNzQ5OS9jb250YWN0cy82N2JkMmRlYy0yNjk3LTQxYmYtYmFhZi0yNGZkYzZkYTQ1ZTIvc3Vic2NyaXB0aW9ucy9lZGl0P2NhbXBhaWduSWQ9ZWYzMzM1YzAtMDE2MS00NDY5LTlkNTQtNzM0ZjRlMDA5ZjMwVwNzcGNCCmcrRKkuZ_3ACnJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAru) from future updates

subject: We won!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96815750/511295674/-1494881468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ5ZDc4NWItMzA5ZS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DDbs1vXpksH0WheMYNanGWWV6ulcgRNbcEQGReez6MM=&emci=1ec00547-1d9e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=f49d785b-309e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=14434323) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96815751/511295675/-1494881468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ5ZDc4NWItMzA5ZS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DDbs1vXpksH0WheMYNanGWWV6ulcgRNbcEQGReez6MM=&emci=1ec00547-1d9e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=f49d785b-309e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=14434323)
WE DID IT! Thank you, Oregon! **It’s the honor of a lifetime to let you all know that we officially won.** **_From the bottom of my heart: Thank you._ ** Every door knocked, every text sent, every contribution from this grassroots team, it all made the difference and delivered us the win. We couldn’t have done it without you, friend. I launched this campaign because I believe that we can do better than what’s currently going on in Washington. I’ve spent my career fighting for my community and now, I’m taking that fight to Congress. I ran for office to make their futures brighter, and I’ll do just that in Washington – for their education, for their reproductive freedoms, for their job opportunities, and so much more. **I’m honored for the trust you’ve put in me and I’m eager to get to work for you in Washington.** None of this would have been possible without the support of this team. I can’t thank you enough. Now let’s get to work! _Janelle_

---

| Janelle Bynum is running for in Oregon's 5th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [JanelleBynum.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96815752/511295676/-1494881468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ5ZDc4NWItMzA5ZS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DDbs1vXpksH0WheMYNanGWWV6ulcgRNbcEQGReez6MM=&emci=1ec00547-1d9e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=f49d785b-309e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=14434323).

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: We’re still in this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
While we continue to monitor the returns, we must ensure that every lawful vote is counted and the will of AZ-06 voters is carried out, no matter how long it takes.

| Hi Peter,

**Our race for Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District is still undecided.** The stakes feel higher than ever, but we’re still in this.

In 2022, it took a week to determine a winner.

Now, we’re neck-and-neck — but thousands of lawful votes still need to be counted.

**While we continue to monitor the returns, we must ensure that every lawful vote is counted and the will of AZ-06 voters is carried out, no matter how long it takes.**

[_**To do that, we’ll need your grassroots support. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help us ensure that every lawful vote is counted fairly and securely?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96815775/511298098/653194827?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-11-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1ZDU1YzJhLTMxOWUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OVOo4lN9ZCEJpyKQhn_q0lrEH3VyPMFha1NHjYdVPBA=)

name: Derek Tran
subject: Here’s why I need you to stick by me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Tran for Congress P
body:
This is a long journey, but I need you to stick by me. Here’s why it’s so important:

I know we are all feeling tired. We knew this race would take longer to call than most and our team is hard at work making sure _every_ _single_ _vote_ gets counted. **I need you to stick with me, friend. ** Here’s why: We know this seat will be critical to securing a House majority. There are a few seats left to be called and this one could be the seat that puts Democrats in control. _ _ The House could be our last line of defense. In Congress, I will do everything in my power to stop an extreme agenda. _I will vote against an abortion ban, I will uphold democracy, and I will fight to lower costs for families. _ [I need you to stick by me as we fight to get every vote counted because we still have a chance to win this race and flip the House blue. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: We need to make sure every last vote gets counted.
body:
Peter, is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to rush a donation to help defeat Ted Cruz?
What if we told you that CNN has said Cruz is the MOST VULNERABLE Republican up for re-election this year?
What if we told you that the last time he ran, Ted Cruz only won by less than 3%?
And what if we told you that polls are currently showing Ted Cruz and his opponent Colin Allred are TIED?
If we told you all that... would you rush a donation of $25 so we can help Texas Democrats defeat Ted Cruz? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-august-2024?refcode=081424_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-august-2024?express_lane=true&refcode=081424_1&amount=5]

The Real Texas PAC

name: Oregon GOP
subject: Notice:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Friend, please be alert

| | | | [ ](https://oregon.gop/)
---
| | Friend,
**Please keep a look out for a notice from your county clerk. ** The notice will indicate that your ballot has been challenged and must be "cured" or resolved before it will be counted. _These notices are evidence that your county elections office is working to ensure that your ballot was, indeed, cast by you, the registered voter, and not someone else._ **These notices come when the county elections office has determined that a voter has:**
* _Failed to sign the outside envelope _
* _Signed the outside envelope with a signature that does not match the signature on his or her voter registration._

In either case, if you receive a notice, you will have to sign your return ballot envelope at the local elections office **OR** provide a signature on a designated form **no later than Tuesday, November 26.** **_You can find your local elections office here:_**__ https://sos.oregon.gov/elections/Pages/countyofficials.aspx **Please note** : elections offices will be closed on Monday, November 11, for Veteran’s Day. The earlier you are able to “cure” or resolve your ballot challenge, the sooner it will be counted in the final tally. Your local party will also have more time to identify and help those who are confused and need help resolving the challenge to their ballots. Our main goal is to ensure that every vote is counted, including YOURS! Thank you for standing with Oregon Republicans during this crucial time, Oregon Republican Party
---
|

|

name: Riley Gaines
subject: It's getting hard to hold back this evil
body:
| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6051598ed6614f76b6848ac23e18ada9&_e=IpbOz45flmYAvJGU91nu42wZhSsPn2YlPvGoQ70SYDvvr5r91U_5k8BF8kQOlcAVtduUXMmxp0z9vQPAfAzzgC6kXkloAjQB6bDid5ZufsibeS87T6gYGAzsTgxZcjPBmjUs-Cc1nmlDpU2HsN2ZXX8cK-HGSdo0Km_L-pT0QSopQM13_59jbq-K_vH7AoLlokZdnjoouFr5_Ckakiq-SirQ7Nz1LZBQSikHyb23GbXWh84WDMjdV0POs4Yje5rxR7lZ166ivQjq33qWg-_iWMvLbCdolbDSUBtY4o9JXojsHw7BEv7VXvzDkaXuv6xC4bTYShGhlyJcKzUWHYPSMm5I9oBVM8ol833p4_g_FDElI8OXWhlshy3Qip3iFGqTiAmJwHRs6QAqpAPPReEvutBUs1BgpyXb5wIWni884G2RheaHx336YpFCZofiLNq5)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6051598ed6614f76b6848ac23e18ada9&_e=IpbOz45flmYAvJGU91nu42wZhSsPn2YlPvGoQ70SYDvvr5r91U_5k8BF8kQOlcAVtduUXMmxp0z9vQPAfAzzgC6kXkloAjQB6bDid5ZufsibeS87T6gYGAzsTgxZcjPBmjUs-Cc1nmlDpU2HsN2ZXX8cK-HGSdo0Km_L-pT0QSopQM13_59jbq-K_vH7AoLlokZdnjoouFr5_Ckakiq-SirQ7Nz1LZBQSikHyb23GbXWh84WDMjdV0POs4Yje5rxR7lZ166ivQjq33qWg-_iWMvLbCdolbDSUBtY4o9JXojb4jimzgXVMeWjsu4AMFzsV519GifqIE4uJkXMn2ePJ5AY4CCkV_1IEsQVh5IbuPzOrHo_MWMS1LjAM2NOLzAxcxsAekSwPbC0EoQ0tAUjQ31J3G7fjtiNMx6Bkc4kCLeilcyJ4TzIB5ra5HxzFTrv)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6051598ed6614f76b6848ac23e18ada9&_e=IpbOz45flmYAvJGU91nu42wZhSsPn2YlPvGoQ70SYDvvr5r91U_5k8BF8kQOlcAVtduUXMmxp0z9vQPAfAzzgC6kXkloAjQB6bDid5ZufsibeS87T6gYGAzsTgxZcjPBmjUs-Cc1nmlDpU2HsN2ZXX8cK-HGSdo0Km_L-pT0QSopQM13_59jbq-K_vH7AoLlokZdnjoouFr5_Ckakiq-SirQ7Nz1LZBQSikHyb23GbXWh84WDMjdV0POs4Yje5rxR7lZ166ivQjq33qWg-_iWMvLbCdolbDSUBtY4o9JXohE5LBzvLap86HDtCyDMK6tOETp0YAUfeMm5VlDA_wMBGj_4RsG5a0y751h2nyrjZ4T7umk_Z6qw__AmWuMR0tzRzM-KyotlA3QCIr0IULfshm29w8OUUJ2PA6XdSoQuE4TYYnHZ-YNqN7euSWlkaMY)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." name: Carville, James
subject: I’m so damn stressed I can hardly type this message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Jacky Rosen’s race is STILL up in the air
| | |
---
It’s James Carville, and I’m so damn stressed I can hardly type this message! Jacky Rosen’s Senate race is STILL too close to call – and we’re running out of time.
Jacky’s team is hustling to make sure every vote is counted fairly, but her campaign just let me know they’re seriously behind their emergency fundraising goal – and they might have to STOP their operation if she can’t catch up.
**We’re letting Nevada slip through our fingers, and I need you to LOCK. IN. RIGHT. name: El Nicol
subject: Get involved with One PA - come to out Volunteer Meeting!
body:
logo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/66197/images/OnePA_Logo_FullColor.jpg]
Hello Peter,
We're 18 days out from the election and we need your help to win!
Whether you are in here in Pennsylvania or live in California, we have an opportunity for you to get involved! If you see a volunteer activity you're interested in, please sign up using the Mobilize link for that event.
VIRTUAL VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES
Voter ID Volunteer Phone Bank [https://www.mobilize.us/onepa/event/720249/]
Kickoff on Thursday 10/17, 3:00pm-8pm EST
Tuesdays and Thursday 10/15-10/29, 4:00pm-8pm EST
Join One PA in calling voters to confirm votes for Kamala Harris! This is a partisan, c4 opportunity.
GOTV Volunteer Phone Bank - What's Your Plan to Vote? [https://www.mobilize.us/onepa/event/730151/]
Everyday 10/29-11/4, 4:00pm-7:00pm EST
We want to make sure everyone in Pennsylvania has a plan to vote in this election. Join us for a GOTV phone bank to help our neighbors make a voting plan!
IN-PERSON VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES
Voter Registration Volunteer Canvass [https://www.mobilize.us/onepa/event/720839/]
Wednesday 10/16 4:00-7:00pm EST
Friday 10/18 4:00-7:00pm EST
Saturday 10/19, 11:00am-4:00pm EST
Sunday 10/20, 11:00am-4:00pm EST
Monday 10/21, 11:00am-3:00pm EST and 4:00pm-7:00pm EST
Join us for a volunteer door canvass to get voters registered!
Vote Tripling in Philly! [https://www.mobilize.us/onepa/event/718243/]
Kickoff starts Tuesday 10/22 10:00am-4:00pm EST
Monday - Sunday through 11/4, 10:00am-4:00pm EST (shift lengths will vary!)
Help us triple the vote in Philly!
Join us at the Philly Satellite Election offices for Vote Tripling- Volunteers will be stationed at an assigned satellite election office to ask voters to text 5 of their friends to vote right now!
Election Day Vote Tripling at the Polls [https://www.mobilize.us/onepa/event/718243/]
Tuesday 11/5, 8:00am-8:00pm EST (shift lengths will vary!)
Are you ready to Get Out The Vote this election day?
Join One PA at the polls for Vote Tripling- Volunteers will be stationed at an assigned polling location to ask voters to text 5 of their friends to vote right now!
We hope you'll join us!
In solidarity,
El Nicol, Volunteer Coordinator at One PA
https://www.facebook.com/onepennsylvania [https://www.facebook.com/onepennsylvania] https://twitter.com/OnePennsylvania [https://twitter.com/OnePennsylvania] https://www.instagram.com/onepennsylvania/ [https://www.instagram.com/onepennsylvania/]

One Pennsylvania
1414 Brighton Rd.
Pittsburgh, PA 15212
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/htvuWjs_7Ey8LcbYNy-j9g2?unsubscribedata=XwpHHZA2wfBZsngZsAZl4hrxjCIh7dcRLBRt37am9PZBPNiE2WfZJeHQG07znG0MhQLTjOtdDYMNuyULrMvIqgFSglw7Df0h15Rynz0Mj%2BTQIn5h6nlYOVtQv3iwZTyW5wVFaV0m7%2BMTBSGN2FqYeFL1hLk9GmoFphSAV%2BjfCtcXpQpQ%2FVGpIdNNMqgmjCIUJKEDJ77UaAGwXP3FaA0nm%2FN2%2BflJ3X80s7%2BYndfn4gjPjzWQHrgy6MDU9i%2FuT3s2ajeQUwZZ%2FcGLLPPHD9iFK4xS%2BA6WXahFVAsKA8Tbn03oq3eoymuU6m%2BY1jgeJYD2dL8qYmyYfWSMxPTEYzaWy0W%2FeY7XJVbAs6DL7BK3uYEUtSh0UPk8%2BVi3%2Fto8Xk%2FZt4Ja6CBhvoDrxlIqAkZvfJ56E78qugELs0e3CJirVjo%3D .

name: Team Harris-Walz
subject: Please let us explain why this request is important
body:
| First and foremost, we want to acknowledge the fear, confusion, and sadness many of you are feeling at this moment.
---
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2412?refcode=kh_em_fr_20241108_b2_thw_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-ufm-&amount=50&amounts=50%252C75%252C100%252C250%252C500&utm_campaign=kh_em_fr_20241108_b2_thw_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-ufm-&t=1&akid=264%2E2563979%2EErI8TB)
First and foremost, we want to acknowledge the fear, confusion, and sadness many of you are feeling at this moment. For others, you may be looking for something meaningful and important to channel your emotions toward. If that's you, then we're asking you to make a donation to the Democratic Party today. **Here's why this request is so important.** As you read this, there are two U.S. Senate races that are either too close to call, or within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges. We expect to win most of them, but they all need our help to get across the finish line -- help we can provide with our staff on the ground in those states if we have the resources to do so. **[Can you please rush a contribution to the Harris Fight Fund program today? We will put your donation to work making sure we succeed and count every vote in these final Senate races.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-hvf-november-fight-fund-2024?refcode=kh_em_fr_20241108_b2_thw_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-ufm-&amount=50&amounts=50%252C75%252C100%252C250%252C500&countdown=-3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ak&utm_campaign=kh_em_fr_20241108_b2_thw_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-ufm-&refcode2=264_2563979_ErI8TB&akid=264%2E2563979%2EErI8TB)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$50 >>](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/1009?c0=em-hvf-november-fight-fund-2024.OpRu0f&refcode=kh_em_fr_20241108_b2_thw_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-ufm-&amount=50&amounts=50%252C75%252C100%252C250%252C500&utm_campaign=kh_em_fr_20241108_b2_thw_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-ufm-&countdown=-3&t=3&akid=264%2E2563979%2EErI8TB)

name: Bob Casey
subject: I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4807%2E552475%2E402jGo)
Hello, Peter.
This Senate race is still too close to call, and my team needs your help to ensure every Pennsylvanian has their voice heard.
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241108-6?refcode=em20241108-6&refcode2=4807_552475_402jGo&akid=4807%2E552475%2E402jGo)**
It has been made clear there are more than 100,000 votes still to be counted. Pennsylvania is where our democratic process was born. We must allow that process to play out and ensure that every vote that is eligible to be counted will be counted. That is what Pennsylvania deserves.
My team is working hard to make sure every ballot is properly counted, but we’ll need the resources to make sure we can keep up this work.
**[So please, donate $5 or more today to ensure we have what it takes to count every last vote.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241108-6?refcode=em20241108-6&refcode2=4807_552475_402jGo&akid=4807%2E552475%2E402jGo)**

clean_body: Hello, Peter. This Senate race is still too close to call, and my team needs your help to ensure every Pennsylvanian has their voice heard. It has been made clear there are more than 100,000 votes still to be counted. Pennsylvania is where our democratic process was born. We must allow that process to play out and ensure that every vote that is eligible to be counted will be counted. That is what Pennsylvania deserves. My team is working hard to make sure every ballot is properly counted, but we’ll need the resources to make sure we can keep up this work. I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard, whether on the floor of the Senate or in a free and fair election. Now, let’s finish the job. With gratitude, Bob Casey

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: You made this possible.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_110824_electionresults [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_110824_electionresults]
Friend,
I am proud and truly humbled to be writing to you all for the very first time as the Congresswoman-elect of California’s 12th District!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_110824_electionresults [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_110824_electionresults]
From our earliest days, you’ve shown up, you’ve spoken out, and together, we’ve made history.
Firstly, and most importantly, I want to thank you, Friend, because if it weren't for you and your grassroots efforts, I would not have made it this far – I am eternally grateful.
I also want to thank all of the volunteers who knocked on countless doors with us, spoke to countless voters across the district, and got the word out about my campaign.
And of course, I can’t forget my phenomenal campaign team and endorsers who believed in me from the beginning.
Your support has been the heart and soul of this campaign. Together, we’ve proven that a vision of justice and equity can win. I can’t express how deeply grateful I am for every single one of you who stood beside me, every step of the way, to make this moment possible. This victory belongs to all of us.
I also want to take a moment to acknowledge Vice President Kamala Harris, who stepped into this race late but brought with her a fierce commitment to our shared values. Kamala’s campaign stood on the foundations of justice, integrity, and progress — values that guided every part of her journey. In her concession speech, she reminded us, "While I concede to this election, I do not concede to the fight that fueled this campaign... the fight for freedom, opportunity, fairness and the dignity of all people." Her resilience and determination continue to inspire us, and though her campaign has ended, she’s far from done.
As we face another Donald Trump presidency, we know the stakes are higher than ever. Trump’s Project 2025 agenda is a dangerous blueprint aimed at dismantling the progress we’ve made on civil rights, climate action, and so much more. Now, more than ever, we must resist and stand up for the values we hold dear.
For reproductive freedom, for voting rights, for our planet, for all of our most marginalized communities — we have to work twice as hard.
The road ahead won’t be easy, but I promise you, we will not back down. With your support, we’ll do everything to hold the line in Congress and resist the Project 2025 agenda. Together, we’ll push forward for a better future, no matter the challenges.
Thank you, truly, from the bottom of my heart. Let’s continue this fight for the future we deserve.
In solidarity and hope,
Lateefah
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_110824_electionresults [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_110824_electionresults] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s running to take this fight to Congress. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a fighter.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit LateefahSimon.com [http://lateefahsimon.com/]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_110824_electionresults]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_110824_electionresults]
https://www.facebook.com/lateefah.simon [https://www.facebook.com/lateefah.simon] https://x.com/lateefahsimon [https://x.com/lateefahsimon] https://www.instagram.com/lateefahforcongress/?igshid=NTc4MTIwNjQ2YQ%3D%3D [https://www.instagram.com/lateefahforcongress/?igshid=NTc4MTIwNjQ2YQ%3D%3D]
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St
#100 - 438
Oakland, CA 94612
United States
Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-ALtiLirbU23KzVoAZepCg2?unsubscribedata=eCDDY2hAYIQOjLAuG0hzL1TlFjZT0WQauLZ%2FbZBopqqFNa8mtZk0bnXzCumSs5Nzrifpf%2Fv%2By%2FPUJAFZU7DJe3VjZ7A0Q6O0kARQnVLZHcy4iy4k8g%2BUNZeR0VA4iHcQqc7r%2BdZN16xeqPQauxMQbbWtqmTHafBb0NnL8yHuNVDucQaqOUVMIGjKrJseF05Wsg5LJMZ9WFmI76jK%2Fi2xurVzA3DcwClbKd71WtgnTWYCpWfPuKFq1LW8aatbSk3Zk6jLQjeo4syEQDyuwJ0Xafiev2UiUWJkLic0z1%2B6MiR%2BHeT9iPOd9mL80Lgm%2F6gWsGDBayVNMtslmQda5RUKKkTQMQM2sDzno%2BM4CIODk7Y2JVzMwe5ZiMXFaVgIq4GvmF2ihPIg3w9ZDbPo0s3N7YqeYs1lSA%2FzKfMpy8EPx7Yo6YFp1Pq6EYvjkmyyzLbr .

And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.** We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban. Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: **[Please, will you split $25 now – or whatever you can spare – between my campaign and Defeat Boebert PAC to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue?](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=374225e5d28e4e65867a40714f005f44&_e=lXLqFinDethZxx2QfHiJGicqKkqXktLm1pKxGejBQM32R2NYNj2NidEagr9imkC8p1CK9fY-MnhN3jowswYocWkcCYY7vTX6NNHAP5tp7gE3WWP-e-BtHu1y-BvChhjBCWWfsEAlAj-XQHKQeKnDXyJoOCBOfLNINYZKo77qgab0yg1VOcExEAJhQEaNn9BUevEyIBI5KKCYkd6kVpBIJStFywgNsF_dggC_h_0x7nFwJrnT7hWD3_dWpAjeXP55wJcyTAMeVo_Au2v7k_66x28iyyzH5P4doWp_FFEB35XD0OJ7_o_9WcvdVi4b8POmvV7kS40zIAcsG33K8OWv8_PudvPlzcD0vpCuRHumU18vkxQ02ADbf6_kCl4Qs9Q-JPAPCVwlgk-gZRoWR2-DOMjRtGrTvAatu0AtovNhSMxigvjgFp4PnNkfBOwKgtOK)** **[**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=374225e5d28e4e65867a40714f005f44&_e=lXLqFinDethZxx2QfHiJGicqKkqXktLm1pKxGejBQM32R2NYNj2NidEagr9imkC8p1CK9fY-MnhN3jowswYocWkcCYY7vTX6NNHAP5tp7gE3WWP-e-BtHu1y-BvChhjBCWWfsEAlAj-XQHKQeKnDXyJoOCBOfLNINYZKo77qgab0yg1VOcExEAJhQEaNn9BUevEyIBI5KKCYkd6kVpBIJStFywgNsF_dggC_h_0x7nFwJrnT7hWD3_dWpAjeXP55r62dTRXv3VVW7qxejcEN9dTbX1IU0K4lixeXRJjC9mLmLDtVCU0AwT0YsNan5NdWaDYF6z0y5G-c5oSPvfSYGAxwbDRBGqykJxRhEqdiwdiT_fspbJC55STNSIGQRqHF3hDO4fUnng44KsGLL0Fcy9S-AIxJCAX7xAbleYSbpq8%3D)** We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. clean_body: | | | Here's where things stand, Peter: Nevada’s Senate race is still too close to call – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes. We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban. Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But today, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win. So please, Peter, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you so much. Jacky Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC

# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4805%2E552475%2ED55W5R)
**Peter, this Pennsylvania Senate race is not over, and we need your help to re-elect Bob Casey.**
If we’re going to stop Republicans from attacking our fundamental freedoms, we can’t afford to lose another Senate seat.
Bob Casey has fought to protect women’s rights, workers’ rights, and voting rights his entire career, and he won’t stop now.
**The good news is that we have a path to victory, but only if every vote is fairly counted.** Our team is working hard to make that happen, but with tens of thousands of votes left to be counted, we need your help.
[**Rush a donation of $5 or more to Bob Casey today to ensure we have the resources we need to count every last vote.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241108-7?refcode=em20241108-7&refcode2=4805_552475_D55W5R&akid=4805%2E552475%2ED55W5R)

subject: We're headed to a recount…

body:

| | Peter, I know many of us are still processing the results of Tuesday's election and what it means for our district and our nation. Donald Trump's victory presents challenges we must now confront together, and we'll need a strong presence in the People's House of Representatives to find the Big Middle, breaking down partisan divides. Results are still coming in, and it looks like our race may result in a recount despite our small lead. That's why we must do everything we can to win the House or limit the GOP majority - that means holding the line in OH-09. Peter, I need your support to fund our recount efforts and help us get over the finish line. name: Team America
subject: A gratitude of appreciation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
body:
Thank you for your never-ending support – it made all the difference

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zego474vggdjrhim5k7b9cj8eqtrolt75a6epvq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o35c3h2bs)

Friend,

_**THANK YOU.**_

President Trump secured the White House, Republicans flipped back the Senate, and our CONSERVATIVE Majority in the House is holding strong - all thanks to patriotic Americans like YOU.

_It looks like it could be a CLEAN SWEEP._

**Your never-ending support** powered our efforts to boost President Trump's mission to save America.

This included funding for our get-out-the-vote effort, which included critical targeted messaging for swing state voters and _**helped President Trump secure one of the most historic wins in political history.**_

_**With President Trump BACK in the White House, he will put America-First and embark on an epic journey to Make America Great Again.**_

_We will need dedicated patriots like you in the future to ensure our movement thrives and the 47th President succeeds, but for now, we simply**CANNOT thank you enough for your support this election cycle.**_

Thank you, and God Bless, friend,

Team America.

**[CONTRIBUTE HERE>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuqhd5b19g3g6uffoh9mpt3o16njrkuqg6el9mf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o35c3h2bs)**

name: Victor Riches
subject: What If Barry Goldwater Were Running Today?
body:
If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism."

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh0imh3sll3jub488ludje68saifvoeckvqjdoe0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o30s5h2bs)
Friend,

In 1964, Senator Barry Goldwater boldly opposed government overreach, declaring that _“extremism in the defense of liberty is no vice.”_

Today, we face another threat — the rise of woke culture — where free speech is stifled, the government interferes in every aspect of our lives, and identity politics replaces individual merit.

**If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism."**

Senator Goldwater would recognize the "woke" movement as a form of collectivism and groupthink that conflicts with individual liberty. He would argue that true equality means equal opportunity, not equality of outcome, and that the government has no business imposing ideological conformity.

He would oppose mandatory diversity training, DEI, critical race theory, and identity-based quotas — and all illiberal attacks on our nation’s founding principles.

The Goldwater Institute is keeping Barry Goldwater’s legacy alive by fighting to protect the rights of all Americans against the injection of toxic identity politics into everyday life, and we are winning!

[You can help the Goldwater Institute stop the woke narrative that is sweeping the nation by donating today. When you give, your gift will be MATCHED! Click to double your donation >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkjj8uu99qusnliaju530nrcq9gn5r20j4q5suo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o30s5h2bs)
[Have Your Donation Matched!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zktgk8h1kfpft50nlcfo0720u5oli2af3kkcrv78_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o30s5h2bs)
The Goldwater Institute has a plan to defeat politically charged Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) policies. To achieve this goal, the Goldwater Institute has partnered with allied organizations to create a set of model policies targeted to state legislatures.

Our five-point program for removing DEI from college campuses includes:
1. Abolishing DEI bureaucracies.
2. Protecting professors and students from mandatory political indoctrination.
3. Ending the use of bias reporting systems that encourage students to spy on their colleagues and report them to university administrators.
4. Passing new state laws with “teeth” that hold college bureaucrats accountable when they don’t protect free speech on campus.
5. Requiring transparency in classroom curriculum and instructor syllabuses.

The war against discriminatory DEI practices will continue until we persuade state legislators to support our cause and implement our five-point policy platform in their states.

**Here’s how you can help defeat DEI:**

[ALL online donations are matched until the end of the year! Can you donate $10, $35, $100, or even $250 today? Click below to rush your support to the Goldwater Institute.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za0mn0iikk7855bec4m9ev7r1t96t40rfeenb0r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o30s5h2bs) [Donate $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo526bmctclaf6fum365b40grqoig4v08v8c7os0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o30s5h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpvm286dhssdpodhcaliqv6ohsjd185h17mcfctg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o30s5h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zli40cdv3qropbc5k4a96us2fr06i817rp5ulg38_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o30s5h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsv77m9q66jbao826obcdm5j6n8upa9364qto5u0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o30s5h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6n0ij7fk51fs9cc0q1coejtngbbqra6pdokfqm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o30s5h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zduq454iead793rsug6t889v02d3q9hpu60gfjto_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o30s5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9sei6bju7qa5f27k0q98at0ckvs28ltr5id7lsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o30s5h2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3go3isgp3e5qk8upjlrq6te6aacs39fja6ak0dg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o30s5h2bs)
Senator Goldwater wouldn’t just fight back against the woke agenda. He would lead the charge for freedom. And that’s exactly what the Goldwater Institute is doing.

We’re standing on the front lines of this cultural battle, promoting the same principles that Barry Goldwater held dear: liberty, free markets, and limited government.

Barry Goldwater believed in America — and so do we. You can help us carry the torch of liberty into the next generation.

[Help us keep fighting for Barry Goldwater’s legacy of liberty by donating today!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zosh8oe4kbsjvb3i04ucuvdbbnnqolo5skjfn24o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o30s5h2bs)

Sincerely,

Victor Riches
President & CEO
Goldwater Institute _The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5rm7eoaajdh6b9h4qm1m50gbrcgr37550qtoung_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o35c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zefopkvi9g559faurbp2q24as6f8hvu1fdd6a0og_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o35c1h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgp7vrnbukt90n14lvej9d6r2cbhpqrmgj0ogndo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o35c1h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg1v4nlfkshcv1g7chdnunlsb128j4dr931j04io_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o35c1h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpajgbvn1agiohvcu415jdotvmtfto56nmbn64lg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o35c1h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z00untd3nprt4k064802jgrmlil2knup095ceaoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o35c1h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zik7t774k708i77im7phv3gt12sfms3vh03gtjg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o35c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj5clgm1o724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr2ijgbln7eh43esvdhe2a13uccs4ei11ljfbqe0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o35c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvtblndktk3s8dvagghti0fqlrhrimseohf7vt1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim0o35c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqgjvdqsptf83pnhmbe6r2ap36f63scl93eq4kb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim8o76c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi1pcguf9vqppq2rtu7ir73skhn7cp6hm0cr42hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim8o76c1h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg3kte674qn566gdona8ria7flrqtrm7k9b2gdq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim8o76c1h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zon1abn25shgcfgskh7nhtd7a717naact6ugu5no_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim8o76c1h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5c37nm0pt6umhrv11oeoc09bjssm8badp9odseo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim8o76c1h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmor78futpm5m333uiahgtf6pcutqgj6jh6dtr1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chim8o76c1h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

name: House Republicans
subject: It’s time we say thank you to President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We're ALMOST out of spots on our thank you letter Trump! Sign your name now!

|
---
| | | Friend,

President Trump has fought the good fight. _**He has walked the path of the righteous.**_

And for that, the American people have elected him to be our 47th President of the United States.

It was a hard fought campaign, but President Trump persevered despite a blatantly dishonest media campaign against him and multiple attempts on his life.

**For that, he deserves a big thank you.** **[We're putting together a WONDERFUL thank you note for President Trump, and we would love to see your name on it.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7uqllhmcr17fjjtn7enj5mkfmd6571hfo37bf7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4cdh2bs "We’re putting together a WONDERFUL thank you note for President Trump, and we would love to see your name on it.")**

name: Team America
subject: President Trump wins the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
body:
Thank you for your never-ending support – it made all the difference

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjupu19nihm1fnrmqsu76as4bj0vnvno9kjr38p8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4cjh2bs)

Friend,

_**THANK YOU.**_

President Trump secured the White House, Republicans flipped back the Senate, and our CONSERVATIVE Majority in the House is holding strong - all thanks to patriotic Americans like YOU.

_It looks like it could be a CLEAN SWEEP._

**Your never-ending support** powered our efforts to boost President Trump's mission to save America.

This included funding for our get-out-the-vote effort, which included critical targeted messaging for swing state voters and _**helped President Trump secure one of the most historic wins in political history.**_

_**With President Trump BACK in the White House, he will put America-First and embark on an epic journey to Make America Great Again.**_

_We will need dedicated patriots like you in the future to ensure our movement thrives and the 47th President succeeds, but for now, we simply**CANNOT thank you enough for your support this election cycle.**_

Thank you, and God Bless, friend,

Team America.

**[CONTRIBUTE HERE>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm93ebim1eo9kk5gglcoqrreb9reipvqom5u45rg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4cjh2bs)**

Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
PO Box 1682

name: Victor Riches
subject: What If Barry Goldwater Were Running Today?
body:
If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism."

|
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv80u4fkuv82m9nl81eofn84a0vr2lqkrn0l5b08_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4c5h2bs)
Friend,

In 1964, Senator Barry Goldwater boldly opposed government overreach, declaring that _“extremism in the defense of liberty is no vice.”_

Today, we face another threat — the rise of woke culture — where free speech is stifled, the government interferes in every aspect of our lives, and identity politics replaces individual merit.

**If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism."**

Senator Goldwater would recognize the "woke" movement as a form of collectivism and groupthink that conflicts with individual liberty. He would argue that true equality means equal opportunity, not equality of outcome, and that the government has no business imposing ideological conformity.

He would oppose mandatory diversity training, DEI, critical race theory, and identity-based quotas — and all illiberal attacks on our nation’s founding principles.

The Goldwater Institute is keeping Barry Goldwater’s legacy alive by fighting to protect the rights of all Americans against the injection of toxic identity politics into everyday life, and we are winning!

[You can help the Goldwater Institute stop the woke narrative that is sweeping the nation by donating today. When you give, your gift will be MATCHED! Click to double your donation >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2o9t8msr9bk5slk7ltpksdoscvjni22jqqe78ao_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4c5h2bs)
[Have Your Donation Matched!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2juauiqjbh658jksd25essqglqc68givhgs5iug_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4c5h2bs)
The Goldwater Institute has a plan to defeat politically charged Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) policies. To achieve this goal, the Goldwater Institute has partnered with allied organizations to create a set of model policies targeted to state legislatures.

Our five-point program for removing DEI from college campuses includes:
1. Abolishing DEI bureaucracies.
2. Protecting professors and students from mandatory political indoctrination.
3. Ending the use of bias reporting systems that encourage students to spy on their colleagues and report them to university administrators.
4. Passing new state laws with “teeth” that hold college bureaucrats accountable when they don’t protect free speech on campus.
5. Requiring transparency in classroom curriculum and instructor syllabuses.

The war against discriminatory DEI practices will continue until we persuade state legislators to support our cause and implement our five-point policy platform in their states.

**Here’s how you can help defeat DEI:**

[ALL online donations are matched until the end of the year! Can you donate $10, $35, $100, or even $250 today? Click below to rush your support to the Goldwater Institute.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zha84fp71o6qmov5h17qvjsfbpvuu7qosvs3va7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4c5h2bs) [Donate $10](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6srum809hu0r9bd7vh3l3vouftf8l4unsgog9to_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4c5h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv0ci0eb018qne0a44blueljim6q4lfn84fnrskg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4c5h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zphge17sdu95gti04k93g0u7uvop39dtr4lgpu8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4c5h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z02tlelleqgd0qb37u4uec0uu1h7gb5bstc94pa8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4c5h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsii3emdtvv55c0g7spc2jb7u4pmtp0qh11rfppo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4c5h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqap03rvhfu6utabne6jm4m2rnd11erghjtosi6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7np0ni5h550kuqoir2tvlbf1gd9oedsk4pvnljo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4gm9tqh7dh8a690rg938g0iu32ucek3tsjf1ub8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4c5h2bs)
Senator Goldwater wouldn’t just fight back against the woke agenda. He would lead the charge for freedom. And that’s exactly what the Goldwater Institute is doing.

We’re standing on the front lines of this cultural battle, promoting the same principles that Barry Goldwater held dear: liberty, free markets, and limited government.

Barry Goldwater believed in America — and so do we. You can help us carry the torch of liberty into the next generation.

[Help us keep fighting for Barry Goldwater’s legacy of liberty by donating today!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpc57vq23vlhi5aeibgpk5jmjdo4aiko5g5427po_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4c5h2bs)

Sincerely,

Victor Riches
President & CEO
Goldwater Institute _The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._

body:
We're ALMOST out of spots on our thank you letter Trump! Sign your name now!

|
---
| | | Friend,

President Trump has fought the good fight. _**He has walked the path of the righteous.**_

And for that, the American people have elected him to be our 47th President of the United States.

It was a hard fought campaign, but President Trump persevered despite a blatantly dishonest media campaign against him and multiple attempts on his life.

**For that, he deserves a big thank you.** **[We're putting together a WONDERFUL thank you note for President Trump, and we would love to see your name on it.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm825shrcaudl172ftjjlmadafr7l52v4ecce6p8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimcor4cdh2bs "We’re putting together a WONDERFUL thank you note for President Trump, and we would love to see your name on it.")**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: The next generation needs this
body:
We’re in a moment of national reflection.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z05v26s28lbpvvg7ol1kcscbmjav0p99mckspfqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimaob6c9h2bs)
---
Friend, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl5jor3cf88ur44gisqsajnsfn44bmsms3g5prhg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimaob6c9h2bs)_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z78oneh5olu7o9vf7rnitk1etlgtpjk4rnppmqb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimaob6c9h2bs)
---
Friend, I'm proud to say that _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before:
* It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right.

* It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

* It's NOT a call for __ our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on __ how _all Americans_ can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving _ourselves_.

**I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.** _**[All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn3u9ljklnha29tj0u68t0vblue1c3csvt4in550_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimaob6c9h2bs)**_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdvuel3e06c4sor1jjq7i22eejteur8da539ac5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimaob6c9h2bs)
---
In this defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

clean_body: We’re in a moment of national reflection. | | | Friend, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--for the better. Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,Right Wing Revolution,as a guide for a return to an America where ... We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness. We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution. We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal. We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night. We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans. Friend, I'm proud to say that Right Wing Revolution is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before: It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right. It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American. It's NOT a call for our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on how all Americans can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving ourselves. I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE. In this defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |
