name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb8schbhcem25rqpmepclqiphciooklfhl4mja4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimaob6c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlqn51qcugc1bic1tcpt9rm9t29udbtdtuth6sl0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimaob6c9h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0q93li8uh7qj6imghrt8l4rblt5rve6pm38km18_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimaob6c9h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zp5m2b8dauver58iuh89j0gj01gpli0eifkpf0io_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimaob6c9h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo2ttp20cs3t43mac2fs86cemn5o6k3rr5dhoun8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimaob6c9h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjbqgg8rh6pinjqtar63apba97fm0akimphu35i0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimaob6c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

name: Team America
subject: A gratitude of appreciation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
body:
Thank you for your never-ending support – it made all the difference

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj2tmvaf5a10jvlo6c5p9jqbaguje9cmlqj4vbqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimeoj5c3h2bs)

Friend,

_**THANK YOU.**_

President Trump secured the White House, Republicans flipped back the Senate, and our CONSERVATIVE Majority in the House is holding strong - all thanks to patriotic Americans like YOU.

_It looks like it could be a CLEAN SWEEP._

**Your never-ending support** powered our efforts to boost President Trump's mission to save America.

This included funding for our get-out-the-vote effort, which included critical targeted messaging for swing state voters and _**helped President Trump secure one of the most historic wins in political history.**_

_**With President Trump BACK in the White House, he will put America-First and embark on an epic journey to Make America Great Again.**_

_We will need dedicated patriots like you in the future to ensure our movement thrives and the 47th President succeeds, but for now, we simply**CANNOT thank you enough for your support this election cycle.**_

Thank you, and God Bless, friend,

Team America.

body:
We're ALMOST out of spots on our thank you letter Trump! Sign your name now!

|

| | | Friend,

President Trump has fought the good fight. _**He has walked the path of the righteous.**_

And for that, the American people have elected him to be our 47th President of the United States.

It was a hard fought campaign, but President Trump persevered despite a blatantly dishonest media campaign against him and multiple attempts on his life.

**For that, he deserves a big thank you.** **[We're putting together a WONDERFUL thank you note for President Trump, and we would love to see your name on it.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z437king7rsn8jchv0be7u2rp1dh9tng3dgg0nq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimeoj6cjh2bs "We’re putting together a WONDERFUL thank you note for President Trump, and we would love to see your name on it.")**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: We’re going to fight our way to the finish
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5dcf6eed-ff25-452e-9414-fd608ef21c8b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, I know the last few days haven’t gone how we’d hoped. I’ve been through some tough times in my life. Times when it seemed foolish to hope, when the outcome was uncertain. I got through those tough times by fighting my way to the other side. Today, tomorrow, and the next day, we have to fight. With Republican control of the Senate assured, every seat that we win is a check on their control. I won’t shy away from working with anyone if it’s in the best interest of Arizona, but whatever power we retain is a mechanism for fighting the worst that might come our way. My race is still too close to call. There are hundreds of thousands of votes yet to be counted. We need to run through the tape and win this seat in Arizona. [Please, make a split donation to my campaign and Blue Amp Action. One last push to victory in Arizona. This matters, Peter. And I would not be asking you for help if it didn’t.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef2a0cae-42a0-4de1-96b8-7c7e8702ed06/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Thank you, Ruben

| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T953bbd20-e249-4c40-aee8-13c82233d6f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Peter, I know the last few days haven’t gone how we’d hoped. I’ve been through some tough times in my life. Times when it seemed foolish to hope, when the outcome was uncertain. I got through those tough times by fighting my way to the other side. Today, tomorrow, and the next day, we have to fight. With Republican control of the Senate assured, every seat that we win is a check on their control. I won’t shy away from working with anyone if it’s in the best interest of Arizona, but whatever power we retain is a mechanism for fighting the worst that might come our way. My race is still too close to call. There are hundreds of thousands of votes yet to be counted. We need to run through the tape and win this seat in Arizona. | | | | | Thank you, Ruben | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. body:

**This is an OUTRAGE.**
Trump hasn’t even taken office yet, and the Democrats are ALREADY in a full-blown panic.
Gavin Newsom has just convened a special session of the California legislature to draft legislation to directly SABOTAGE Trump’s agenda.
In his own words, they want to “Trump-proof” the entire state.
This is NOTHING LESS than a blatant attack on the WILL OF THE PEOPLE.
_**Let’s make this crystal clear: OVER 40% OF CALIFORNIANS VOTED FOR TRUMP.**_
That’s right - 40% of Californians want his policies, not Newsom’s disastrous failures.
_**But it gets WORSE:**_
Newsom has made it clear that this is only the FIRST of MANY “actions” his administration will take to BLOCK Trump’s agenda.
The Democrats have been working for YEARS to strip away our rights.
And now, here’s Newsom undermining the President who was duly elected by a MAJORITY of the people nationwide
We MUST take action NOW.
This is a DIRECT threat to every Republican, every conservative, and every patriot who believes in free and fair governance.
Join the California GOP in DEMANDING that Newsom HALT his radical efforts to block Trump’s agenda.
**We need 10,000 signatures IMMEDIATELY.**
__[_**Friend, we need YOUR name on that list. Time is running out.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp77hp6af79vi7q81u38sumr64r7j4jsi43sjcao_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimeoj6cjh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Defense News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpf4n624dt3qbglrdv24tvo3tqeqvlbe2u1f0jag_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimeoj2cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhs8e6iun1cp4d01494lqcc8qbn2qh755ei3ndo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimeoj2cdh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgk48eutlnl9uvpudplr9fqp3m6ci379s6r2vg00_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimeoj2cdh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdq5cd0e1dsag8m54k9k8oith9ck6gl1goc34h18_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimeoj2cdh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6b8v7dugspa7p2v4dt6lfiolc3gm7hdesmto7ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimeoj2cdh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl85of9122tace94eo65vopm2allq1kirdpa3me0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4chimeoj2cdh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

body:
Our House Majority is hanging in the balance.

President Trump has won the Presidency, but without this _**CRITICAL**_ House seat, his agenda could be stalled.
**This is Rep. Ronny Jackson - President Trump’s _STRONGEST_ supporter in Congress -_I come to you with an urgent message._**
Our House Majority is relying on Nick Begich winning his election. He’s running to _**FLIP**_ a seat in Alaska, and without my friend in Congress, the America First Agenda will be held up by the far-left.
**Nick’s race hasn’t been called yet, so we need all hands on deck if we’re going to retain our House Majority and carry out President Trump’s agenda in Washington.**

subject: It’s time we say thank you to President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We're ALMOST out of spots on our thank you letter Trump! Sign your name now!

|
---
| | | Friend,

President Trump has fought the good fight. _**He has walked the path of the righteous.**_

And for that, the American people have elected him to be our 47th President of the United States.

It was a hard fought campaign, but President Trump persevered despite a blatantly dishonest media campaign against him and multiple attempts on his life.

**For that, he deserves a big thank you.** **[We're putting together a WONDERFUL thank you note for President Trump, and we would love to see your name on it.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1_FL-qZCXQmOUBlju2SXIg~~/AARclAA~ "We’re putting together a WONDERFUL thank you note for President Trump, and we would love to see your name on it.")**

**This is an OUTRAGE.**
Trump hasn’t even taken office yet, and the Democrats are ALREADY in a full-blown panic.
Gavin Newsom has just convened a special session of the California legislature to draft legislation to directly SABOTAGE Trump’s agenda.
In his own words, they want to “Trump-proof” the entire state.
This is NOTHING LESS than a blatant attack on the WILL OF THE PEOPLE.
_**Let’s make this crystal clear: OVER 40% OF CALIFORNIANS VOTED FOR TRUMP.**_
That’s right - 40% of Californians want his policies, not Newsom’s disastrous failures.
_**But it gets WORSE:**_
Newsom has made it clear that this is only the FIRST of MANY “actions” his administration will take to BLOCK Trump’s agenda.
The Democrats have been working for YEARS to strip away our rights.
And now, here’s Newsom undermining the President who was duly elected by a MAJORITY of the people nationwide
We MUST take action NOW.
This is a DIRECT threat to every Republican, every conservative, and every patriot who believes in free and fair governance.
Join the California GOP in DEMANDING that Newsom HALT his radical efforts to block Trump’s agenda.
**We need 10,000 signatures IMMEDIATELY.**
__[_**Friend, we need YOUR name on that list. Time is running out.**_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1Yhf2Mb0GaRhBsZAhd7whA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpEbjqP0S3aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jYWxpZm9ybmlhLXJlcHVibGljYW4tcGFydHkvMjAyNDExMDgtcC1lbWwtbmV3c29tLWlzLXNhYm90YWdpbmctdHJ1bXA_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTAwMDAwMDAwMDAxMjA0NyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnh1bm89NDY0YzQ1NTgzNDM1MzUzNCZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjQxMTA5VwNzcGNCCmcswSIvZ0wsKu5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

body:
Peter, Common sense won BIG on Tuesday night. It’s pretty clear that Americans of all political affiliations care about how m
|
---
| Peter, Common sense won BIG on Tuesday night. It’s pretty clear that Americans of all political affiliations care about how much they’re paying for a gallon of milk and think criminals should be punished and the border secured. The woke elitism being shoved on us by the left just isn’t playing. The win was SO big that even mainstream Politico had to admit we’ve earned the label of “swing state.” That means Leftist Lunatics won’t be able to overlook us in the next election as an easy sell for their nutty ideas. subject: Important Notice: Meat Warning
body:
| | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19013/6374453/a5f035ad8afa7589abc03864170ed401c7c4b1c0/1bb184487e41778fc7b53dc9f599d2a7cd884ccb) here at any time.
---
[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19013/6374453/f932175635aa11edfb40421e6a4f0a65c604e2bf/1bb184487e41778fc7b53dc9f599d2a7cd884ccb)
---
---
November 9th, 2024
---
|
---
# HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now
---
---
---
**The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis".** Which means 2 dangerous things for you: 1\. Higher prices at the grocery store
2\. Less meat available That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile. But there is a catch. Not all protein is created equal. And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis. See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements: It needs to: ✅Last a while
✅Taste great
✅Store without refrigeration
✅Can't break the bank **Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short!** Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars? Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops. Grocery store meat doesn't work either. First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year. But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight. But don't worry friend. **There is a protein option that checks all four boxes:** ✅This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years. ✅It doesn't need to be refrigerated. ✅And it come with an easy payment plan so it won't break the bank. ✅And most importantly, it tastes delicious! **Introducing for the first time ever...** [**The BRAND NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19013/6374453/f932175635aa11edfb40421e6a4f0a65c604e2bf/1bb184487e41778fc7b53dc9f599d2a7cd884ccb)
---
[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19013/6374453/f932175635aa11edfb40421e6a4f0a65c604e2bf/1bb184487e41778fc7b53dc9f599d2a7cd884ccb)
---
**And[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19013/6374453/f932175635aa11edfb40421e6a4f0a65c604e2bf/1bb184487e41778fc7b53dc9f599d2a7cd884ccb)[right here on this page](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19013/6374453/f932175635aa11edfb40421e6a4f0a65c604e2bf/1bb184487e41778fc7b53dc9f599d2a7cd884ccb), you can score an introductory price plus some amazing FREE gifts.** Now, there is one thing you should know. Every time we've offered meat in the past, we've SOLD OUT. So when people find out about this brand-NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit, we could see a huge rush. I don't want to alarm you, but there are no IOUs or rain checks on this meat kit. It's first-come, first-served. So if you're going to reserve your kit, **[**you need to act fast**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19013/6374453/f932175635aa11edfb40421e6a4f0a65c604e2bf/1bb184487e41778fc7b53dc9f599d2a7cd884ccb)**. For starters, you get 5 meat options. Chicken, beef, pork, turkey and ground beef. So you aren't stuck with 1 or 2 types of protein. And the variety means you can use it in a ton of recipes. Chicken salad, burgers, tacos, you name it. **You're in control, not the stock boy at the grocery store.** Plus, you can actually pronounce the ingredients that we use. That's because there are only 2. Meat, of course, and salt for preservation. That's it! No funky chemicals. No artificial gunk. The only things in your food are food. [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19013/6374453/f932175635aa11edfb40421e6a4f0a65c604e2bf/1bb184487e41778fc7b53dc9f599d2a7cd884ccb) Now, you may be wondering how we guarantee such a long shelf life for canned foods. It comes from our special, old-fashioned retort canning process. **We use small-batch retorts to cook your meat right inside the can.** That means 2 important things. First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can. And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way. And guess what? This is all done right here in the US of A. Our survival meats are home raised here in the states. So you know exactly where your food comes from. **And as a family-owned, American business, we take a lot of pride in that.** [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19013/6374453/f932175635aa11edfb40421e6a4f0a65c604e2bf/1bb184487e41778fc7b53dc9f599d2a7cd884ccb) Look friend, there's no better time to claim your Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit than now. Meat is one of the first things to go in a crisis. Wildfires, hurricanes, cyberattacks or something else. And the last thing I want for you is to miss out. Or worse, leave you and your family stuck with a subpar protein option. Here at 4Patriots, our mission is to champion freedom and self-reliance for all Americans. **And with everything going on in the world, it's clear that survival food is no longer a luxury. It's a necessity.** Ask anyone who's lived through a crisis. There's no warning. You won't see a big billboard that says "emergency coming in 5 days! Stock up before then." Disasters come out of nowhere. And if you aren't prepared when it hits, it's too late. I mean, just imagine standing in line at your local supermarket. Shelves picked bare. And the people who didn't prepare scrambling and hoarding what little food they can find. All while you pray there's a sliver of meat left for you and your family. **This doesn't have to be you, friend. You can choose a different path.** When storms come knocking at your door, you can stay safely inside with your loved ones. You'll feel great knowing you and your family have delicious shelf-stable meat ready to go. And trust me, the peace of mind that comes with that, feels incredible. [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19013/6374453/f932175635aa11edfb40421e6a4f0a65c604e2bf/1bb184487e41778fc7b53dc9f599d2a7cd884ccb)
---
[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19013/6374453/f932175635aa11edfb40421e6a4f0a65c604e2bf/1bb184487e41778fc7b53dc9f599d2a7cd884ccb)
---
To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we are able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront.
---
**More Raving Customer Reviews!**
---
**Joseph L. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐**
"I buy a lot of stuff at Wal-mart, but this is gonna out-do the stuff on Wal-mart shelves, which contains all kinds of preservatives. I did a taste test even though I've never found a bad product from 4Patriots. Hamburger Helper can kiss my butt – this stuff here is good! (Maybe not as good as my wife's cooking.) This is a good buy." **Danielle M. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
4Patriots Employee**
"I was surprised at how good everything in the Ultimate Meat Medley really was. As an avid cook, I have high standards; I worried it might be salty or dried out. What I discovered was moist chicken and turkey that shreds easily for the fastest chicken salad ever or super fast BBQ turkey sammies. The pork and beef are in perfect chucks for adding to stews or burritos. Even the ground beef, which I could not envision being delicious, tasted just like the ground beef I typically brown and drain, but in zero time! This box is definitely going to become my "oh shoot, I forgot to thaw a meat" solution for everyday and I'll have to grab more to store." **Michael M. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐**
"My family won't be asking, "where's the meat when disaster comes." I bought the Meat Medley so we have beef, pork, chicken, turkey and ground beef to supplement our food stock. I was very pleasantly surprised at the amount of meat at the price I paid. My order arrived quickly and now I know I'll have the right answer when my family ask "where's the meat"." **Ernest K. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐**
"It's a must have item for your food prep. inventory. Great as a companion item for some of the other items for added protein." [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19013/6374453/f932175635aa11edfb40421e6a4f0a65c604e2bf/1bb184487e41778fc7b53dc9f599d2a7cd884ccb)

First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can. And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way. And guess what? This is all done right here in the US of A. Our survival meats are home raised here in the states. So you know exactly where your food comes from. And as a family-owned, American business, we take a lot of pride in that. Look friend, there's no better time to claim your Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit than now. Meat is one of the first things to go in a crisis. Wildfires, hurricanes, cyberattacks or something else. And the last thing I want for you is to miss out. Or worse, leave you and your family stuck with a subpar protein option. Here at 4Patriots, our mission is to champion freedom and self-reliance for all Americans. And with everything going on in the world, it's clear that survival food is no longer a luxury. It's a necessity. Ask anyone who's lived through a crisis. There's no warning. You won't see a big billboard that says "emergency coming in 5 days! Stock up before then." Disasters come out of nowhere. And if you aren't prepared when it hits, it's too late. I mean, just imagine standing in line at your local supermarket. Shelves picked bare. And the people who didn't prepare scrambling and hoarding what little food they can find. All while you pray there's a sliver of meat left for you and your family. This doesn't have to be you, friend. You can choose a different path. When storms come knocking at your door, you can stay safely inside with your loved ones. You'll feel great knowing you and your family have delicious shelf-stable meat ready to go. And trust me, the peace of mind that comes with that, feels incredible. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we are able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. More Raving Customer Reviews! Joseph L. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "I buy a lot of stuff at Wal-mart, but this is gonna out-do the stuff on Wal-mart shelves, which contains all kinds of preservatives. I did a taste test even though I've never found a bad product from 4Patriots. Hamburger Helper can kiss my butt – this stuff here is good! (Maybe not as good as my wife's cooking.) This is a good buy." Danielle M. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4Patriots Employee "I was surprised at how good everything in the Ultimate Meat Medley really was. As an avid cook, I have high standards; I worried it might be salty or dried out. What I discovered was moist chicken and turkey that shreds easily for the fastest chicken salad ever or super fast BBQ turkey sammies. The pork and beef are in perfect chucks for adding to stews or burritos. Even the ground beef, which I could not envision being delicious, tasted just like the ground beef I typically brown and drain, but in zero time! This box is definitely going to become my "oh shoot, I forgot to thaw a meat" solution for everyday and I'll have to grab more to store." Michael M. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "My family won't be asking, "where's the meat when disaster comes." I bought the Meat Medley so we have beef, pork, chicken, turkey and ground beef to supplement our food stock. I was very pleasantly surprised at the amount of meat at the price I paid. My order arrived quickly and now I know I'll have the right answer when my family ask "where's the meat"." Ernest K. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "It's a must have item for your food prep. inventory. Great as a companion item for some of the other items for added protein." | Firearm Upgrades is your news. name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9otXdI93OnI_wwVSMoBtRQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpEciKP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEwOVcDc3BjQgpnK7wwL2feYTKlUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9otXdI93OnI_wwVSMoBtRQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpEciKP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEwOVcDc3BjQgpnK7wwL2feYTKlUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9otXdI93OnI_wwVSMoBtRQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpEciKP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEwOVcDc3BjQgpnK7wwL2feYTKlUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9otXdI93OnI_wwVSMoBtRQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpEciKP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEwOVcDc3BjQgpnK7wwL2feYTKlUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9otXdI93OnI_wwVSMoBtRQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpEciKP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEwOVcDc3BjQgpnK7wwL2feYTKlUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)”** on DVD today. clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College ~~ Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “~~” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “~~,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. ~~ We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “~~” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: ~~ Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

| Fellow Conservatives,
I know you are thrilled Donald Trump won the election and will be President again! I'm happy and excited to see how his presidency will improve all our lives.
My team and I are so excited by President Trump's election day victory that my campaign is now offering, for a limited time, an autographed copy of my book "The Drive: Lessons Learned" [for a campaign donation of $47](https://htve6ffbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UdfMoOS6KfpYulGBFrCLHzKNOLSuU-F_Wdm8Ce9I-FNGq8wf1S_Z6jTl90mZL8aVOFNME3MX3T0BtHaRG27C6aMddFSB6vch7SOV2Q_KVnYDUUdG8TI4cUeot67O8XcPEb_xmeWx-39VEEQ4iBEhYR6ZGllfG4Q9&c=RdL2PEeczqXu6rRuHli8LDrvgEwp7he9ICASR8at3A49sG5sguCNnA==&ch=xJ0uUGQkB1ykUMeIzm8bialQqtYftznW1QscDX17xuFPREsgrpPHTw==). Your help today gets you an autographed copy of my book, The Drive: Lessons Learned. Three years ago I shocked the political world by winning a race nobody thought I could. With your help today I'll shock them again. Conservatively, Ed The Trucker

This included funding for our get-out-the-vote effort, which included critical targeted messaging for swing state voters and helped President Trump secure one of the most historic wins in political history. With President Trump BACK in the White House, he will put America-First and embark on an epic journey to Make America Great Again. We will need dedicated patriots like you in the future to ensure our movement thrives and the 47th President succeeds, but for now, we simplyCANNOT thank you enough for your support this election cycle. Thank you, and God Bless, friend, Team America. Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC) American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC) PO Box 1682 Bellevue, WA 98009-1682 Since 1980, AmeriPAC has helped fund and elect a large number of conservative, freedom-oriented candidates to public office. We’ve played a huge role in several presidential cycles. We directed much of our time and funds from generous patriots like you to oppose radical Leftist candidates, including Bill Clinton, Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama, and Kamala Harris. At AmeriPAC, we want to personally restore our country for freedom-loving patriots like you. Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=706cd418971b4a058605d1854aa71eb9&_e=mO0Tj-rHYH4z7YjcXk7xYmJr1cvKitA-AI1Y2ERXf9uIgX7MC--AphSz3yw5Zs4lz5ECBZH34XJYDC0tiHnttthYsjl6cCJhYSpfeippZvy_bn1exvb0Mg9gVm-6wlnGAFIBqfJK-qkr4-2CIKgIElV5VmHq6yjQLgrTenyw9YXefBBmrM8CQ2xDlHV0ismnbcQkK5Kh_pQBeOH4SkySVacEuxqDqzAEadL0plkQAO8g4BkfLqmlehPbQF2yArWWmpnyFKvzu3FfK1SSffVLWi-wntEaz6orubh6wHIm3zlYt0U2Cy3lqP9LDYb2EJJ1ORgwyRz-hXN-xzVo7DB_X5iLlskiAgmzaH0LJu8LHaGpW1i7_Y-9xq6a6cHRt4UpIFh92wX6kWw7UNravdUz6ZBzVMixA2jYULycElUTg6Qk26feM-irkt76KWp_SQLJ) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=706cd418971b4a058605d1854aa71eb9&_e=mO0Tj-rHYH4z7YjcXk7xYmJr1cvKitA-AI1Y2ERXf9uIgX7MC--AphSz3yw5Zs4lz5ECBZH34XJYDC0tiHnttthYsjl6cCJhYSpfeippZvy_bn1exvb0Mg9gVm-6wlnGAFIBqfJK-qkr4-2CIKgIElV5VmHq6yjQLgrTenyw9YXefBBmrM8CQ2xDlHV0ismnbcQkK5Kh_pQBeOH4SkySVacEuxqDqzAEadL0plkQAO8g4BkfLqmlehPbQF2yArWWmpnyFKvzu3FfK1SSffVLWi-wntEaz6orubh6wHIm3zk41XHtfQRaU3CLmgFVKHgzornHFzsJx3uxXCNjH7Cdc5rjhD6AOi4GAyZn2gzWs8zIPDlPcFX__AKDIOVy9zFLw-qw__oOW8aR6R_SuyN2z0FFpdonGuVzVCN6_LnUQCVzZT2yoA3Sc9w74ze60gU8)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=706cd418971b4a058605d1854aa71eb9&_e=mO0Tj-rHYH4z7YjcXk7xYmJr1cvKitA-AI1Y2ERXf9uIgX7MC--AphSz3yw5Zs4lz5ECBZH34XJYDC0tiHnttthYsjl6cCJhYSpfeippZvy_bn1exvb0Mg9gVm-6wlnGAFIBqfJK-qkr4-2CIKgIElV5VmHq6yjQLgrTenyw9YXefBBmrM8CQ2xDlHV0ismnbcQkK5Kh_pQBeOH4SkySVacEuxqDqzAEadL0plkQAO8g4BkfLqmlehPbQF2yArWWmpnyFKvzu3FfK1SSffVLWi-wntEaz6orubh6wHIm3zlh7y6kIeshTnLJ5ubPtcpo3iujuf4GydOFBDh5czwgClU7mMdVA8pnGwz05creGjMEhOPQJoUq0sU0-e9CNNImLsufeaMhAt3M4TBWloqQ3_kJhgul297BGvp8b6jldIfZPxMELyac_kUTTICB0qeM)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, "" has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching "," we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of "" on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

subject: It’s time we say thank you to President Trump

body:
We're ALMOST out of spots on our thank you letter Trump! Sign your name now!

|
---
| | | Friend,

President Trump has fought the good fight. _**He has walked the path of the righteous.**_

And for that, the American people have elected him to be our 47th President of the United States.

It was a hard fought campaign, but President Trump persevered despite a blatantly dishonest media campaign against him and multiple attempts on his life.

**For that, he deserves a big thank you.** **[We're putting together a WONDERFUL thank you note for President Trump, and we would love to see your name on it.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aePffv3gBq0L1-Ged6NWyA~~/AARclAA~_L2dK6zqgUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "We’re putting together a WONDERFUL thank you note for President Trump, and we would love to see your name on it.")**

clean_body: We're ALMOST out of spots on our thank you letter Trump! Sign your name now! | | | | Friend, President Trump has fought the good fight. He has walked the path of the righteous. And for that, the American people have elected him to be our 47th President of the United States. It was a hard fought campaign, but President Trump persevered despite a blatantly dishonest media campaign against him and multiple attempts on his life. For that, he deserves a big thank you. ~~ "We’re putting together a WONDERFUL thank you note for President Trump, and we would love to see your name on it." | | | ~~ "Generic Button" | ~~ THOUSANDS of America First patriots have already signed President Trump's thank you card, but space is filling up! ~~ "So if you want your name on this BEAUTIFUL and PATRIOTIC thank you card for our next President, don’t waste anymore time and get your autograph on this lovely card right away " | | | ~~ "Generic Button" Thank you for loving our country, House GOP | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ~ NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (21818). NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. Terms and Conditions ~~. Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f70c102178442edb42bb8586920139d&_e=322NmprzT4MI--jyI82HVOEPkMbSbMXjWBUqkXLxdnkEqZjwuuCnskBmqfaNVa4sdsSWDXpdhLKrZb3u7pNophY9xf7A2CwSXGXhciN0veThLUbyQy5MuzjRcK3aa-pMa1oYnUNkg4sRdUzFr5sJrn0qyURWw5IxHVg8FXcx18WoyUsQ1ppVRQQuVecvi1MwGIrRXg91dx6K9meUkycBXp-k9p4rEbGjcUhU8RBWg0Vi1WS75puy72yXhLg4t5C-Zy6IqiGzWB2nVFEC2sYdMSfzUHkr01ezuN7m24hOoiL77PWDbKmQ9w3nUT24pdCjFCkbWX7vrdCvhft2OI0ILf7gERGGfgnflpkdtzPGnYJycshGVUPpi9zJRlgGHw2PQbtaabxIUhURYipozwvtWZ9kMTiFyTR_Hj2gZtZoPPhNs8RtlU_xJTKF6iCKgk_U) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f70c102178442edb42bb8586920139d&_e=322NmprzT4MI--jyI82HVOEPkMbSbMXjWBUqkXLxdnkEqZjwuuCnskBmqfaNVa4sdsSWDXpdhLKrZb3u7pNophY9xf7A2CwSXGXhciN0veThLUbyQy5MuzjRcK3aa-pMa1oYnUNkg4sRdUzFr5sJrn0qyURWw5IxHVg8FXcx18WoyUsQ1ppVRQQuVecvi1MwGIrRXg91dx6K9meUkycBXp-k9p4rEbGjcUhU8RBWg0Vi1WS75puy72yXhLg4t5C-Zy6IqiGzWB2nVFEC2sYdMSfzUHkr01ezuN7m24hOoiL5oHxGl7r_hBwaXp_2G5OJAShviqjY0KLZWYOzK7QvbL9qWS3BLlPoMBwINF7beebxIHbu8Bx6lwoy3QF5qxci64w1nROEFGiU9oB3p6y6siqvhjt8SReK0ukj2YjaMg5LszrSFCe8_Nb2A_O8MBsx)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f70c102178442edb42bb8586920139d&_e=322NmprzT4MI--jyI82HVOEPkMbSbMXjWBUqkXLxdnkEqZjwuuCnskBmqfaNVa4sdsSWDXpdhLKrZb3u7pNophY9xf7A2CwSXGXhciN0veThLUbyQy5MuzjRcK3aa-pMa1oYnUNkg4sRdUzFr5sJrn0qyURWw5IxHVg8FXcx18WoyUsQ1ppVRQQuVecvi1MwGIrRXg91dx6K9meUkycBXp-k9p4rEbGjcUhU8RBWg0Vi1WS75puy72yXhLg4t5C-Zy6IqiGzWB2nVFEC2sYdMSfzUHkr01ezuN7m24hOoiLtQkHeE6grlOcCDyxjyBokCwUP8d64z73NExFsAIrZTuqWAkbLfvmu9qctSP_8asCNjMjaAxo3GGj40lRoi7IQ_XbnwMJBS1GnVNjXIRGWXGFQHmNqHz0cqpKHHeWtscTSA3yNfr0sxb41m-D-mlPZ)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f70c102178442edb42bb8586920139d&_e=322NmprzT4MI--jyI82HVOEPkMbSbMXjWBUqkXLxdnkEqZjwuuCnskBmqfaNVa4sdsSWDXpdhLKrZb3u7pNophY9xf7A2CwSXGXhciN0veThLUbyQy5MuzjRcK3aa-pMa1oYnUNkg4sRdUzFr5sJrn0qyURWw5IxHVg8FXcx18WoyUsQ1ppVRQQuVecvi1MwGIrRXg91dx6K9meUkycBXp-k9p4rEbGjcUhU8RBWg0Vi1WS75puy72yXhLg4t5C-Zy6IqiGzWB2nVFEC2sYdMSfzUHkr01ezuN7m24hOoiKcQd4aw7YOhttMab9MEbJFhHDEvxGYnbBuflxPUi8syezukCT8sTxLq39E1h7tx3DvXoOvvrheUD6Yt56uAd7EFzL-bzr53JEjN1GLZx4MLu0YcZarwgHH60BUVhJT5yoDQhIeyCqcwVlU2RlhfUtI) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f70c102178442edb42bb8586920139d&_e=322NmprzT4MI--jyI82HVOEPkMbSbMXjWBUqkXLxdnkEqZjwuuCnskBmqfaNVa4sdsSWDXpdhLKrZb3u7pNophY9xf7A2CwSXGXhciN0veThLUbyQy5MuzjRcK3aa-pMa1oYnUNkg4sRdUzFr5sJrn0qyURWw5IxHVg8FXcx18WoyUsQ1ppVRQQuVecvi1MwGIrRXg91dx6K9meUkycBXp-k9p4rEbGjcUhU8RBWg0Vi1WS75puy72yXhLg4t5C-Zy6IqiGzWB2nVFEC2sYdMSfzUHkr01ezuN7m24hOoiKYE3MSLGEaDHZ6vyn72hp30yXPFbqdMf1jMsi7Ph8Md8d7QdZFOnH0BfXpZxjSnrk_oHpoetLq6pe9vBRi_cQGj4gvKo2bbyOqHcqJM_btvgNnzE2FqEvt9XH0Xfm7nPMujj5sAS20eqWWzKbXo71E)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f70c102178442edb42bb8586920139d&_e=322NmprzT4MI--jyI82HVOEPkMbSbMXjWBUqkXLxdnkEqZjwuuCnskBmqfaNVa4sdsSWDXpdhLKrZb3u7pNophY9xf7A2CwSXGXhciN0veThLUbyQy5MuzjRcK3aa-pMa1oYnUNkg4sRdUzFr5sJrn0qyURWw5IxHVg8FXcx18WoyUsQ1ppVRQQuVecvi1MwGIrRXg91dx6K9meUkycBXp-k9p4rEbGjcUhU8RBWg0Vi1WS75puy72yXhLg4t5C-Zy6IqiGzWB2nVFEC2sYdMSfzUHkr01ezuN7m24hOoiLzZ5iYtEMKEaVlig6_Dsjf84ncp1avB528utWYReDHUY2EmL8jtdLmi7V2OtfvIL_96ZFVUxDnZ45HMn8qWekRjU1KAZej0BH2dOG7KdWkbJQLI-80Db17-Wq4rwqkO9Fjj0abuPdLRe_GJexqsLex) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, "" has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching "," we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of "" on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: What If Barry Goldwater Were Running Today?
body:
If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism."

|
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3b47da9b0394da28c2d7235c4726cb6&_e=vmxdNKzrACbCT6gdFQ3HqrLJKYfMhw7veKziYdHM7CRKTjQ3qvzZiiAcj14Mp2Y-pJIKHimq_xt0ekujQNM8bbmxa1Se6ER51sdqn3SGfKHRIjlTJVi4f61No1XY1Yk37b5Fl7l6SHNaUc3kIcPuqi8xi-q6uLmhFWsJU1TuuOj44H7vdj9I39REeXorolyjI7T7eF2QyEekjFrQq-Nm9cl0H6sf7GxEj0fX7lRiSMJU9mfk6aPF-tA-SdNRKgDwjJ2RBnX_Dd-6x4nX0JJ0tul9PX9VrA-R3MwPZLGpLqI%3D)
Friend,

In 1964, Senator Barry Goldwater boldly opposed government overreach, declaring that _“extremism in the defense of liberty is no vice.”_

Today, we face another threat — the rise of woke culture — where free speech is stifled, the government interferes in every aspect of our lives, and identity politics replaces individual merit.

**If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism."**

Senator Goldwater would recognize the "woke" movement as a form of collectivism and groupthink that conflicts with individual liberty. He would argue that true equality means equal opportunity, not equality of outcome, and that the government has no business imposing ideological conformity.

He would oppose mandatory diversity training, DEI, critical race theory, and identity-based quotas — and all illiberal attacks on our nation’s founding principles.

The Goldwater Institute is keeping Barry Goldwater’s legacy alive by fighting to protect the rights of all Americans against the injection of toxic identity politics into everyday life, and we are winning!

[You can help the Goldwater Institute stop the woke narrative that is sweeping the nation by donating today. When you give, your gift will be MATCHED! Click to double your donation >>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3b47da9b0394da28c2d7235c4726cb6&_e=vmxdNKzrACbCT6gdFQ3HqrLJKYfMhw7veKziYdHM7CRKTjQ3qvzZiiAcj14Mp2Y-pJIKHimq_xt0ekujQNM8bbmxa1Se6ER51sdqn3SGfKHRIjlTJVi4f61No1XY1Yk37b5Fl7l6SHNaUc3kIcPuqiai7OJPYpDiQ94F8bmn4CkhqECbaoRDyLTE-rmT4DqmxoiKr47sEfpdE1NmdzmCIYc9YegWb-3Gtp04HN3tVT9YMHwMx2423i2W94X_Y3cwe6cMKrpX4_7zkrxfBKi0eNhxbiGAvCJReYMByZhLzFs%3D)
[Have Your Donation Matched!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3b47da9b0394da28c2d7235c4726cb6&_e=vmxdNKzrACbCT6gdFQ3HqrLJKYfMhw7veKziYdHM7CRKTjQ3qvzZiiAcj14Mp2Y-pJIKHimq_xt0ekujQNM8bbmxa1Se6ER51sdqn3SGfKHRIjlTJVi4f61No1XY1Yk37b5Fl7l6SHNaUc3kIcPuqmPEccXxxGd2Ne5x772wkyLqehQWfLeJZZwD0UUHuzJaMnE5Guim6eS_iPAu0sDgauALktsNqAIz5G_RqcHyqSA1JK25MU6jeTNI3EvATp5QKnpYPNXgsDo8lUCQ0LKIfMJf6JtPrctbPDDgQstYzwA%3D)
The Goldwater Institute has a plan to defeat politically charged Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) policies. To achieve this goal, the Goldwater Institute has partnered with allied organizations to create a set of model policies targeted to state legislatures.

Our five-point program for removing DEI from college campuses includes:
1. Abolishing DEI bureaucracies.
2. Protecting professors and students from mandatory political indoctrination.
3. Ending the use of bias reporting systems that encourage students to spy on their colleagues and report them to university administrators.
4. Passing new state laws with “teeth” that hold college bureaucrats accountable when they don’t protect free speech on campus.
5. Requiring transparency in classroom curriculum and instructor syllabuses.

The war against discriminatory DEI practices will continue until we persuade state legislators to support our cause and implement our five-point policy platform in their states.

**Here’s how you can help defeat DEI:**

[ALL online donations are matched until the end of the year! Can you donate $10, $35, $100, or even $250 today? Click below to rush your support to the Goldwater Institute.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3b47da9b0394da28c2d7235c4726cb6&_e=vmxdNKzrACbCT6gdFQ3HqrLJKYfMhw7veKziYdHM7CRKTjQ3qvzZiiAcj14Mp2Y-pJIKHimq_xt0ekujQNM8bbmxa1Se6ER51sdqn3SGfKHRIjlTJVi4f61No1XY1Yk37b5Fl7l6SHNaUc3kIcPuqirNYZ_82ILMHaUqQnjmQXq0et1hos41gZqz98L986JdFyvBfx9Xkr9bRm-tARvXMVoMvhfCC9kYGzoJ3nASWAMwv5ictapIA-acBFsL7iLHh6YPBZxQir5jyCHNAjIeh17mPjS8GjBsFvNx4ZeELOw%3D) [Donate $10](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3b47da9b0394da28c2d7235c4726cb6&_e=vmxdNKzrACbCT6gdFQ3HqrLJKYfMhw7veKziYdHM7CRKTjQ3qvzZiiAcj14Mp2Y-pJIKHimq_xt0ekujQNM8bbmxa1Se6ER51sdqn3SGfKHRIjlTJVi4f61No1XY1Yk36wbrT4xctqW5Zi_EYVtykcufxSb1zaVtWXSILCV_7S6OJkWFMFk_yeiVSVMeIYmG1R_pY3OyCIuBu-bQJQVQ0hbmZ60UfFPi9_GXwLsl06GFqU4YcgUpxmOeuOvNrybg1u5SN-Kssw1LXXCoyvXJWGgs83cs_e6hqJfk43Q8m5_V-fMiLNvTkGWmjJ3xMxMn)

clean_body: If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism." | | | Friend, In 1964, Senator Barry Goldwater boldly opposed government overreach, declaring that “extremism in the defense of liberty is no vice.” Today, we face another threat — the rise of woke culture — where free speech is stifled, the government interferes in every aspect of our lives, and identity politics replaces individual merit. If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism." Senator Goldwater would recognize the "woke" movement as a form of collectivism and groupthink that conflicts with individual liberty. He would argue that true equality means equal opportunity, not equality of outcome, and that the government has no business imposing ideological conformity. He would oppose mandatory diversity training, DEI, critical race theory, and identity-based quotas — and all illiberal attacks on our nation’s founding principles. The Goldwater Institute is keeping Barry Goldwater’s legacy alive by fighting to protect the rights of all Americans against the injection of toxic identity politics into everyday life, and we are winning! The Goldwater Institute has a plan to defeat politically charged Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) policies. To achieve this goal, the Goldwater Institute has partnered with allied organizations to create a set of model policies targeted to state legislatures. Our five-point program for removing DEI from college campuses includes: 1. Abolishing DEI bureaucracies. 2. Protecting professors and students from mandatory political indoctrination. 3. Ending the use of bias reporting systems that encourage students to spy on their colleagues and report them to university administrators. 4. Passing new state laws with “teeth” that hold college bureaucrats accountable when they don’t protect free speech on campus. 5. Requiring transparency in classroom curriculum and instructor syllabuses. The war against discriminatory DEI practices will continue until we persuade state legislators to support our cause and implement our five-point policy platform in their states. Here’s how you can help defeat DEI: Senator Goldwater wouldn’t just fight back against the woke agenda. He would lead the charge for freedom. And that’s exactly what the Goldwater Institute is doing. We’re standing on the front lines of this cultural battle, promoting the same principles that Barry Goldwater held dear: liberty, free markets, and limited government. Barry Goldwater believed in America — and so do we. You can help us carry the torch of liberty into the next generation. Sincerely, Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec0e8e36855e49449b57713eb815e459&_e=VoHQF56lP35-O6W_XPLC4Kts-K29XjYnKSPE19iX2t8-jOrt1HGBn5fn-wRjsj9SV00Ng_GhC6aazYbbgJMegQZJjp87yBbQ8Qye3PllEw8MMVrKISsrBEKayhmWKOdRkao-oDynbrULOPf5-NxLbiJiYt02RaLmTlvehlN6u0V7QarGdu-ZQZrGy_ZPDWPLGVeyfCs-kDaqs8egm_mLetvXcCAcZSHAlbJkpCNU_cCf22bBOAU6ks_yc4sP3mzwCc7GRjrI4NC4mOMZ4DWJ8xHE9flqOoOyx4x7OKH8T-t4vUUfBL8tW5g05wprisfUoeiH24u_qMsNIl15k1lGe87FSDoGotRjKudq6Cfup7mPJfa1yp1uj12KxF4cEbWCSfL6PcbIffrcHVbdU5G2OGlGQFW5G0opfwfVcZlYvoYq6hqFIfNeeH-7e7toq0zg) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec0e8e36855e49449b57713eb815e459&_e=VoHQF56lP35-O6W_XPLC4Kts-K29XjYnKSPE19iX2t8-jOrt1HGBn5fn-wRjsj9SV00Ng_GhC6aazYbbgJMegQZJjp87yBbQ8Qye3PllEw8MMVrKISsrBEKayhmWKOdRkao-oDynbrULOPf5-NxLbiJiYt02RaLmTlvehlN6u0V7QarGdu-ZQZrGy_ZPDWPLGVeyfCs-kDaqs8egm_mLetvXcCAcZSHAlbJkpCNU_cCf22bBOAU6ks_yc4sP3mzwCc7GRjrI4NC4mOMZ4DWJ8xHE9flqOoOyx4x7OKH8T-s-dwgbPGzb2BZDtcOSugeLAuMQWqwjstCeGP6EhRG4LPdhOIlUS3WSCDuTeBNCVAdnZysiuaB3X5oXv_Af9M7ux8T4n4oCD_p-cg2Ajwe0gH6qMabungsaOOYNm6a3nd9DNE_oFQaZ4xZDJwc2EfW8)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec0e8e36855e49449b57713eb815e459&_e=VoHQF56lP35-O6W_XPLC4Kts-K29XjYnKSPE19iX2t8-jOrt1HGBn5fn-wRjsj9SV00Ng_GhC6aazYbbgJMegQZJjp87yBbQ8Qye3PllEw8MMVrKISsrBEKayhmWKOdRkao-oDynbrULOPf5-NxLbiJiYt02RaLmTlvehlN6u0V7QarGdu-ZQZrGy_ZPDWPLGVeyfCs-kDaqs8egm_mLetvXcCAcZSHAlbJkpCNU_cCf22bBOAU6ks_yc4sP3mzwCc7GRjrI4NC4mOMZ4DWJ8xHE9flqOoOyx4x7OKH8T-vkOEFNPh09_MdSjyBjR8DJsdO9WRPg7Yz6w5K77PJ3PvIKH9lxwfYYdQvhS7XwSGh_1uVDSA2mUYia5C1tILgXnDDxKB5ImdE0LBhqxZk3a6GezdutKiNmvv4xX3QGFphaGcCCDZUcH35QrYvXh66N)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec0e8e36855e49449b57713eb815e459&_e=VoHQF56lP35-O6W_XPLC4Kts-K29XjYnKSPE19iX2t8-jOrt1HGBn5fn-wRjsj9SV00Ng_GhC6aazYbbgJMegQZJjp87yBbQ8Qye3PllEw8MMVrKISsrBEKayhmWKOdRkao-oDynbrULOPf5-NxLbiJiYt02RaLmTlvehlN6u0V7QarGdu-ZQZrGy_ZPDWPLGVeyfCs-kDaqs8egm_mLetvXcCAcZSHAlbJkpCNU_cCf22bBOAU6ks_yc4sP3mzwCc7GRjrI4NC4mOMZ4DWJ8xHE9flqOoOyx4x7OKH8T-u3t6K7kYTarOMnfylGWNKF3JMWBvBHbK3yqD7SHJsdifFXzD9NNy2oQQdLwqM1rbLuVW2wc1baFXIrzca9IOiW5PNNku8HaKmSd0WT-fqyYnl3h20JfvpAN2s_4_s5OZ1ahyQ9tHLqwB9eCFWX9PGY) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec0e8e36855e49449b57713eb815e459&_e=VoHQF56lP35-O6W_XPLC4Kts-K29XjYnKSPE19iX2t8-jOrt1HGBn5fn-wRjsj9SV00Ng_GhC6aazYbbgJMegQZJjp87yBbQ8Qye3PllEw8MMVrKISsrBEKayhmWKOdRkao-oDynbrULOPf5-NxLbiJiYt02RaLmTlvehlN6u0V7QarGdu-ZQZrGy_ZPDWPLGVeyfCs-kDaqs8egm_mLetvXcCAcZSHAlbJkpCNU_cCf22bBOAU6ks_yc4sP3mzwCc7GRjrI4NC4mOMZ4DWJ8xHE9flqOoOyx4x7OKH8T-vVvDI_ZCmNuXLrZk2RITNh4ZWhvihLtkatGbONV0sco0CchM3TpOsgeLs5hxUDB8KZwXkxMp6McMqsF1QF-c9tYx3k8SWcH1F92zPw_7XTCpcdaZSYNFiAkEqUHKDwma_7bgFN7uI8dpCS474zR-2w)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec0e8e36855e49449b57713eb815e459&_e=VoHQF56lP35-O6W_XPLC4Kts-K29XjYnKSPE19iX2t8-jOrt1HGBn5fn-wRjsj9SV00Ng_GhC6aazYbbgJMegQZJjp87yBbQ8Qye3PllEw8MMVrKISsrBEKayhmWKOdRkao-oDynbrULOPf5-NxLbiJiYt02RaLmTlvehlN6u0V7QarGdu-ZQZrGy_ZPDWPLGVeyfCs-kDaqs8egm_mLetvXcCAcZSHAlbJkpCNU_cCf22bBOAU6ks_yc4sP3mzwCc7GRjrI4NC4mOMZ4DWJ8xHE9flqOoOyx4x7OKH8T-vM1wojl9g1F9rU36Wi7iLJRL6Ewiw4YN5bfqQqpqWkISKv3jG_GGMi7wGHM56qPd1PDrq5y4mut0nIAm4iLFLfKpU9D5BdquKNOg8YXz63tyFSH4lL47jad1lnCX9a4A6nwJHKI_UpXDmySOSd00CF) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, "" has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching "," we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of "" on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

## Texas Democrats Stepping Down After Election
Texas Democratic Party chair Gilberto Hinojosa [announced his resignation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAUBOCngY6IA8RAQXEbd7ntlhaGk4CE4wiO8vP2K6ffejTfSPNzWS6xtnq__Y8bBnpf90VJZQSAkH7JsbbPYngOq8weOAawGuAM_nzmJaSoHSijc84uWuukB7v6ZMBmaeXkeA0HBiA9gJZ6OmnnjUJ_1UmveUorMxJzpb2fqCDhO45r--xP7Ke0b7yFQvQYTP9jamZqpoKltnZkTM1l3_COr8HUPCgSilekVJiajXfSeS--nsi47alHqkk8YqePSCXWLjqOersfZd5Dfrxqa3VMlhl522L9bnD685BnUL8BAAD__9nnYtM) Friday after his party suffered “devastating defeats” in the election and amid backlash for blaming immigration and transgender issues for the results. Hinojosa [apologized for his comments](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO4yAUheGnwR0WF7ATCopt3GXbLS0M1_bVgomAiZO3HyXFdNOd6ten8-823xxFOra_LqFtzzXPUkjNAbgwc3AUX7Pugl1EMNChhYsCGMAMQ7dbIaQycJUrauEvQpsxwOKdWoP2zg3QkX3HAIQBUEKNvboaLdGsyqsljH5hWmCglkvfdmz4dHWNr_zA0vucumj31u6VqT9MTkxO53n2_79an8vG5HTPkRr5yuT0Q74yOX0yPGDKvrhWud8dleQOXrDSdlTeijvqhkfAwikl2oprlA-OEf17dMWG-0kxUh0vTIstOYofUPv1oYeV3wEAAP__KXtqKQ) Thursday, complying with demands from [various Democratic groups](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GZD1quz2AA4JLyPbSC0eN3QzWGYxsa9n5-9NscNlmJVWpSvX-fDw-OKZ4PH_zLlP7WvPDoLGgNaB7BI7p9bBdmBYMTncy6YG0vmt3v3fbZAza3pL0KCjOrrq_02jdQgMtXrzt4vQu0xqd1oTU32h01ohbydMSer8oixJiy-XWNmnyxXVNr_wp5ebz3qVpa-2sin4pMyszX9d1u1bmt6nMzKVFn0SZ-ZCrKjOfOcUW_VvWlg-5OCUIsmdfuFXIKwROiSv4fATZD_he_J-IHk4u7QV-41igyM7lb4VW-KhPOYIUKPG5tQqSxLeYD2VmMw4wWocroQOU1YFF6oGHoQeyI6EJhAGXrkzhvGJKsfaDsvjcOabvl-1H7J-T-RcAAP__oTeFOg) in the state. In his resignation statement, Hinojosa said, “ _Voters[sent a clear message](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb8Gb1g8cOwwMHTxlq4dLQyPGAkbC15D8vdVsne_9-jo_NyWm40pHvdvu6OhZ8iLFHLgAFzoxduYXsvQebMKr6FDA5MCuIC-XLrNhElrDKCuSjixOoFCobQjrmtwU5C-i-YNAxAaQAk19uqqB4k6KKdWP7qVDQJ9pFx62pDwaWtIr_zA0ru8d8lsRGdl6ovJmcm5tdaH_BwObPU9YHLGhI5iPpicP3fucc-uWIqOu83GwivhWbnP7eCPTFgqr3gQdwlt4TvWau_I82_hpy306orxZ4spxTpObBD33cb0kaF_6zyM_AsAAP__PWtrOQ) to our party,_” that Democrats need to address issues more important to them, such as the economy, and that it was time for the “next generation” to lead the party forward. Monica Ramirez Alcántara, chairwoman for the Democratic Party for Bexar County, also announced her resignation this week.
## IHOP-Applebee's Twin Restaurant Opening in Texas
There’s a [new restaurant mashup](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kb2O2zAQhJ-G6mhwSYm2ChUBdOrukC6lQJEraRH-QaTO9tsHNpIy5X67OwPM_PqcPw15ituXCTjUx5pmKWTLAbjoZ2fIP-e2ccMiXA8NDnBVAB30XdfsQ-fk1ekb9BaF1FLoVQiF4rYsCFZp19DwEgMQPYASSl_UrW8l9quyanHaLqwV6Kim41J3rPgwZfXP9I3HxabQ-GGvNRemfjA5MTnd7_fLakq1KWQTn68bJqcepGw13JicaE-Zm5w9LoiFH1iqOQ8TK08ZI8WNvz34epj4G2OpSPE92J0KFm4O5DYFihtT01nDHNDRGZgav1KllayplCKT-rUr6TwsMjX-PMvun3-pTbFirEyN08fH-A-akA1tkamxu0oArZjUlhxTY34_N8fg8p28p6KvrBVbMOTfGdT_lvI9yD8BAAD__yONkgA) coming in the form of IHOP-Applebee’s, and its first location will be outside San Antonio. Renderings of the new “twin restaurant” show a shared entrance and kitchen, with the Applebee’s side featuring a large bar with TVs. Other [dual-branded restaurants](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO8yAQBOCnwR0WLA4JBcXfuMvfXmlh2I2RiInwXhy__SnX3DXXjj7NSPNxna4hl7ze_oc7en5RnUDBILWWyk0p5HJMQ5f8rJLTHXp9NlqftDudusVHR2QpJgK6AIE1s41RKZzJWrBq6LJ_l2mtnNZGGdubixsAHZlo5mTjLAaFKXNtPS_I-AoblaM-sfWx3rviF-bHJsw_AaOAcd_3vuHG4bOFleVSt0fmUDIfby5gXHGXP2ATMPJefyeSapO8oGy4sqwk64pd8-mx51LyZs9iULd7yOV7n_885OnhKwAA__8Iw2aj), like Taco Bell-KFC, are trying the concept as restaurant chains struggle to conserve costs across the country. Both IHOP and Applebee’s have experienced [weakening sales](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1qwzAUhZ9G3mT0a-cOGgrF0CFdO5or6SoRKHaQRZy8fXGgY7fzweFw-H7O8xlzycvlG2_k2jOtsxLKcCm5gDliLq_ZdNF5EUF25OSopbQSrO2uTgU92mEETcEnTCmBwlPwKAcDYkzUZXeMSSlASi300OsTGEWQdNA-DsEzIyjmtta-XanRE7dUXuuDah_WW1fctbX7xvQHUxNT077vfcwL-YpL3I4KUxMtTE0L7Vtd33xEXqkQbvSHkRrmwvSEteVQ6Csy_WkAhmTIc3XSmhsbJPfgRx6EAGEDorCmqy7e91xK3oaRGXG5YS7vb-1fWQ-nfgMAAP__vnNqcg) this year.
## List: Where People Move to Texas From
The world is [moving to Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUhJ8Gd7Y4B7BNQXEbutx2S4vfGImYCFCcvP3Ku_W2M6NvRvN1224m5XTc_5tHUP0dy4YU-QgwUrl5k_Jn44NXlnoJQ1CwMAABUohhV2bmDlYXgdno0K2wiMAWAdY5L8XqhqQuGACVAIyyeWKr5BhkZI5ZPztLOA0-9VKnvoce3qbF_CmvUCdXHkNWe-_PRtg_gpqgPs9zMu9U2uUS1Lk4kwlqb3I2jaC-2ghqAIKargT1hTzaGEsN6X6MttRj_E1fWh_PUvs-VOWfZ8o5tXkhnN4fJuWfAf3PR14KvwMAAP__Yc5ipQ)! Nearly 900,000 people relocated to the Lone Star State in 2023, with 272,000 coming from a different country, according to the U.S. Census Bureau. 5.5 million non-citizens now call Texas home, up from 4.4 million in 2013 and making up 17.9% of the state’s population. Texas’ foreign-born population growth mirrors that of the U.S., with foreign-born residents making up 14.3% of the national population compared to 13.1% a decade ago. Over 600,000 people moved to Texas from a different state—100,000 from California. You can see more about [who’s relocating to Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUhJ8Gd7Y4B7BNQXEbutx2S4vfGImYCFCcvP3Ku_W2M6NvRvN1224m5XTc_5tHUP0dy4YU-QgwUrl5k_Jn44NXlnoJQ1CwMAABUohhV2bmDlYXgdno0K2wiMAWAdY5L8XqhqQuGACVAIyyeWKr5BhkZI5ZPztLOA0-9VKnvoce3qbF_CmvUCdXHkNWe-_PRtg_gpqgPs9zMu9U2uUS1Lk4kwlqb3I2jaC-2ghqAIKargT1hTzaGEsN6X6MttRj_E1fWh_PUvs-VOWfZ8o5tXkhnN4fJuWfAf3PR14KvwMAAP__Yc5ipQ) here.

At AmeriPAC, we want to personally restore our country for freedom-loving patriots like you. Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. body:

# Saturday, November 9, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1989, East German officials [opened the Berlin Wall](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuszAQAOCnsbegu7ODw-Ah0v-zpWulLuiCz8GNiSMwqXj7qt37Ap_0vV-GC6ecHrc3nsXXWAYCsgfEA3RD4JT3wergowiJ0eLRGcQjAZ705MfT2IGEo2Mh10UaY2jbaLEzFKwLV538j4YIHaIhODVsyEaAaA0zMI_KgoRUy9J8lvSok8S8l5cszVhmnf1U63NV5qyoV9TvZatbcxVFfTLn_67e2w--K9NH4botosy_deJFgl58eH6lnNPaOmXhNnPKv2T9q_jy9B0AAP__eXRSqA), allowing travel from East to West Berlin. The following day, celebrating Germans began to tear the wall down. Election Day continues to dominate headlines in today’s edition of _The Flyover_ , with President-elect Trump boosting investor confidence, the GOP inching closer to a House majority, and San Francisco electing a new mayor. Get all the details below! |
