## DOJ Reveals Trump Assassination Plot
The Justice Department [unsealed an indictment](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OwyAQBOCnsTtHCyxgFxTXpMu1V1obWJKN8I9sLlHe_uT0V44-aTSan8t4ISky375p4lDzMmrQ2CnVwTAmkvIesU0hM2s2LQfljVJWg-rbe_AD2KgZAa1HSORdGhxk5_0QbQbXSjjalIJBKaOhP5HRmAEyGiIgig0CJ6nLdnosMtc75_Jenryd4jK1JdxrXffGfDX63OgzrTO_9oOOsFWJhRt9lo3mLl-le_zuVSJ3iVfa6sRz7T7Wm5hzj-STswMoAttTchkVWYfXdG23kNaXlCK78w3CbSIpnwX1v0eeQf8FAAD__3IFYRw) on Friday, revealing an alleged Iranian plot to assassinate President-elect Trump during his campaign this fall. U.S. authorities believe [Iranian Farhad Shakeri](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zz1vwyAQxvFPA1usuwMHPDB08ZauHa0zLwktDpGN4uTbV-7e7ZEe6Sf9vy7ThXPJ9-snL9G1VCcC0ifEEwxT4Fzek5bBpRgpKhkdGoXYE6CVNzeEYBCs6cEoffaJ-zTblLTuz2FQdpbZHRoiDIiKwHasSCeApBUzMHuhIYbc6tp913xvt5jKuz7j2vm6yOJurT02oT4EjYLGfd-7efbHJ2i8x30TNPLasi_xmP5F9oXWrMtPlasLjz2XkrezERquC-fyp7b_Kp-OfgMAAP__GGlTPQ) was involved in a murder-for-hire plot, allegedly telling FBI agents that an official in Iran’s Revolutionary Guard in September tasked him with an official plan to surveil and kill Trump. Shakeri [was also linked](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd1gw4IQUFK9xl9duaU1gbBNhsIDYyt-vNtp263t1dHS-7tMdQwxp-Y8b2TbnCQRoLiUXt8ljiO9Jd97ORECqIyuvSsoBhDTdagFm89DeDGhoUMNF00VejdLOPKQZNHbB_tCkFDcpFQjTowI9CzFrhSgQHdOCfGi59M8cUltpju98UOld3rpo19b2ytQ_BiOD8TzP_vmqLTjql3wwGPOODMa9MBh_B-5px9I2So1jSvmVHFW-vYqnwtdQiGPyvFDERp67FctCleOCIdXGQ1kcx1qpfW7tzF2xfj9DjKFerkyLZcMQP3btr1qHhe8AAAD__3zlbxs) to Carlisle Rivera of Brooklyn and Jonathon Loadholt of Staten Island in a conspiracy to murder a U.S. citizen of Iranian origin in New York. Rivera and Loadholt were arrested and made their initial appearance in court. According to U.S. officials, Shakeri has not been arrested and is believed to be in Iran.
## Market Rallies Behind Trump
U.S. stocks maintained [their post-election rally](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFygzAQRL9GdDB3J4JwoSKNOqdNyVzgsBULiUGyGf4-Q1Kn2mZ35837vA5X9sHH2wcvYsucBgJqa8QaLsPEPhxDW012FiHRlVg0GvGNAPvqbieaTK-JDCETgUHQowCjmL6btekqb883RLggaoK-YU3tDDC3mhmYR9WCTL6krflOPpa7zOFIL9maMS1VsPdS1qz0uyKnyO373jwzlzTxcRYUuVzSdihyS4py5ipbTpHD7CPHURS5E0CRQ1TkoP-bjI9cf0ku9S7yqMv2XNZ691GRMx1qoh4BjCJXbXZadx-Cz51RLdwW9uEXrfyn6mXpJwAA___2Imfi) on Friday, achieving record highs with the Dow and S&P 500 posting their best weekly performance of the year. The Dow rose 259.65 points, or 0.59%, while the S&P gained 0.38% to close at 5,995.54, [briefly trading above 6,000](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQxvGnMRvo7mxCGDx08ZauHdFhn4MbE0fgBuXtq3Tv_Em_T_-vy3ThlNP9-smr2BrLRECmRWxhnAKn_JpME2wUIdGNWBw0Yk-A52axMscehUzf8zxG70eYZ41-gNOJjaBpkn1riDAiaoJzx5pMBIhGMwOzVwYkpFq27ruke10k5ld5ytb5sjbZLrU-dqU_FDlF7jiOzt9n_x4VuTetyCEqcjAocnst_tauvN2ktrUEfrU5PaX9eQSusndLXXOz2fA4Us5pPw3KwHXllP_e6n_1T0u_AQAA__9cRlsj); the Nasdaq jumped 0.09%, setting an intraday record high. Experts attribute the recent rally to President-elect Trump's victory, with expectations that a Republican-controlled government will favor deregulation, mergers and acquisitions, and tax cuts. Trump’s reelection also boosted Elon Musk, with Tesla’s [stock rising nearly 26%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1vtDAQhH-N3fm0_uAFChdvQ3dpU6I9s5w3ZzCCzUWXXx-RPuXMSPNIz_t1vCIXXu9vuFCUuY4OXDDWGujHCbm8xqCnOBM58pqibb21jQPb6Ryh7W9pxin5FBqaAiRCoKYhQPC3rtUczzdrobfWO-gu6F2YAebgEQExqQA0sdT98lF5lUxzedUn7ZdUF11iFtkO5f8rNyg3SKbMpZybcsNWC6fXWVPKay31fobQd9D7YISOguaQmh5mwf1BYhJuLFj4G4XramT_XDblBr3HafviUvj416oA9wX5l6HlLx_P6H4CAAD__1HUY58) since Election Day, pushing the company’s market cap over $1 trillion.
## List: America's Most Obscure Museums
A list of America’s [most obscure museums](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQBp_GdEbrtQlQuLiGLtdeiTawwJ4MjmwTLm9_Svq__j6NRvPnPt5Jghzrb9rZlyWOCOi0MRr6cSYJ79FVs1-YkW3F3rTWmAbBdNXm2-4xP3rTY4OTQdMA9La_IYFt0C0tVOI_NGOgN8YidDVZdAvA4iwREE3KAc9SYqr_RjnKxkt4xxeneop7FfxWyjMr-0vhoHC4rqsO8cX87xlikmP9vBQOK4XA6R0kF4VDe8POKRziI09nYk07J5lIl411LomOlXPR-5n53LOW4zucmark5-clIUi-tcrBupOEr0f5qcvL4_8AAAD__0L1Zaw) features a quirky and eccentric mix from espionage-themed exhibits to houses of ill-repute and roadside spots celebrating the food that made this country great. Washington D.C.'s [International Spy Museum](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71ugzAUQOGnsbeg--OEMHjowpauHdEFrsGViRE4Qbx91e59gHOk7-vRPSSm-Jw-ZVFfQu4IyF0QL9B0o8R0ds6OPqiSslWPNSNeCfBuZ18D1dpzM7Bc2TE6qhvSW-iBb_0woI3-94YIDSIT3CthcgEgOBYBkcE40DGWvFXfOT7LrCGd-a1bNeTFJj-Xsu6GPwy1htrjOKp9PZfXrq-lyttkqLWbH9cjphT3W20cTIvE9FeX_zRvTz8BAAD__37qS2E) houses the world's largest collection of spy artifacts, including gadgets, weapons, cameras, and vehicles, along with iconic cars used in the James Bond films. [The Oasis Bordello Museum](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FyhCAQxvGngU5nWTjRgiKN3aVN6ewJnJtBuRHOjG-fMX3633zf_L_u05048fb8pDW4GvOEgKZRqoFh8sTpnIz0LoaAQcvglNVK3RBULxdnITwIfaQ490NnwXRgscNe2Vtneo-S3bWmFAxKaYS-JY0mAkSjiYBoFgaC55r39jvzVpcQ05mPsLdzXmVyS62vIvSHwFHgeHDhuuW9LuxpyZcRONJc-eB6ChwzFS7NI-8-pJSb9V3C-yJyd_71wylx6aww8FyJ099F_S_5cPgbAAD__9-bWR8) in Idaho, one of two brothels on the list, preserved its silver mining-era history right up until the last madame, Madame Ginger, and her workers fled in 1988 before an FBI raid. Sites dedicated to Spam, mustard, and potatoes make the list, but the best food-related stop is the [Waffle House Museum](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQxvGnsbcgn8-AGTx0YUvXjugCd8GViSMwQXn7iu7ZvuHTT_r_XIcrxRQf929aOBTJgzXWXQAuphsmiuk9OD0FYbaMmgO0CFBbA17PocPR-7bxDlvBjtvO39A5FmCpbzU2OoZTAzAdAFrjK0LrxBhxSGSIRuUMT7HktfrN8VFmlvTOL16rMS86hbmU56bwS9le2f44juogkcRz3jc-P8r2y77xfg69hul5xJTi1rTKmftCMf1D5VPYK9i_AAAA___myk81) in Georgia. On the site of the first-ever Waffle House, which opened in 1955, it explains why the chain is considered a southern staple.

clean_body: The Justice Department on Friday, revealing an alleged Iranian plot to assassinate President-elect Trump during his campaign this fall. | | | | | | Saturday, November 9, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1989, East German officials , allowing travel from East to West Berlin. The following day, celebrating Germans began to tear the wall down. Election Day continues to dominate headlines in today’s edition of The Flyover , with President-elect Trump boosting investor confidence, the GOP inching closer to a House majority, and San Francisco electing a new mayor. Get all the details below! Stay Cozy, Stay Salty: Warm Up Your Winter with today's sponsor, | DOJ Reveals Trump Assassination Plot The Justice Department on Friday, revealing an alleged Iranian plot to assassinate President-elect Trump during his campaign this fall. U.S. authorities believe was involved in a murder-for-hire plot, allegedly telling FBI agents that an official in Iran’s Revolutionary Guard in September tasked him with an official plan to surveil and kill Trump. Shakeri to Carlisle Rivera of Brooklyn and Jonathon Loadholt of Staten Island in a conspiracy to murder a U.S. citizen of Iranian origin in New York. Rivera and Loadholt were arrested and made their initial appearance in court. According to U.S. officials, Shakeri has not been arrested and is believed to be in Iran. Market Rallies Behind Trump U.S. stocks maintained on Friday, achieving record highs with the Dow and S&P 500 posting their best weekly performance of the year. The Dow rose 259.65 points, or 0.59%, while the S&P gained 0.38% to close at 5,995.54, ; the Nasdaq jumped 0.09%, setting an intraday record high. Experts attribute the recent rally to President-elect Trump's victory, with expectations that a Republican-controlled government will favor deregulation, mergers and acquisitions, and tax cuts. Trump’s reelection also boosted Elon Musk, with Tesla’s since Election Day, pushing the company’s market cap over $1 trillion. List: America's Most Obscure Museums A list of America’s features a quirky and eccentric mix from espionage-themed exhibits to houses of ill-repute and roadside spots celebrating the food that made this country great. Washington D.C.'s houses the world's largest collection of spy artifacts, including gadgets, weapons, cameras, and vehicles, along with iconic cars used in the James Bond films. in Idaho, one of two brothels on the list, preserved its silver mining-era history right up until the last madame, Madame Ginger, and her workers fled in 1988 before an FBI raid. Sites dedicated to Spam, mustard, and potatoes make the list, but the best food-related stop is the in Georgia. On the site of the first-ever Waffle House, which opened in 1955, it explains why the chain is considered a southern staple. () ➤The White House reiterated on Thursday that President Biden has no plans to pardon or commute a potential prison sentence for his son, Hunter Biden, who is guilty of several felony charges. () ➤ A federal judge ruled against a Biden administration program that permitted unauthorized immigrants married to U.S. citizens to obtain legal status, determining it violated immigration law. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Can I send you my new book?
body:
And for many Americans, it’s a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives—for the better.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41254c6b15e34f6ab3c53ae626d32522&_e=GJoYda5dkIjbZPfY-Bd_OUe96ljY5sLPM_nLGtKroWde7nMRvBC9lhILfQX0eypgpziz7To3TCClJ0sf75VB5fkL6yend4NGwnp04IRPxvv0amoj3G5VNINWcaj7ynBsx00fhZl9E2GKIR_nYlVCTErIzaJGin8l_yi3o45mg7LcwWDFYE9XpU9ASuiRFZkN_LVTcTsBB8nrkBK_Wb6Cx3cG50IciDeAysdr57r9layglCWWSDi1_BFBHIMEgP_dvs9kG_UB1R3-9hBr86K_iHmuPWLYaDCZ678nWpUfMTstzDAWFbkIzzuItqR2rU0K)
---
Friend, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41254c6b15e34f6ab3c53ae626d32522&_e=GJoYda5dkIjbZPfY-Bd_OUe96ljY5sLPM_nLGtKroWde7nMRvBC9lhILfQX0eypgpziz7To3TCClJ0sf75VB5fkL6yend4NGwnp04IRPxvv0amoj3G5VNINWcaj7ynBsx00fhZl9E2GKIR_nYlVCTMQi231y3Pe-iXGvPVHTggXK1eK-jOIqmJtvovvl060i9ghZnBYyQDRfRDGDU0xKzoKFyl2NbLw29AROG-itOvO7vOJT9Kd28_crkFCQBMyorsgio_jYA486iaP3tLnq2rD8CdWJdqSvHO6Ugx2yH0URuoEdUZ_aQ-UNGORdA24U)_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41254c6b15e34f6ab3c53ae626d32522&_e=GJoYda5dkIjbZPfY-Bd_OUe96ljY5sLPM_nLGtKroWde7nMRvBC9lhILfQX0eypgpziz7To3TCClJ0sf75VB5fkL6yend4NGwnp04IRPxvv0amoj3G5VNINWcaj7ynBsx00fhZl9E2GKIR_nYlVCTAMlCayfbG8YVNII89SNfNfLlyYiuirBUOc5MG6d-uhJmdQY1C1_EQFXR6YKubqq9H1JnhyrwSxHLXC6SOO978LR-ld42td1hSrnd4MoVLB8NM6JB3zSVfKkUNS6MKdluQu6sg2Ec8bIz0I6Fk6LYdI05dZVyS5b7KLeamN7g6ZQ)
---
Friend, I'm proud to say that _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before:
* It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right.

* It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

* It's NOT a call for __ our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on __ how _all Americans_ can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving _ourselves_.

**I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.** _**[All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41254c6b15e34f6ab3c53ae626d32522&_e=GJoYda5dkIjbZPfY-Bd_OUe96ljY5sLPM_nLGtKroWde7nMRvBC9lhILfQX0eypgpziz7To3TCClJ0sf75VB5fkL6yend4NGwnp04IRPxvv0amoj3G5VNINWcaj7ynBsx00fhZl9E2GKIR_nYlVCTOjPNT0Bfco_T09tl46C_0BveIR64NiX4qogtX6dvXv5IFm6u1WBPdSgZWRw9oO0aIPO__XMFWWtzKuxMIODbJH2O8OUa5j_ZMnK8K-rCpTZL8AxcE0TD2mnPKrlXNViEpxpD4jBxRQW4rJLYHpzdk-oPrSQnT7lIp0wqtqwXaJ8)**_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41254c6b15e34f6ab3c53ae626d32522&_e=GJoYda5dkIjbZPfY-Bd_OUe96ljY5sLPM_nLGtKroWde7nMRvBC9lhILfQX0eypgpziz7To3TCClJ0sf75VB5fkL6yend4NGwnp04IRPxvv0amoj3G5VNINWcaj7ynBsx00fhZl9E2GKIR_nYlVCTODm7PNq7UjyMD7u2KykfDCCzQ2swm43T2ctS6r0V3yYKQccKx32Fb3_066PsQyx-iQSG1UhtzQ1vm09MCld0xXopY24WISk9Y_skeQiND_PnquSQQqR-34ZF_dQ6DKOAYuyziIAFwxPaa1HnSkrq2Qfz-UifFr-OClaGUEVM_rb)

In this defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

Friend, over the past year, I wrote my new book,Right Wing Revolution,as a guide for a return to an America where ... We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness. We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution. We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal. We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night. We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans. Friend, I'm proud to say that Right Wing Revolution is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before: It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right. It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American. It's NOT a call for our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on how all Americans can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving ourselves. I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE. In this defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: History Facts
subject: The accidental discovery of the Big Bang
body:
On May 20, 1964, astronomers Arno Penzias and Robert Wilson were conducting experiments at Bell Labs in New Jersey when they found something odd. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68bew428vb3ryj2w6s1x5zndfe9jnig9leu4ivowa4v8bxh7wuzsgz03gud8tqzl5ucdtofxdsktchjupf4dgb36v57oow1q1g8sag3fpvw20m142qaqdtai6mb3vxfaa3lxvfm897ly23opf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smon34&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Evidence of the Big Bang was discovered by accident.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smon34&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smon34&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smon34&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| O n May 20, 1964, astronomers Arno Penzias and Robert Wilson were conducting experiments at Bell Labs in New Jersey when they found something odd. While using the Holmdel Horn Antenna to study radio signals emitted by objects in deep space, they noticed that the antenna was picking up an unusual, persistent buzzing noise. At first, they thought the noise was caused by some sort of interference or equipment failure, so they methodically investigated every possible explanation, including the idea that pigeons were roosting in the antenna. Eventually, the astronomers realized the noise was not an equipment error, but an electromagnetic signal dating back billions of years, called [cosmic microwave background](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smon34&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) radiation. Also referred to as CMB, it is the oldest known light in the universe, and one of the strongest pieces of evidence for the Big Bang theory.
---
The Big Bang theory posits that the universe began as an infinitely hot, infinitely dense singular point in space, which then began to inflate and expand at an incredibly fast rate. Before this expansion, the cosmos would have been too hot and dense for light to travel through, but when the universe was about 380,000 years old, it finally cooled enough for the subatomic particles to bind together into stable atoms (a process known as “recombination”), allowing light to travel through space for the first time. The cosmic microwave background that Penzias and Wilson stumbled on is a remnant of that first light, and its discovery is strong evidence that the recombination event predicted by the Big Bang theory actually occurred. What’s more, the CMB’s temperature is uniform throughout the cosmos, supporting the theory that the universe originated at a single, super-dense point in space which then inflated rapidly in all directions. For their serendipitous discovery of the CMB, Penzias and Wilson received the [1978 Nobel Prize in physics](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smon34&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smon34&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smon34&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## More than 80% of all matter in the universe may be invisible.
When scientists examine the large-scale structure of the universe, they encounter a curious phenomenon: According to our current understanding of the laws of gravity, there isn’t enough matter in the universe to prevent galaxies from flying apart. One explanation for this curious observation is that there is a [form of matter](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smon34&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in the universe scientists are unable to see through telescopes. Scientists call this mysterious substance “dark matter,” since it does not appear to interact with the electromagnetic field the way that normal matter does. This means dark matter does not emit, reflect, or refract light — it’s completely invisible and can only be observed indirectly through its gravitational effects. Currently, scientists don’t know exactly what this mysterious dark matter is, just that there must be a lot of it. By some estimates, [85%](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smon34&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of all matter in the known universe is dark matter — a reminder of just how many mysteries remain undiscovered in the cosmos.

name: Victor Riches
subject: What If Barry Goldwater Were Running Today?
body:
If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism."

|
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e2eefa0262d4cd88ae192c23c22f092&_e=ZumASKOm_pB2zbVbsHGTJhq47SNwYgm_JVQQ5dDLIIDxJcYIQxk0zq8StHh1f0WCLcSIRhiSkVOS_F2pX-AS0MhkIqGgpekDa8s-LHbYf91WowCPkRsD35WUbk62JuPsXq1fUtN-E_1nmnufyqpTZ4oAEw1ZgwyVRv7CzTVkkLvsRFvdPMDZhxzppi1RdoRFmJrcJDXDGeSBc2g8qtZds2A0Aqw3rU_zpc9QhMAvVernbNlqMQoLRXzNzV2lhmj5r-nx4Lh5Ma4FPyppWwOSY_WsSGlvInqKVxDkTf69wX0%3D)
Friend,

In 1964, Senator Barry Goldwater boldly opposed government overreach, declaring that _“extremism in the defense of liberty is no vice.”_

Today, we face another threat — the rise of woke culture — where free speech is stifled, the government interferes in every aspect of our lives, and identity politics replaces individual merit.

**If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism."**

Senator Goldwater would recognize the "woke" movement as a form of collectivism and groupthink that conflicts with individual liberty. He would argue that true equality means equal opportunity, not equality of outcome, and that the government has no business imposing ideological conformity.

He would oppose mandatory diversity training, DEI, critical race theory, and identity-based quotas — and all illiberal attacks on our nation’s founding principles.

The Goldwater Institute is keeping Barry Goldwater’s legacy alive by fighting to protect the rights of all Americans against the injection of toxic identity politics into everyday life, and we are winning!

clean_body: If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism." | | | Friend, In 1964, Senator Barry Goldwater boldly opposed government overreach, declaring that “extremism in the defense of liberty is no vice.” Today, we face another threat — the rise of woke culture — where free speech is stifled, the government interferes in every aspect of our lives, and identity politics replaces individual merit. If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism." Senator Goldwater would recognize the "woke" movement as a form of collectivism and groupthink that conflicts with individual liberty. He would argue that true equality means equal opportunity, not equality of outcome, and that the government has no business imposing ideological conformity. He would oppose mandatory diversity training, DEI, critical race theory, and identity-based quotas — and all illiberal attacks on our nation’s founding principles. The Goldwater Institute is keeping Barry Goldwater’s legacy alive by fighting to protect the rights of all Americans against the injection of toxic identity politics into everyday life, and we are winning! The Goldwater Institute has a plan to defeat politically charged Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) policies. To achieve this goal, the Goldwater Institute has partnered with allied organizations to create a set of model policies targeted to state legislatures. Our five-point program for removing DEI from college campuses includes: 1. Abolishing DEI bureaucracies. 2. Protecting professors and students from mandatory political indoctrination. 3. Ending the use of bias reporting systems that encourage students to spy on their colleagues and report them to university administrators. 4. Passing new state laws with “teeth” that hold college bureaucrats accountable when they don’t protect free speech on campus. 5. Requiring transparency in classroom curriculum and instructor syllabuses. The war against discriminatory DEI practices will continue until we persuade state legislators to support our cause and implement our five-point policy platform in their states. Here’s how you can help defeat DEI: Senator Goldwater wouldn’t just fight back against the woke agenda. He would lead the charge for freedom. And that’s exactly what the Goldwater Institute is doing. We’re standing on the front lines of this cultural battle, promoting the same principles that Barry Goldwater held dear: liberty, free markets, and limited government. Barry Goldwater believed in America — and so do we. You can help us carry the torch of liberty into the next generation. Sincerely, Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: John Fetterman
subject: Bob Casey needs our help right now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, I’m going to be real with you: Bob Casey needs our help right now.
His race with Connecticut Dave is still too close to call 😬 and we need your help to make sure every ballot is counted.
Bob’s team is working hard to make all Pennsylvanians have their voice heard, but they need the resources to make that happen.
Pennsylvania is now the frontline for standing up to Senate Republicans 🛑 and I need Bob in the Senate with me to keep up the fight. 💪

name: Victor Riches
subject: What If Barry Goldwater Were Running Today?
body:
If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism."

|
---
| | [](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyU0L9q9DAQBPCnkTsbaeW_hYoPDnf3tSnFWl77FmTZyOsceftwByF16hmGH_Nx93fkyGn9jxs5yeLz6fdD_LrH-YlCuZww56-SFw8a6tKUevC2mF3dwWzbgpzprDHN0A66eDiz2KkPy9Ca3tiACwzNNAXS0KOhgF3B7jVjjB4M1F3TV3ZpjG6otZoWnJpa1RojZTkreVCm45oiB0xCuFVh34roHiLHqew_BaOC8aRwZaow0bzLq6Fg_MVzOoXlElIwHlhiEN6TsuMlmw-4HchrUvb2Y1LQvpM9CSVR9iZZiuzm48kx8tl2qtbrhhzfFPnDYZ8OvgMAAP__UaB23Q)
Friend,

In 1964, Senator Barry Goldwater boldly opposed government overreach, declaring that _“extremism in the defense of liberty is no vice.”_

Today, we face another threat — the rise of woke culture — where free speech is stifled, the government interferes in every aspect of our lives, and identity politics replaces individual merit.

**If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism."**

Senator Goldwater would recognize the "woke" movement as a form of collectivism and groupthink that conflicts with individual liberty. He would argue that true equality means equal opportunity, not equality of outcome, and that the government has no business imposing ideological conformity.

He would oppose mandatory diversity training, DEI, critical race theory, and identity-based quotas — and all illiberal attacks on our nation’s founding principles.

The Goldwater Institute is keeping Barry Goldwater’s legacy alive by fighting to protect the rights of all Americans against the injection of toxic identity politics into everyday life, and we are winning!

[You can help the Goldwater Institute stop the woke narrative that is sweeping the nation by donating today. When you give, your gift will be MATCHED! Click to double your donation >>](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyU0L9q9DAQBPCnkTsbaeW_hYoPDnf3tSnFWl77FmTZyOsceftwByF16hmGH_Nx93fkyGn9jxs5yeLz6fdD_LrH-YlCuZww56-SFw8a6tKUevC2mF3dwWzbgpzprDHN0A66eDiz2KkPy9Ca3tiACwzNNAXS0KOhgF3B7jVjjB4M1F3TV3ZpjG6otZoWnJpa1RojZTkreVCm45oiB0xCuFVh34roHiLHqew_BaOC8aRwZaow0bzLq6Fg_MVzOoXlElIwHlhiEN6TsuMlmw-4HchrUvb2Y1LQvpM9CSVR9iZZiuzm48kx8tl2qtbrhhzfFPnDYZ8OvgMAAP__UaB23Q)
[Have Your Donation Matched!](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyU0L9q9DAQBPCnkTsbaeW_hYoPDnf3tSnFWl77FmTZyOsceftwByF16hmGH_Nx93fkyGn9jxs5yeLz6fdD_LrH-YlCuZww56-SFw8a6tKUevC2mF3dwWzbgpzprDHN0A66eDiz2KkPy9Ca3tiACwzNNAXS0KOhgF3B7jVjjB4M1F3TV3ZpjG6otZoWnJpa1RojZTkreVCm45oiB0xCuFVh34roHiLHqew_BaOC8aRwZaow0bzLq6Fg_MVzOoXlElIwHlhiEN6TsuMlmw-4HchrUvb2Y1LQvpM9CSVR9iZZiuzm48kx8tl2qtbrhhzfFPnDYZ8OvgMAAP__UaB23Q)
The Goldwater Institute has a plan to defeat politically charged Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) policies. To achieve this goal, the Goldwater Institute has partnered with allied organizations to create a set of model policies targeted to state legislatures.

Our five-point program for removing DEI from college campuses includes:
1. Abolishing DEI bureaucracies.
2. Protecting professors and students from mandatory political indoctrination.
3. Ending the use of bias reporting systems that encourage students to spy on their colleagues and report them to university administrators.
4. Passing new state laws with “teeth” that hold college bureaucrats accountable when they don’t protect free speech on campus.
5. Requiring transparency in classroom curriculum and instructor syllabuses.

The war against discriminatory DEI practices will continue until we persuade state legislators to support our cause and implement our five-point policy platform in their states.

**Here’s how you can help defeat DEI:**

[ALL online donations are matched until the end of the year! Can you donate $10, $35, $100, or even $250 today? Click below to rush your support to the Goldwater Institute.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyU0L9q9DAQBPCnkTsbaeW_hYoPDnf3tSnFWl77FmTZyOsceftwByF16hmGH_Nx93fkyGn9jxs5yeLz6fdD_LrH-YlCuZww56-SFw8a6tKUevC2mF3dwWzbgpzprDHN0A66eDiz2KkPy9Ca3tiACwzNNAXS0KOhgF3B7jVjjB4M1F3TV3ZpjG6otZoWnJpa1RojZTkreVCm45oiB0xCuFVh34roHiLHqew_BaOC8aRwZaow0bzLq6Fg_MVzOoXlElIwHlhiEN6TsuMlmw-4HchrUvb2Y1LQvpM9CSVR9iZZiuzm48kx8tl2qtbrhhzfFPnDYZ8OvgMAAP__UaB23Q) [Donate $10](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyU0EGLpDAQBeBfE29KUomxc8hhofHWe92jlLG0AzGRWG6z_37phmHOcyzq8fh4fx7TA2OKefuNO3muPNVzKgdPW0nLC5lqO2Ot_9q4TiDBtKqVbtLN4s0Ai7YNeTVopXpnnWye3tgAQRrXW9Kut4uDWSp7Ax20cze9NtG_a5SSToEZ-lun117JnqyWtOLcG2EkJqp8dvykSsc1pxgwM-HehbI3yT-Zj1PoXwJGAeNJ4arUYaal8DshYPzGx3xy5ItJwHhgi4FjyUKPF-9TwP3AuGWh718mAfbzKZkps9B3rizA4l6uz6lkU_1yvGJK8bSDMHLbMaYPjH8w318P_wMAAP__N8l5lA)

clean_body: If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism." | | | Friend, In 1964, Senator Barry Goldwater boldly opposed government overreach, declaring that “extremism in the defense of liberty is no vice.” Today, we face another threat — the rise of woke culture — where free speech is stifled, the government interferes in every aspect of our lives, and identity politics replaces individual merit. If Barry Goldwater were to run today, he would stand firmly against the forces of "wokeism." Senator Goldwater would recognize the "woke" movement as a form of collectivism and groupthink that conflicts with individual liberty. He would argue that true equality means equal opportunity, not equality of outcome, and that the government has no business imposing ideological conformity. He would oppose mandatory diversity training, DEI, critical race theory, and identity-based quotas — and all illiberal attacks on our nation’s founding principles. The Goldwater Institute is keeping Barry Goldwater’s legacy alive by fighting to protect the rights of all Americans against the injection of toxic identity politics into everyday life, and we are winning! The Goldwater Institute has a plan to defeat politically charged Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) policies. To achieve this goal, the Goldwater Institute has partnered with allied organizations to create a set of model policies targeted to state legislatures. Our five-point program for removing DEI from college campuses includes: 1. Abolishing DEI bureaucracies. 2. Protecting professors and students from mandatory political indoctrination. 3. Ending the use of bias reporting systems that encourage students to spy on their colleagues and report them to university administrators. 4. Passing new state laws with “teeth” that hold college bureaucrats accountable when they don’t protect free speech on campus. 5. Requiring transparency in classroom curriculum and instructor syllabuses. The war against discriminatory DEI practices will continue until we persuade state legislators to support our cause and implement our five-point policy platform in their states. Here’s how you can help defeat DEI: Senator Goldwater wouldn’t just fight back against the woke agenda. He would lead the charge for freedom. And that’s exactly what the Goldwater Institute is doing. We’re standing on the front lines of this cultural battle, promoting the same principles that Barry Goldwater held dear: liberty, free markets, and limited government. Barry Goldwater believed in America — and so do we. You can help us carry the torch of liberty into the next generation. Sincerely, Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. The Republican Team PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Bernie is right.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, there are
countless takeaways from the 2024 election, and one of the most important
was expressed by progressive Senator Bernie Sanders:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241109?refcode=em20241109-36137&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36137_1203867_AVyiOg&akid=36137%2E1203867%2EAVyiOg ]Tweet from Bernie Sanders: It should come as no great surprise that a
Democratic Party which has abandoned working class people would find the
working class has abandoned them. While the Democratic leadership defends
the status quo, the American people are angry and want change. And they’re
right.

By embracing billionaires, corporations, and Super PACs, the Democratic
Party abandoned its base and the working people it was elected to serve.

Instead of listening to the majority of voters and fighting for the bold
change we deserve — like an end to Israel’s genocide in Gaza or guaranteed
healthcare for everyone through Medicare for All — the Harris campaign and
Democratic leadership ran to the right, embracing war criminals like Dick
Cheney while raking in millions of dollars in dark money.

Instead of fiercely fighting back against the corporate greed that’s
driving up the price of living for working families, the Democratic Party
has cozied up to the wealthiest few and industry lobby groups who want
them to maintain the status quo at the expense of the rest of us. The
American people have clearly had enough, and as Bernie said, they’re
right: we deserve better from our leaders and our Party.

Justice Democrats was founded after Bernie’s groundbreaking 2016
presidential campaign to recruit and elect the next generation of
progressive leaders ready to challenge the status quo and deliver the bold
change we need to thrive. Today, our mission is more critical than ever
before.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241109?refcode=em20241109-36137&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36137_1203867_AVyiOg&akid=36137%2E1203867%2EAVyiOg ]We’re actively working to build people power in our country by electing
a bloc of working class leaders in Congress who meet the urgency of our
political moment and serve the people’s agenda — not the interests of big
corporate donors. Will you help by rushing a grassroots donation of
$5 or more to Justice Democrats’ Candidate Recruitment Fund
now?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241109?refcode=em20241109-36137&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36137_1203867_AVyiOg&akid=36137%2E1203867%2EAVyiOg ]Contribute $5

In this dark moment, it’s on us to come together, rebuild our progressive
bloc, and make the Democratic Party the party of everyday people again.
Anything you can contribute today will make a difference.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241109-36137-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36137_1203867_AVyiOg&akid=36137%2E1203867%2EAVyiOg

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36137%2E1203867%2EAVyiOg

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Has America just turned a corner?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/ignorethedoomsters-11573374?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **What a result! Trump has bounced back to win the White House, gaining a popular vote majority for the Republicans for the first time in 20 years.**

The Republicans also won the Senate and held the House, meaning that they have a mandate, and the means to deliver it, in a way they have not had for a generation.

**If the incoming administration is going to turn America around, they urgently need to get to grips with the three existential challenges we face:**
1. **Soaring debt**
2. **Uncontrolled immigration & **
3. **A lack of self-belief.**

**Every hundred days the US national debt is currently increasing by $1,000,000,000,000 (twelve zeros - one trillion dollars).** US national debt is already relatively higher than it was at the end of the Second World War – and this year, we will pay more on the interest to service the national debt than we do on defense.
---
|
---
_Debt is out of control_
| As Elon Musk, now one of Trump’s inner circle, says, unless this changes, debt will destroy America the way it did other great powers.

Trump needs to take an axe, the way Argentina’s President Milei has, to many federal departments, closing many of the 400 separate agencies, starting with the Departments of Education and then Housing. **Certain welfare programs need to go, too.**
---
|
---
_President Milei: Cutting the bureaucracy down to size Argentina-style_
| **When Musk bought Twitter / X, he fired 80 percent of the staff, and output rose. Let’s hope he is allowed to do something similar to the federal bureaucracy.**

Musk, who recently complained that it takes him longer to get permission to launch a rocket than it takes his team to build it, understands how red tape is stifling America. Dramatically removing red tape, and legally sanctioning federal agencies that overreach their actual mandates, would raise economic growth.

**Faster growth and reduced federal spending would, in time, close the deficit.**

Over the past four years, 10 million immigrants have entered America – me being one of them. But the number entering _illegally_ has soared.
---
|
---
_Illegal immigration has grown_
| Set aside the unfairness of allowing in people that don’t abide by the rules the rest of us are required to follow, it is not a good idea for America to accept large numbers of people from culturally incompatible countries. See Europe for details.

**As a new arrival, I constantly marvel at how fortunate I am to live in America.** But it bothers me that many Americans don’t see how awesome their country is.

**Too many Americans – especially young Americans – have been taught to despise their own country by smart-stupid liberals in the education system who think that self-loathing is a mark of sophistication, when in reality it betrays a lack of it. **The ‘woke’ insanity in the classroom needs to stop.

Trump has already indicated he will abolish federal Diversity, Equity & Inclusion programs on day one. **The best way to take back control of the education system from smart-stupid liberals is through school choice. **
---
|
---
_Ending federal DEI programs?_
| In many states like our own Mississippi, a coalition of liberal activists, like the so-called _Parents’ Campaign_ , and anti-school choice Republicans, such as Lieutenant Governor Delbert Hosemann, have come together to block school choice.

Trump has made it clear he intends to address this, and Trump has indicated he will push for a federal law to give families school choice through a tax credit.

Trump is the most pro school choice President in the history of America, and I doubt Team Trump will take kindly to any anti school choice Republicans who carry on opposing public to public school choice and tax credits. **State legislation on school choice in the 2025 session is likely to be closely watched by Team Trump. **

**Future trips to Mar-a-Lago to solicit endorsements from Trump will, I gather, be even less successful than the previous one was for anti-school choice Republicans in our state. **I doubt President Trump would offer anti school choice Republicans so much as a photo opportunity, and certainly not an endorsement.

If you live in Mississippi, you will shortly have a Republican President in the White House, and a Republican Congress and Supreme Court in Washington DC. You, of course, already live in a state run by a Republican Governor, under a Republican-run legislature.

**If we can’t deliver conservative policy now, then when? **Now is the time for Mississippi – and America – to use this opportunity and place the country on an authentically conservative path.

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e0d91127ba&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=65a515a448) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=65a515a448).

name: Update on Kari Lake
subject: She needs our help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
body:
Can you step up?

We need Kari Lake to WIN in order to strengthen our Republican Senate Majority. Thank you in advance.

name: Jordan Zaslow
subject: [READ] The story of women in America is far from over…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96830037/511338090/1701071684?refcode=EM_C_241109recap_N_JZ_NO_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkMWFmY2U4LWEyOWUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TqeJT1rOfDg2jQ6xFhk_4ES_HTNUrV8pxvwhZd3Ia54=)
---
Hi Peter,

As the dust settles from the unbelievably disappointing results of Tuesday’s elections, we wanted to check in to remind you of the power you still have.

Women have made unimaginable progress in less than 1 century. Many of our mothers and grandmothers remember a time when women couldn't even open their own credit cards or apply for high paying jobs. None of the rights women have today were handed to us. Women fought TIRELESSLY for them. They committed to never giving up and won SO MANY critical battles.

This is a devastating, monumental, and, yes, terrifying setback in the story of women in America. We have lost trust in our fellow Americans' desire to see us thrive or even survive. Trump, his supporters, and the misogyny he has normalized, have promised to continue waging a war on women.

In the days since Trump’s victory, young men within the MAGA movement have started a disturbing trend of commenting on women’s social media posts, “Your body. MY choice.”

We are sickened, and we WILL NOT STAND FOR IT.

Over the next few years, the work we do at Her Bold Move will be more important than ever. We MUST continue working to elect pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women to our government AT ALL LEVELS. We must continue the work of unseating the legislators who worked to strip us of our rights.

We have a vision for this country, and a dream of FINALLY seeing ourselves, our daughters, our friends, and our fellow American women represented at the highest level of our government. We will get there. But it will take continued work and determination. We hope you’ll continue to join us.

[**Donate to Her Bold Move today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96830040/511338094/1701071684?refcode=EM_C_241109recap_N_JZ_NO_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkMWFmY2U4LWEyOWUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TqeJT1rOfDg2jQ6xFhk_4ES_HTNUrV8pxvwhZd3Ia54=)

With love and solidarity,

Jordan Zaslow
Founder & Executive Director
Her Bold Move
---
| | Her Bold Move believes that ambitious women will transform our country. We provide critical support for fiercely pro-choice women candidates and their campaign teams: financial support, endorsements, message amplification, campaign media, fundraising support, and more.

**Will you support us with a contribution today?** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96830043/511338097/1701071684?refcode=EM_C_241109recap_N_JZ_NO_5_NG_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkMWFmY2U4LWEyOWUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TqeJT1rOfDg2jQ6xFhk_4ES_HTNUrV8pxvwhZd3Ia54=)

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Their rise and fall
body:
The might and drama

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ The might and drama | | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a93ab5d744d1400aa70e1202ea6a7903&_e=kUxdK85diYHirlQbAIa8eE6LE991-3uL1NTLt4H308gIhcu4TPftuU9Lkl8tZRxggdXndmKAwC3lrb4N7iR3nsf634EMUTKv1QQn5JzDXCXPyCak4GjbU8A-bN0Cp6RgbvWI0vdWr8UdTUpHPyk2GzJ6wrQm7XBrF8rVdoWgrJlI3f5LW0egCAMSL9bSGSenoYKSI9VQ6qrDo8Ix1QRMlRh-UF-8i_ae5yITKYKzrZMqCenzX6DehJYt8wC-mieyWAplKyDCGD-luqSStRKgBdbUiUK8zg6enhFY2pZ03zberLRAIjR_PyPGFNpXmY72K0dOLhSBbDNsiT1kGK7gnsJLWwHgitiXF-lTv7eJL9jUBRkYBrKdY2GIVmUASITduc9hgWpr6pIAtMA__L2Y0w%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a93ab5d744d1400aa70e1202ea6a7903&_e=kUxdK85diYHirlQbAIa8eE6LE991-3uL1NTLt4H308gIhcu4TPftuU9Lkl8tZRxggdXndmKAwC3lrb4N7iR3nsf634EMUTKv1QQn5JzDXCXPyCak4GjbU8A-bN0Cp6RgbvWI0vdWr8UdTUpHPyk2GzJ6wrQm7XBrF8rVdoWgrJlI3f5LW0egCAMSL9bSGSenoYKSI9VQ6qrDo8Ix1QRMlRh-UF-8i_ae5yITKYKzrZMqCenzX6DehJYt8wC-mieyr614CxFo9FRqxVehD__UIgnxJehN2l9tEF_WQ0ruR5jE_SsUIDJc0Tt-crR-kF-sTtlC_9imvojaHqvcHk_MuW90ZX3vDwh2POFc66CJ9JcCMCRn3d856kHGoAKXrHkvX8fjYTpMkYTDTgTSNd2bRw%3D%3D) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a93ab5d744d1400aa70e1202ea6a7903&_e=kUxdK85diYHirlQbAIa8eE6LE991-3uL1NTLt4H308gIhcu4TPftuU9Lkl8tZRxggdXndmKAwC3lrb4N7iR3nsf634EMUTKv1QQn5JzDXCXPyCak4GjbU8A-bN0Cp6RgbvWI0vdWr8UdTUpHPyk2GzJ6wrQm7XBrF8rVdoWgrJlI3f5LW0egCAMSL9bSGSenoYKSI9VQ6qrDo8Ix1QRMlRh-UF-8i_ae5yITKYKzrZMqCenzX6DehJYt8wC-mieytgLqcEQ8iRnTmhanmfbFIolq9nGbosTrZj6pyZMILbk6MJ3YoHRC6bDeSZxPepUNVtWzK_o1JVztJDxI7zKNBXz472J9TZHXr38pXx9YEM_W6clc6GcN0KytuduBNs86KSb0bSoU5qWvtyrQXvDD4w%3D%3D)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a93ab5d744d1400aa70e1202ea6a7903&_e=kUxdK85diYHirlQbAIa8eE6LE991-3uL1NTLt4H308gIhcu4TPftuU9Lkl8tZRxggdXndmKAwC3lrb4N7iR3nsf634EMUTKv1QQn5JzDXCXPyCak4GjbU8A-bN0Cp6RgbvWI0vdWr8UdTUpHPyk2GzJ6wrQm7XBrF8rVdoWgrJlI3f5LW0egCAMSL9bSGSenoYKSI9VQ6qrDo8Ix1QRMlRh-UF-8i_ae5yITKYKzrZMqCenzX6DehJYt8wC-mieypkJNIqQHSqO3aQHdN6CUQPboXUVf8FRrjszuqj0cgF3fzFs7SRkHlROMEDaJK2OSGpyx5T4xicD7CZ0g8cE8Ab3P7FTInq3etq1ByVHLhUqIUPBMN86pXHs0jsIRoRxmSsx0coU-VqmY7R2eMefw7Q%3D%3D)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=a93ab5d744d1400aa70e1202ea6a7903&_t=eolhj5tD6BLwUQIG9zN6UL7KWe9h7qILTw4taDtI2oMJjmWh4XEBzEMEXMGB3lUonIQ3G2dwqluPUfwdS6Bu3n5Cv7mL27dVh33rAbJhCEXy_NT3FbsNmTQAikpTXULj)

name: Georgia House Democrats
subject: Thank You for Helping Us Secure Key Democratic Victories in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
Hi Peter,

Thank you for your unwavering support and partnership this election season.

Because of your dedication and generous contributions, we not only retained all Democratic incumbents but also added three more Democratic representatives to the House. Your engagement has brought us closer to creating a fairer, freer Georgia.

While there is more work ahead, the results show the impact we are making together. This victory lays crucial groundwork for future progress, and we will continue fighting to flip more House seats as we work toward a Georgia that truly reflects our shared values.

Your role in this success cannot be overstated – we are profoundly grateful. Thank you for standing with our Democratic candidates and for fighting for a future we all believe in.

Georgia House Democrats

clean_body: Hi Peter, Thank you for your unwavering support and partnership this election season. Because of your dedication and generous contributions, we not only retained all Democratic incumbents but also added three more Democratic representatives to the House. Your engagement has brought us closer to creating a fairer, freer Georgia. While there is more work ahead, the results show the impact we are making together. This victory lays crucial groundwork for future progress, and we will continue fighting to flip more House seats as we work toward a Georgia that truly reflects our shared values. Your role in this success cannot be overstated – we are profoundly grateful. Thank you for standing with our Democratic candidates and for fighting for a future we all believe in. name: Kamala Harris
subject: It’s time to roll up our sleeves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
---
Derek, I know the outcome of the presidential election is not what we wanted. And I know you gave so much of yourself to this fight. From the bottom of my heart: thank you. As I said on Wednesday: The light of America’s promise will always burn bright — as long as we never give up, and as long as we keep fighting. And the fight continues right now. There are critical Senate and House races across the country where ballots are still being counted. These races will determine our ability to put a check on Donald Trump's power. **Every Democrat we elect this year is one more check on Donald Trump’s power, and one more building block for the America we believe in.** [**We must make sure that every vote is counted. That is why I am asking you to support the Harris Fight Fund and the Democratic National Committee today. These campaigns need resources to make sure every vote is counted in the coming days:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-hff-split?refcode=em_20241109_2319_fr&refcode2=khp_em_20241109_b1_kdh_dnc_fl&amount=10&akid=2319%2E22930333%2EaDNObC) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Harris Victory Fund and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-hff-split?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20241109_2319_fr&refcode2=khp_em_20241109_b1_kdh_dnc_fl&akid=2319%2E22930333%2EaDNObC)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-hff-split?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20241109_2319_fr&refcode2=khp_em_20241109_b1_kdh_dnc_fl&akid=2319%2E22930333%2EaDNObC)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-hff-split?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20241109_2319_fr&refcode2=khp_em_20241109_b1_kdh_dnc_fl&akid=2319%2E22930333%2EaDNObC)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-hff-split?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20241109_2319_fr&refcode2=khp_em_20241109_b1_kdh_dnc_fl&akid=2319%2E22930333%2EaDNObC)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-hff-split?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20241109_2319_fr&refcode2=khp_em_20241109_b1_kdh_dnc_fl&akid=2319%2E22930333%2EaDNObC)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-hff-split?refcode=em_20241109_2319_fr&refcode2=khp_em_20241109_b1_kdh_dnc_fl&akid=2319%2E22930333%2EaDNObC)**
---
****
On the campaign trail I would often say, when we fight, we win.
Sometimes the fight takes a while. That doesn’t mean we won’t win. And it certainly does not mean we can give up now.
**This is not a time to throw up our hands. This is a time to roll up our sleeves.**
This is a time to organize, to mobilize and to stay engaged for the sake of freedom and justice and the future that we all know we can build together.
[**So, if you can, please contribute $10 to support the Harris Fight Fund and the Democratic National Committee. Whatever you give will ensure every vote is counted in these critical races across the country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-hff-split?refcode=em_20241109_2319_fr&refcode2=khp_em_20241016_b1_kdh_dnc_fl&amount=10&akid=2319%2E22930333%2EaDNObC)
Thank you for everything,
Kamala

Vice President of the United States

name: John Fetterman
subject: Pennsylvania is now the frontline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
Peter, I’m going to be real with you: Bob Casey needs our help
right now.

His race with Connecticut Dave is still too close to call 😬 and we need
your help to make sure every ballot is counted.

Bob’s team is working hard to make sure all Pennsylvanians have their
voice heard, but they need the resources to make that happen.

Pennsylvania is now the frontline for standing up to Senate Republicans 🛑
and I need Bob in the Senate with me to keep up the fight. 💪

body:
| Liquid error: Internal error Liquid error: Internal error Liquid error: Internal error Liquid error: Internal error Fellow Conservative, We did it! **[President Trump's historic victory on Tuesday night was a testament to our collective efforts.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=fceac192b91a4e6fa6194b66901eef0d&_e=YOIeRcyMsmPUem3t7YH3iTc9zB00blfLHgk2jcXU3e5k5_vDLf5J9NAy65MemxCWeyKw8LJYk1poW9fEhoQrK7ebjXPI5ouTYy3v_wETwwdNo-0J7-Q4c_qE280fZG3fyPmoAnaVn3OcVDlNQOA1QiIvZ3x_4kT-cUohMnUnyNNuzg4sTVpgkqaTshZGTE3qX95xHeMiMDzsiBjTr4AUsiklkvsrxShxnkYHjKLIOEAX4MxdAdSLKG7GRj_p8SeeIdTMZkZoKOaVGEcMSvGNODfeyY_YnAd-BJnL7RbNlS8XHtgxD222asQNxBG5_8F1z0Mo3wzxKhe43QavXKrIuPiyDpX42rL_CKBn0YJxrEEtm2UQJTVgv42i2mdUpAACrifnGt0luv8LVFcwQ8bcpX2Zvat1Wg5Vi11bQj5W7-m2IGyPmWeCvszgZeeuf8tps4BOUyTt9J4ugQH3ylOeL9go4-1yWtIcYjqMc8pOQQvdH_S7-yD8LxGrQtQHppJYqUhyQYtb4hzklvaIWMZE3FpeCnNPZE5fA9awtylF_vwSaDg2gUmaJjOgkXMqEfeNqrvDgJeRd6Pctz7d7Le1wxubdcQeI7ayjZprim-OcAC_GxljI70oAKa33T2vKpApG1teO927vhL76KdMElnMyDIxE5tJveluz-TOoRhzrDw%3D)** But our work is far from over. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Just when I thought it was the end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
BREAKING: A federal judge is now considering...
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=958c4fd0a0294e03b1ac341b7fb6fd56&_e=S6FTXf6ToBSacuRWDa9ZH-VgkoblMqtPAOlIsD96sMI--7k-gU7qkWRol6k3xYA7h8x0QflN_Way08TTFBgHhLJYSPc_qP-B5PAbC2CCOSZuwjgAJ5JLhUy5QE2OszJaPYKOsH9K8hBM0GPk1IkUQyMpjVpqh0bUhms8jaNHPIqmts6fuewatYnQOCB4zzOffClpX33K0I8y61TN1HMMm5lC1mmr40qAljOYETOzQyC0SzvFOFjgynRCR-bp3-IEaE_0C8qEnXiAKP4uh7w7P1QW4XjcthPgtSsAvdhLcFj5nBh04yjwMltYpPcGqh1zHuakbUgB5GkYRsUtamVy-0pcOOJ6ZgxVNrEFCtoFkUCtE49lzeSRUNY9Q3Tb09Ss9DbeDopQJjbY7Jp-CXhtppwWdVDDv5V6s04HpeLoEJAIBSAzr54BvlPhE0LP5h9phgBMSP7yCdkVL9mhd0duOg%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
On October 22, a federal judge decreed that I had 7 days to hand over my home in New York - as well as my only car and sentimental keepsakes and heartfelt gifts that I collected over the span of 80 years.
---
_I thought that would be the end of the damage ..._
---
Kamala's Deep State _truly_ wants to ruin me with all they've got. They're now considering dealing one final blow to me.
---
**A judge may now order me to give up my _remaining_ home in Florida - __my primary residence.__**
---
As my lawyer inquired: _**do they truly want me homeless?**_
---
Over the last few days, we've heard ridiculous claims about President Trump being a "fascist."
---
Let me tell you what fascism is... Fascism is weaponizing the legal system to punish your political opponents. Fascism is having your home taken from you. Fascism is taking the law license away from your opponent's lawyer. Fascism is trying to turn your enemies into political prisoners.
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=958c4fd0a0294e03b1ac341b7fb6fd56&_e=S6FTXf6ToBSacuRWDa9ZH-VgkoblMqtPAOlIsD96sMI--7k-gU7qkWRol6k3xYA7h8x0QflN_Way08TTFBgHhLJYSPc_qP-B5PAbC2CCOSZuwjgAJ5JLhUy5QE2OszJaPYKOsH9K8hBM0GPk1IkUQyMpjVpqh0bUhms8jaNHPIqmts6fuewatYnQOCB4zzOffClpX33K0I8y61TN1HMMm5lC1mmr40qAljOYETOzQyC0SzvFOFjgynRCR-bp3-IEaE_0C8qEnXiAKP4uh7w7Pwm120uSkM4Njfg5znYQXh1WN_DLhCtlHMWipOryVnDjX-NkmMPEBmBtRS8wZVVY-45u-qhs0U6PhKDv-C5nDsTWIJKUFZtN_HUoiqInbo55fcezZsMTxE1otgaIEU-GMp6R5x167byCs_Topzjt4eWLb8tjivDN0nhb1GxNJXkI)
---
_**I am _living through_ the Democrats' fascism right now.** _
---
I sincerely pray that freedom, justice, and the truth prevail - or the damage done to me will spread like wildfire to the rest of our great Republic.
---
**But, as I wrote to you in an earlier letter, the Bible reminds us that our earthly possessions will always fade, but greater "heavenly treasures" await us.**
---
_The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than a car or a home. Possessions come and go, but I could _NEVER SURRENDER_ my fight for freedom and for what I know to be _true.__
---
I would be tone deaf if I didn't acknowledge that times are tough right now for _all_ Americans, not just me, so please stop reading here if you cannot give at this time.
---
_But funding my Legal Defense Trust is my last remaining hope of fighting for my freedom and for the liberty and justice of all Americans._
---
[**So, if you can, and, seriously, only if you can, please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust - the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund - as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as Kamala's Deep State tries to JAIL me for life. **](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=958c4fd0a0294e03b1ac341b7fb6fd56&_e=S6FTXf6ToBSacuRWDa9ZH-VgkoblMqtPAOlIsD96sMI--7k-gU7qkWRol6k3xYA7h8x0QflN_Way08TTFBgHhLJYSPc_qP-B5PAbC2CCOSZuwjgAJ5JLhUy5QE2OszJaPYKOsH9K8hBM0GPk1IkUQyMpjVpqh0bUhms8jaNHPIqmts6fuewatYnQOCB4zzOffClpX33K0I8y61TN1HMMm5lC1mmr40qAljOYETOzQyC0SzvFOFjgynRCR-bp3-IEaE_0C8qEnXiAKP4uh7w7Pwm120uSkM4Njfg5znYQXh2NJdonNsWISyZz5rENXO1B5qrH3-aaRPO2rLbM9EKcubdOMeJtnMjN8xgF1QMYtr_iD8lThMFSUVNeFDegFkbZxklZRlwwbBK_JPuDcR4HXaH93FGzlWXpm7GFVHz33jv4q8s4TQBZ8uDKcGB8hEYe)

clean_body: BREAKING: A federal judge is now considering... | Dear Peter, On October 22, a federal judge decreed that I had 7 days to hand over my home in New York - as well as my only car and sentimental keepsakes and heartfelt gifts that I collected over the span of 80 years. I thought that would be the end of the damage ... Kamala's Deep State truly wants to ruin me with all they've got. They're now considering dealing one final blow to me. A judge may now order me to give up my remaining home in Florida - my primary residence. As my lawyer inquired: do they truly want me homeless? Over the last few days, we've heard ridiculous claims about President Trump being a "fascist." Let me tell you what fascism is... Fascism is weaponizing the legal system to punish your political opponents. Fascism is having your home taken from you. Fascism is taking the law license away from your opponent's lawyer. Fascism is trying to turn your enemies into political prisoners. I am living through the Democrats' fascism right now. I sincerely pray that freedom, justice, and the truth prevail - or the damage done to me will spread like wildfire to the rest of our great Republic. But, as I wrote to you in an earlier letter, the Bible reminds us that our earthly possessions will always fade, but greater "heavenly treasures" await us. The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than a car or a home. Possessions come and go, but I could NEVER SURRENDER my fight for freedom and for what I know to be true. I would be tone deaf if I didn't acknowledge that times are tough right now for all Americans, not just me, so please stop reading here if you cannot give at this time. But funding my Legal Defense Trust is my last remaining hope of fighting for my freedom and for the liberty and justice of all Americans. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

Team our race in Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District is still too close to call. Kirsten is neck-and-neck with her extremist Republican opponent — but there are still thousands of lawful ballots that need to be counted. Together, our grassroots campaign overcame millions of dollars from super PACs supporting our opponent. Arizona voters heard Kirsten’s message of reproductive rights, water security, and lower costs, and they showed up to the polls. **Now, we’re working hard to make sure every lawful vote is counted correctly. ** **We'll need your help in this fight too. We need to make sure every single lawful vote is counted — and prepare for a potential recount before a winner is declared.** **[Will you split a donation between our campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party now? body:
Here’s what we know: Pennsylvania’s Senate race is not over, and we still have work to do. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Here’s what we know: Pennsylvania’s Senate race is not over, and we still have work to do. If we’re going to send Bob Casey back to the Senate and hold the line for our rights and freedoms, we need your immediate support to ensure that every last vote in this PA Senate race is counted. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsCw3vZWNw
I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom
are very similar.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osCw3vZWNw

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

I'd like
to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very
similar.

Both were
born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing,
raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went
to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college
and now have a four-year degree.

In most
respects, these young women are nearly identical-same background,
grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music
and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that
difference is vital to preserving liberty in America.

The first
young lady learned false narratives about American history in her
K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and
professors cherry-picked "facts" to fit an ideological (and
frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political
correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race,
gender, and class.

Her
teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative
about our nation's history-a narrative that portrays America as
essentially and irredeemably unjust.

Absent
any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these
misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen-echoing what
she learned in school. And when she's challenged, she dismisses
this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as invalid,
hateful, and even racist.

Maybe you
know someone like her. If so, I'm not surprised-I do too.

What
about the other young lady?

Well, she
received a complete and unbiased view of our nation's history. At
her schools, especially her college, she received an education
that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history
fairly and comprehensively.

She
understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution
because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson,
Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources.

Her
studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of
"oppression" and "injustice" but an exceptional nation worth
defending.

This
young lady is an informed citizen. She will never be one to go
along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to
consider policies and political debates from a constitutional
perspective.

I ask
you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of
leadership?

You can
tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College's
National Survey on the State of American Education using this
secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63775642:sCw3vZWNw:m:3:2532013465:5EC09FEDB081CC96DE2C3BF74175E671:r

This
survey lets you share your views about the state of our country
and how to change course before it's too late.

By
participating, you will give us a glimpse into the "state of
knowledge" in your community that can only come from the local
level.

The
survey is part of our CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

The goal
of this new campaign we're leading is to build generations of
knowledgeable Americans who understand:

WHAT the
Constitution says;
HOW it
relates to current issues and events; and
WHY we
must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure.

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people
whom our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" either deliberately deceived or who
just didn't receive a proper understanding of American history in
school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited
government.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today. Thank you for reading my
email, and I hope you have a wonderful day.

For our
children,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President

Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isCw3vZWNw

name: Lindsey Williams Drath
subject: What we accomplished in 2024...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
... And what we're planning for the future.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_year_in_review&n=1)
---
Saturday, November 09, 2024 | Greetings, As we conclude this incredibly consequential week, our team at Forward HQ would like to extend a heartfelt thank you to everyone who has signed up for the Forward Party. At its heart, a political party isn’t a set of policies, or candidates, or staff. It’s the people who make up the party. Without you, this Party would not exist! Additionally, we imagine that a lot of your friends and family are asking, “What do we do now?” NOW is the time to introduce (or reintroduce) them to Forward. Send them to our [website](https://www.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_year_in_review&n=2), or [invite them to a state meeting](https://home.forwardparty.com/public_calendar?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_year_in_review&n=3).
* * *
Our team has spent the past few days analyzing our incredible successes of 2024\. We made huge strides this year and built out scalable infrastructure to support new and better candidates. Forward-aligned candidates were committed to a new kind of campaign not tied directly to the legacy parties and committed to a better country for the American people. Some highlights of our work:
* We built out a candidate recruitment and endorsement pipeline that:
* Considered over 500 candidates for endorsement
* Endorsed over 125 candidates
* 20% of which ended up winning their races

_Thank you, Forward Party for all of your support throughout this election cycle. The resources you provided me with were a key factor in my decisive victory. Forward Party helps even the playing field in nonpartisan races._ _-Newly elected Justice of the Peace Jonathan Cooper_

* We supported state party growth by:
* Identifying, onboarding, and training over 180 new state leads
* Building out state party infrastructure in 29 states, expanding the map for future cycles
* Holding 15 training sessions for state leads

* This support came from our membership, who:
* Held dozens of text banks for endorsed candidates
* Sent out over 264,000 messages
* Contacted over 258,000 voters
* Engaged in over 30,000 conversations

* * *
We learned a lot in 2024 that we’ll take into the future. Next week, our Chief Strategy and Operating Officer Matt Shinners and I will be sending a series of emails outlining lessons learned from this cycle and what the plans are for Forward in the future. Please look for them Tuesday through Friday of next week. Until then, Lindsey Williams Drath Forward Party CEO
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_year_in_review&n=4) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_year_in_review&n=5) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_year_in_review&n=6) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_year_in_review&n=7) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_year_in_review&n=8) Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is:
1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
ForwardParty.com

disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96847773/511393581/-154088383?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1739-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmRjMTJjNC1iNTllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eskmeCvuKyIWU65ryvhGXLdxj48dOGkLdaO_p8netuI=)
Peter —

When I first launched this campaign, I never would’ve dreamed that this many people would have my back.

It’s unbelievable, and I’ll always be grateful for everything we’ve built together.

Here’s where we’re at in Arizona:

I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close.

Unfortunately, my opponent has a history of fanning the flames of conspiracy theories and disinformation. She’s already done a ton of damage to my state and to our country, but I’m not about to back down.

Maybe it’s the Marine in me, but I’ll always fight for our democracy. And you have a critical role in that fight, if you’re up for it.

I know you’ve already given so much, but I’ve got to ask you one more time, Peter:

**[If you’re looking for some way to have an impact and help us fight back against Kari Lake as we work to ensure the votes are counted, please make a split donation to my campaign and Letitia James.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96847774/511393582/-154088383?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1739-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmRjMTJjNC1iNTllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eskmeCvuKyIWU65ryvhGXLdxj48dOGkLdaO_p8netuI=)**

clean_body: But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close. | | | = Peter — When I first launched this campaign, I never would’ve dreamed that this many people would have my back. It’s unbelievable, and I’ll always be grateful for everything we’ve built together. Here’s where we’re at in Arizona: I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close. Unfortunately, my opponent has a history of fanning the flames of conspiracy theories and disinformation. She’s already done a ton of damage to my state and to our country, but I’m not about to back down. Maybe it’s the Marine in me, but I’ll always fight for our democracy. And you have a critical role in that fight, if you’re up for it. I know you’ve already given so much, but I’ve got to ask you one more time, Peter: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Letitia James and Ruben Gallego will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks again, and Semper Fi. — Ruben | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: We’re going to fight our way to the finish
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84061?refcode=em20241109-8657&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8657%2E614464%2EFjdLng)
Peter, I know the last few days haven’t gone how we’d hoped.
I’ve been through some tough times in my life. Times when it seemed foolish to hope, when the outcome was uncertain. I got through those tough times by fighting my way to the other side. Today, tomorrow, and the next day, we have to fight.
With Republican control of the Senate assured, every seat that we win is a check on their control. I won’t shy away from working with anyone if it’s in the best interest of Arizona, but whatever power we retain is a mechanism for fighting the worst that might come our way.
My race is still too close to call. There are hundreds of thousands of votes yet to be counted. We need to run through the tape and win this seat in Arizona.
**[Please, make a split donation to my campaign and Lucas Kunce. One last push to victory in Arizona. This matters, Peter. And I would not be asking you for help if it didn’t.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84061?refcode=em20241109-8657&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8657%2E614464%2EFjdLng)**
