name: PragerU
subject: Did you hear what Google did?
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

In case you missed it, Google recently removed the PragerU app
from the Play Store without warning. Only after our app
disappeared from Google's platform did they bother to notify us
that it had been suspended and removed indefinitely for
"Violation of Hate Speech."

Stand Up to Big Tech

In the email from Google, they said our app contained "content
or speech asserting that a protected group is inhuman, inferior,
or worthy of being hated," referring to our recently released
short documentary, Dear Infidels: A Warning to America, which
features first-hand accounts from individuals who escaped the
oppressive grip of radical Islamic rule.

According to Google, sharing the stories of a former
Palestinian refugee, an Arab Muslim born in Israel, and brave
U.S. Navy SEALs who witnessed the horrors of Muslim extremism
constitutes "hate speech."

Dear Infidels went viral on social media, reaching millions of
people! Like clockwork, Big Tech reared its ugly head to shut us
down and suppress our reach.

We immediately jumped into action and began
sounding the alarm. Thanks to our dedicated followers and
supporters, Big Tech did NOT win, and their Soviet-style
censorship tactics were thwarted.

After major outcry from our supporters
and several media outlets, Google put the PragerU app back on the
Google Play Store…for now.

Unfortunately, we know this won't be
the last time we are targeted by Big Tech giants. It is
imperative that we keep fighting for our freedoms.

At PragerU, we always fight
back, but we need your help. This is a David vs. Goliath battle.
They may expect us to give up and throw in the towel, but as long
as there is breath in our lungs, and courageous supporters like
you standing beside us, we refuse to be silenced.

Join us in the fight against Big Tech censorship with a 100%
tax-deductible donation.

Your generous tax-deductible donation will help us to keep
fighting Big Tech, expand our reach, and continue our mission to
educate and inspire Americans with the truth. Every dollar counts
in this battle for free speech and the future of our nation.

Donate now to ensure PragerU's voice remains loud and clear!

Sincerely,

Your PragerU team

Donate Now

Copyright © 2024 PragerU

All rights reserved.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

© Copyright

name: Senate Alert
subject: Urgent resources needed: >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
With all eyes on what is happening in PA, no one can afford to sit on the sidelines right now.
| | | Pennsylvania's Senate race is not over, and we urgently need your help to make sure every vote is counted.

| | [DONATE NOW](https://go.dscc.org/go/20537?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20241109-SenateAlert-UrgentResourcesPA-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20241109-SenateAlert-UrgentResourcesPA-Pros-sl1&akid=18882%2E9716520%2Ez2Uh3-)
---
Your donation will be split between Bob Casey for Senate’s recount account and the DSCC to fight for the Senate.
With all eyes on what is happening in Pennsylvania, no one can afford to sit on the sidelines right now.

Our team is working around the clock to make sure that Pennsylvanians have their voices heard, but we urgently need the resources to keep up the fight.

name: Lila Rose
subject: Urgent: Is your student hearing this too?
body:
The “educator” in the video tells young people: “It’s time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity.”

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=275feed6c0e843748834eb10f686cf6e&_t=AVHnx6cWVLJYg_v3SzSSk39WK64MxL3fHX_urU_3PdF8acCNUEQpc0UTjGjo67MQ1XgLtMpTyLNJBnkwM8o_p_afwmWgJeCDDApOVxhqbDXVnxQy6bYUCU3VEkgDJrmM)_
---
[ ](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=275feed6c0e843748834eb10f686cf6e&_e=aXK9xt94JLhm5HwkMZhpGakq69rb3Ul6BD17gXkEZDsPN0sez2wfsDLOBuIlTYIHRJ9AdISicUQh_tLKsX2x4FduzD9muuks5kH7xyDyjc3VvH26m0NVE1Wq2PCnOJ-TbPbHhA7v2iJavwzGCWgDp1UGBATIZK6WHPUCZjGAYyJbZi6MgiWSqlMVt8xIqLcJqEW9uMAsD8chcytD9hKFntI9G_v4V2Vh5NNZC91K3ciWfBHjJlv7dlbaOzsy6y0nIZx3S96Rclnu_uYrnPHbNEKknMKeLdTmIKKHT_j1KNMVpEL5aGUngRv8BeBlBqdcTTXVfEOSBC6Bw_k8YHjhcvamWdNgqTjmYJav5adESgg%3D)
#
Friend of Life,

Planned Parenthood just came out with a new video that calls virginity "made up" and a "social construct."

The "educator" in the video tells young people: "It's time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity."

Instead of seeing it as "losing something," Planned Parenthood encourages impressionable teens to experiment sexually because "all of these myths around sex and virginity can be so hurtful and overwhelming."

Planned Parenthood is grooming the next generation for abortion. Promoting risky sexual practices to young people ultimately leads them to broken relationships and more children killed in the womb.

**Will you help fight back against Planned Parenthood 's anti-family, pro-death agenda? I'm asking 50 people to step forward today with a $50 gift to help us put our life-saving videos into classrooms nationwide**. **[https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=275feed6c0e843748834eb10f686cf6e&_e=aXK9xt94JLhm5HwkMZhpGakq69rb3Ul6BD17gXkEZDsPN0sez2wfsDLOBuIlTYIHRJ9AdISicUQh_tLKsX2x4FduzD9muuks5kH7xyDyjc3VvH26m0NVE1Wq2PCnOJ-TbPbHhA7v2iJavwzGCWgDp1UGBATIZK6WHPUCZjGAYyJbZi6MgiWSqlMVt8xIqLcJqEW9uMAsD8chcytD9hKFnkH3Tskf_gj7P8MntvWzNJ7lXCyAGGTWBGWmi9UcPHawVdAkMZzxcHuQ1OA1cQ-X5XhwolLxugRcsTBdpARnweimNMiERJdeK2xgE1z5epLTD5_T8rDx8_aHUYCanp93k3-yrYvPrl3D7sy0NqSac3Q%3D)**

Planned Parenthood has continuously pushed egregious and pornographic materials in schools to young kids and teens -- and what do they "teach" these impressionable kids about sex? That disturbing practices are "normal" and "healthy."

In classic Planned Parenthood fashion, irrefutable definitions are warped, and morality is thrown out the window.

Planned Parenthood is the largest provider of sex education in America -- and they teach kids that gender is fluid, deviant sexual practices are normal and healthy, and anything goes, as long as it's consensual.

**We need to protect our children against Planned Parenthood 's deception. This deadly organization should not be the educator of our children. **

Friend of Life, this is why we at Live Action have been creating - and are about to release! - wholesome sex-ed video series for schools across the country to use instead of Planned Parenthood's damaging materials.

We need to spread the truth about loving relationships between men and women and the beauty of procreation before the next generation of parents is convinced by Planned Parenthood's disturbing agenda that leads to abortion.

**But we can 't complete this critical initiative without your support. Your gift of $50 will help us complete the videos and get them into schools across the country. Use this secure link to make your gift and kick Planned Parenthood out of the classroom! [https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=275feed6c0e843748834eb10f686cf6e&_e=aXK9xt94JLhm5HwkMZhpGakq69rb3Ul6BD17gXkEZDsPN0sez2wfsDLOBuIlTYIHRJ9AdISicUQh_tLKsX2x4FduzD9muuks5kH7xyDyjc3VvH26m0NVE1Wq2PCnOJ-TbPbHhA7v2iJavwzGCWgDp1UGBATIZK6WHPUCZjGAYyJbZi6MgiWSqlMVt8xIqLcJqEW9uMAsD8chcytD9hKFnpd0_zFiUrYFcbtqwm0N6D42g0Gf1htAyYrFx4jfcsahQOFa0gimHBUF_jxM_rLq2ZrJU3iaSGT7qTCeF5i-Ut2ztNre0YPMovEdFDLafVxAWbQ4nWVcp1E55sOvstsq-0JULu4sGzdQwhnR0CWNbH0%3D)
**
Your partnership gives me so much hope. I can't wait to share the impact your activism will have in months to come. Our children - and grandchildren - depend on it.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=275feed6c0e843748834eb10f686cf6e&_e=aXK9xt94JLhm5HwkMZhpGakq69rb3Ul6BD17gXkEZDsPN0sez2wfsDLOBuIlTYIHRJ9AdISicUQh_tLKsX2x4FduzD9muuks5kH7xyDyjc3VvH26m0NVE1Wq2PCnOJ-TbPbHhA7v2iJavwzGCWgDp1UGBATIZK6WHPUCZjGAYyJbZi6MgiWSqlMVt8xIqLcJqEW9uMAsD8chcytD9hKFnsmDDyNFUtnTZVMqt4Hd96XvHj8bl-2aMFRkpE1T5nNqBb4_j4eCTk1U3kOg9CGVHGZsGfx5lsxw33SC03iwk6iq4Bfm4VFNg9PLOWsL9oSZiBMN4JGXM7oz1CuKOZPIjpSftNAsh5fzTEY4lCweGas%3D)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201
#

name: Lila Rose
subject: Mothers need your help
body:
Did you know that America’s most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion?

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=f9375046d3ef48a787c1d1770b2decaf&_t=OvBGtlNNIlmuTw5rJEh4ruMT-rK3adGO6Z9HIUdN3ljdsT7Qb1ER6M5t3GduGK9holcmyCAxBm--9zkNhfCKZX-BPo3qG_hXpwto6kk1CsySM3AsJQQUR4A5FHaNuYva)_
---
[ ](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=f9375046d3ef48a787c1d1770b2decaf&_e=rXE2cmqZN0mzAFkf3rj3wJmkFQPo6pWDEuFqeYsK2I5n6hE6x0l984GPKpKUdyK5B-AW4gqXBx6XYSN2q0Yx1bV6Fz1tqFtK41rZIPnJOqxNpPDnzdh0sH9fS6KA9Dm3bL_tnTzlv8qX08FzMsOfSMtnNq4IHPT1qMJMKiUbyfmBvmGvYY-Wxpic4N6mLcZq8MXGAuptauSDhNjMg_P4YCpgBNVtaSnIBPa_gqDVWJzOcd8UQj_WviXo_3D2minQ7toWty7dZZVzXUtmtf1sPRPKM_4m2ZYgaRhrpHJsqHf_5iDXvwrKRCxBWPzft_Br2mEPzpV3AinKuZCIKMBRUFzWfL9KwdlYuUqnIynvR6f-Xy93YpOtWHSJsg-tJumbrj9N_jZyhAcXq0nzCXDD1Q%3D%3D)
#
Friend of Life,

Did you know that America's most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion?

This is peak irony. Brands that provide a necessity for babies also financially and/or publicly support an act that intentionally kills innocent children in the womb.

As pro-life people, we can do something to put a stop to this.

**Live Action is hosting a diaper drive with EveryLife -- the first pro-life diaper company -- to help mothers and their babies in need.**

If you're tired of supporting brands that don't align with your pro-life values, you can do something now to help women AND support a pro-life business.

**Your gift of just $50 will provide six packs of EveryLife diapers to a mom who is considering abortion or is facing a crisis and help her embrace life. Our goal is to provide 34 boxes of diapers to every state.**

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=f9375046d3ef48a787c1d1770b2decaf&_e=rXE2cmqZN0mzAFkf3rj3wJmkFQPo6pWDEuFqeYsK2I5n6hE6x0l984GPKpKUdyK5B-AW4gqXBx6XYSN2q0Yx1bV6Fz1tqFtK41rZIPnJOqxNpPDnzdh0sH9fS6KA9Dm3bL_tnTzlv8qX08FzMsOfSMtnNq4IHPT1qMJMKiUbyfmBvmGvYY-Wxpic4N6mLcZq8MXGAuptauSDhNjMg_P4YCpgBNVtaSnIBPa_gqDVWJw-LtlO5cuagzhpeBm1hln94ipgbfBrM-cGbiY3exogRLJKv8qp1C60eJw_13qKXPscTiD3z_Oa1Ybhjnc2zaLUi1wEDwBirr9XC5nAdOimiHBI72DsIhAqfrE_LciOmodQxqJdvALtwHWHWD9jWIqqCW3pjWP6AIwPYgGAaWs6cg%3D%3D)
Is this something you can do? Here's your secure link to give: **[https://give.liveaction.org/send-a-box-of-diapers-to-a-mom-in-need/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=f9375046d3ef48a787c1d1770b2decaf&_e=rXE2cmqZN0mzAFkf3rj3wJmkFQPo6pWDEuFqeYsK2I5n6hE6x0l984GPKpKUdyK5B-AW4gqXBx6XYSN2q0Yx1bV6Fz1tqFtK41rZIPnJOqxNpPDnzdh0sH9fS6KA9Dm3bL_tnTzlv8qX08FzMsOfSMtnNq4IHPT1qMJMKiUbyfmBvmGvYY-Wxpic4N6mLcZq8MXGAuptauSDhNjMg_P4YCpgBNVtaSnIBPa_gqDVWJw7yvWz6L6Ztqt0ocjgI5J7mHr6NQ5SNLOH8hIFl-bS2pYa1lMo90kx1RiLHHFoehkxqhF54KVWeQ_ZgxY70D5QIy2NLEoAFMGOeCoEu1RuXdf7HIGucf7Wylq0zw5qpwv87V42eK5iBJxeYHyheYOJsRZe33aXVmovjoj_ORo97g%3D%3D)**

EveryLife prides itself in being a pro-life company that uses premium materials for their diapers-- and better yet, EveryLife promotes the message that every baby is a miracle from God who deserves to be loved, protected, and supported.

Your gift will send a box of diapers to a local pro-life pregnancy clinic so that moms days away from a potentially life-ending decision can receive the practical support they need to choose life.

Thank you in advance for standing with us against big abortion and equipping moms to choose life.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=f9375046d3ef48a787c1d1770b2decaf&_e=rXE2cmqZN0mzAFkf3rj3wJmkFQPo6pWDEuFqeYsK2I5n6hE6x0l984GPKpKUdyK5B-AW4gqXBx6XYSN2q0Yx1bV6Fz1tqFtK41rZIPnJOqxNpPDnzdh0sH9fS6KA9Dm3bL_tnTzlv8qX08FzMsOfSMtnNq4IHPT1qMJMKiUbyfmBvmGvYY-Wxpic4N6mLcZq8MXGAuptauSDhNjMg_P4YCpgBNVtaSnIBPa_gqDVWJznnAkYMCZDlTVbDgbGgDiySSX2xTDhJkN5uf_yahms0bXb6EFl5Tp9ixQ_VHtnd4FscIOdb3c4v-WMAApQuRKyBa8IbwnsZQ8hVIXKUuwDve20y1pjqrgSve63shKMlWow0bQh0Ibm7IoABu1ZdFybXo-j6BqwZU0heQpwLxBhsg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Did you know that America’s most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion? | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Friend of Life, Did you know that America's most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion? This is peak irony. Brands that provide a necessity for babies also financially and/or publicly support an act that intentionally kills innocent children in the womb. As pro-life people, we can do something to put a stop to this. Live Action is hosting a diaper drive with EveryLife -- the first pro-life diaper company -- to help mothers and their babies in need. If you're tired of supporting brands that don't align with your pro-life values, you can do something now to help women AND support a pro-life business. Your gift of just $50 will provide six packs of EveryLife diapers to a mom who is considering abortion or is facing a crisis and help her embrace life. Our goal is to provide 34 boxes of diapers to every state. Is this something you can do? Here's your secure link to give: EveryLife prides itself in being a pro-life company that uses premium materials for their diapers-- and better yet, EveryLife promotes the message that every baby is a miracle from God who deserves to be loved, protected, and supported. Your gift will send a box of diapers to a local pro-life pregnancy clinic so that moms days away from a potentially life-ending decision can receive the practical support they need to choose life. Thank you in advance for standing with us against big abortion and equipping moms to choose life. For Life, Lila Rose President and Founder 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 .

A seismic election, a new (old?) administration, and a long road ahead. Let's dive into this week's recap for _Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid_.
* * *
## Calls to Action
* **PURPOSE:** Demand Congress expand healthcare access to millions in need:
* **LINK:** [Click Here To Add Your Voice & Signature](https://substack.com/redirect/fadcc8fc-c163-422a-8718-d4efe3611e3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (GOAL: 2500 signatures)

## Articles This Week
* **Monday:**[The Qasim Rashid Show Episode 144](https://substack.com/redirect/69799541-3777-4437-bf27-b8ac58febd2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): I welcome three major national voices on Veterans, Race, and Abortion, to discuss what the 2024 POTUS election
* **Tuesday:** [Why I Need You To Vote On Election Day](https://substack.com/redirect/c44736fb-d20a-4e58-8d54-36fe38a52541?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): A Trump win is not just the end of American democracy, it could prove fatal for my family
* **Wednesday:**[A Short Reflection Before A Response](https://substack.com/redirect/ee406d42-1283-40ee-b03e-2dd3fba89bbd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Two critical reminders before I share my detailed analysis of the 2024 election results
* **Thursday:** [What Went Wrong In The Democratic Party?](https://substack.com/redirect/b2e61759-e697-4028-a203-0cd0af4d02ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):*** The hard conversation we need to have if we have any hope of saving American democracy
* **Friday:**[The Post-Election Anti-Muslim Hate--From The Left](https://substack.com/redirect/b73177fa-e9be-4c2a-90b1-d6a0c8a20f96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Anti-Muslim and Islamophobic attacks from Democrats must stop, and we need to stand united

***My analysis of the 2024 election is already one of the top 3 most read articles of the year. It has also resulted in thousands of social media followers unfollowing my account, and hundreds of new Substack subscriptions. If you have not already, I hope you take a moment to read it for yourself and share with your networks.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..n2xqiv6CAmGjg3D2dVKJ8eexuOhTpE5pvZyUpqrSP44?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151421459)
## **Dad Joke of the Week**
Given the gravity and darkness of this week I didn't feel up to a dad joke, but then I realized just because things are heavy, doesn't mean we can't make light of them.
* * *

In 2022, it took a week to determine a winner. Now, we’re neck-and-neck — but thousands of lawful votes still need to be counted. **While we continue to monitor the returns, we must ensure that every lawful vote is counted and the will of AZ-06 voters is carried out, no matter how long it takes.** [**To do that, we’ll need your grassroots support. body:
Support Kari Lake!

Peter,

I've never been one to spread false hope, so I'm telling you I WILL BE Arizona's next U.S. Senator. **We've fought so hard for the past year, and I know we have the votes to win; we just need to make this ONE LAST PUSH.**

Here's what we need to do >>>

**We need to make sure every single LEGAL ballot is counted.**

**[That's why I'm emailing you today, Peter, this is the LAST THING WE NEED TO DO to WIN BIG here in Arizona.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0e2af93ab76045afad59d85891eb84aa&_e=_l5D2Sfn2vhcPO-92aWosFOjsTP8DDk_V1ms-K4ktw4icqivmYc_3cK8eB7aUCUywAbLJIFqKXj3gOvMMK4d9ViLpHsH8B4q5S9d_W2V_rRaSwd__Q6arLYuRDxndBGHrcmAPwixcq-FIvllGHLonPKnqo2gFDSKtHKQJs-w3VhnDP5ccMLbGSc971KD8jf7BaKvxxoSvubhL3pDv06hgJeF8SwV87jS_n4ElT2E4FGxkqYof_WGxxjZYMePfbX8E_3KhUb1H9qhtDd-VNcr7T9j7--52CnhXGHmv8yuQeWxn4tdMOSm7y0qnZDHBulEfEEz_Zd5-ec6RT4Cf_DlQlYh1i0xECYr_y2veIttPxAhaOXlsoM7K_mxQYG0_PfxlB5zACeoh63mfAZcd8QJIa-PZzsEylAWTshsLzz7Uiw%3D)**

**Volunteers across the state are making sure that our voices are heard and our ballots are counted, but many Republican ballots may be invalid.**

**LITERALLY EVERY SINGLE VOTE COUNTS, AND WE CAN'T AFFORD TO MISS A SINGLE ONE**

I'm asking for your immediate help. Inaction could cost us the entire election.

If we can get the word out, we can win this election.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: You have an important role to play right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| My friend —

When I first launched this campaign, I never would’ve dreamed that this many people would have my back.

It’s unbelievable, and I’ll always be grateful for everything we built together.

Here’s where we’re at in Arizona:

I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close.

Unfortunately, my opponent has a history of fanning the flames of conspiracy and disinformation. She’s already done a ton of damage to my state and to our country, but I’m not about to back down.

Maybe it’s the Marine in me, but I’ll always fight for our democracy. And you have a critical role in that fight, if you’re up for it.

I know you’ve already given so much, but I’ve got to ask you one more time, friend.

[If you’re looking for some way to have an impact and help us fight back against Kari Lake as we work to ensure the votes are counted, please make a split donation to my campaign and the Voter Protection Project.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/84842?t=6&akid=17987%2E878179%2Es2-8mF) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ruben Gallego and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/84843?t=7&akid=17987%2E878179%2Es2-8mF)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/84844?t=8&akid=17987%2E878179%2Es2-8mF)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/84845?t=9&akid=17987%2E878179%2Es2-8mF)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/84846?t=10&akid=17987%2E878179%2Es2-8mF)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/84842?t=11&akid=17987%2E878179%2Es2-8mF)
Thanks again, and Semper Fi.

Ruben
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=17987%2E878179%2Es2-8mF). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=17987%2E878179%2Es2-8mF).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=17987%2E878179%2Es2-8mF) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=17987%2E878179%2Es2-8mF). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=17987%2E878179%2Es2-8mF)
---

subject: There’s still uncalled races:

body:
We need to hold as many House seats as we can.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39284%2E3422442%2EpUv_7j)
Derek,
The fight isn’t over—there are still uncalled races that will determine control of the House.
One of them is in Ohio, where Representative Marcy Kaptur has defied the odds again in an R+3 district to hold onto this seat for Democrats.
**Control of Congress isn’t decided yet, and races like Marcy’s will be critical to stopping the influence of Donald Trump and his MAGA agenda.**
**[Marcy’s race is so close—less than half a percentage point apart from her opponent—and she’s raising money to make it through a recount. Will you split a $5 donation right now to get Marcy the resources she needs?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241109?refcode=em20241109-39284&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39284_3422442_pUv_7j&akid=39284%2E3422442%2EpUv_7j)**

Marcy’s district was won by Donald Trump in 2020, and Republicans have had their sights set on it ever since.
Now, with 100% of the votes counted, Marcy’s lead is just 1,193 votes, so she urgently needs resources to prepare for a recount.
We know we need representatives like Marcy fighting against the extremist agenda Donald Trump will put forward the second he reaches the Oval Office—and we know control of the House is on a razor thin margin.
**This is something you can do right now to fight back against Republican extremism and Donald Trump:[Split $5 or more to support Marcy in this recount effort and keep Republicans from flipping this House seat.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241109?refcode=em20241109-39284&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39284_3422442_pUv_7j&akid=39284%2E3422442%2EpUv_7j)**
Thanks,
Katie

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: 32,000 votes
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Our lead continues to shrink.
32,000 votes is all the difference between U.S. Senator Ruben Gallego and U.S. Senator Kari Lake, and there are still more than 600,000 votes to be counted in Arizona.
We are working around the clock until this race is called, and we need to be prepared to pursue every legal option at our disposal to ensure we defend this seat.
We’re going to need to fight through it, but we can win.
Please, Peter.
[**Make a donation to Ruben Gallego's campaign for U.S. Senate and help us defend Arizona.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov24-overtime.lIuiiG&refcode=em241109-1-160e&t=1&akid=3553%2E734936%2EpJVDnZ)

name: Michelle Tremillo & Brianna Brown, Texas Organizing Project
subject: Update From TOP PAC – Election Results
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, organizetexas
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=73702621-c39e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=73702621-c39e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b]
Dear Partner in our Movement,
Like many of you, we felt the weight of this presidential election and results in our state. Yet, our commitment to building real political power in Texas remains steadfast. Donald Trump’s latest win only strengthens our resolve to fight even harder for Black and Latino communities that fuel our state.
TOP was built on the belief that communities too often ignored by those in power deserve a voice and a seat at the table. Over the past 15 years, we’ve brought thousands of Texans into the movement, electing community champions and changing policies that impact everyday lives. And while we won’t have the full data from this election for a few weeks, early indicators show that the turnout we fueled in our communities remained strong. Though we’re devastated by this election outcome, we have no regrets about our efforts. Every dollar, every call, and every conversation you and others helped make possible went directly to building the power and voices of Black and Latino communities in Texas. We adapted, organized, and stayed in the fight right until the polls closed.
We are proud of our get-out-the-vote work based on the early voting data we have. The physical areas of voter turnout we oversee, we do well. We are a trusted messenger to our communities, understanding of what core issues matter to the well-being of Black and Latino Texans, and the conversations it takes to move people to vote, organize for change, and become more civically engaged.
Two years ago, we conducted in-depth studies of Black and Latino voters in Texas, and the findings of those still hold true today.
The biggest challenge remains scaling our work to reach even more of Texas. Engaging with a greater share of working Texans, particularly infrequent or new Black and Latino Texas voters, provides us with an opportunity to connect on everyday issues impacting them, and share how electing people-powered candidates and fighting for progressive policies can get us closer to a Texas that truly works for all ― no matter our age, race, faith, or gender.
Texas’ future will be built on conversations that matter — the ones we’re having in neighborhoods across our state’s urban centers. Now more than ever, as far-right efforts grow to spread misinformation and stoke fear, our work is essential. By engaging Black and Latino communities with a bold vision of shared safety and prosperity, we protect the progress we’ve made and win new ground.
We aim to build on this momentum. We're appreciative of your ongoing support that allows us to continue our vital work in critical areas, expanding our programs to make an even greater impact.
With gratitude,
Michelle Tremillo & Brianna Brown
Co-Executive Directors
Texas Organizing Project
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=73702621-c39e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=73702621-c39e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b]
Texas Organizing Project PAC
700 S Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States

name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: Election Breakdown: Why Trump Won
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Why Dems Lost | Survey Results: Progressives Speak Out
| Down-Ballot Success Stories | St. Louis: Building Power in the Heartland
| Chicago School Board Wins | Worker Rights Victories | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

DONALD TRUMP WON... AGAIN.
— How did we get here? —

“It should come as no great surprise that a Democratic Party which has
abandoned working class people would find that the working class has
abandoned them,” Sen. Bernie Sanders said the morning after the election.

“First it was the white working class, and now it’s Latino and Black
workers as well. While the Democratic Party leadership defends the status
quo, the American people are angry and want change. And they’re right.

“In the coming months, those of us concerned with grassroots democracy and
economic justice need to have some very serious discussions. Stay tuned,”
Bernie said.

It’s time for the Democratic Party to take stock and heed the warnings
that progressives and working class Americans have been raising for years.

Bernie founded Our Revolution to take on corporate power, elect
progressives, and transform the party — which is exactly what we’re going
to do in 2025 as we fight back against Trump every step of the way.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20450?t=1011&akid=7210%2E5885482%2EsM9cDR ]Chip in to the resistance here.

Our Revolution made more than 5,000,000 voter contacts into the
battleground states — door knocking, calls, texts, emails, and more —
flipping many folks who weren’t planning to vote for VP Harris — but it
wasn’t enough.

For weeks, Our Rev Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese spoke out to the
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20451?t=1012&akid=7210%2E5885482%2EsM9cDR ]AP and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20452?t=1013&akid=7210%2E5885482%2EsM9cDR ]NPR about the campaign’s dangerous strategy to court
Republicans at the expense of the base, as our surveys and voter
conversations revealed a worrying motivation gap for Harris.

“We were seeing clear evidence that buddying up with the Cheneys and
parroting conservative talking points rather than leaning into a strong,
populist economic message was turning off voters,” Joseph told the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20453?t=1014&akid=7210%2E5885482%2EsM9cDR ]NYT.

"We sounded the alarm,” he said to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20454?t=1015&akid=7210%2E5885482%2EsM9cDR ]Axios. “But the party wouldn’t
listen. They took the base for granted. People were voting their
self-interest, which is their pocketbooks. Trump had an economic story,
though flawed, while Harris’ narrative was vague.”

That’s why Our Revolution “aggressively worked to engage these voters on
issues like job creation, wages, housing and health care to close the
narrow margin,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20456?t=1016&akid=7210%2E5885482%2EsM9cDR ]Axios reported. In the end, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20455?t=1017&akid=7210%2E5885482%2EsM9cDR ]just 5% of Republicans
voted for Harris — less than voted for Joe Biden.

The Times asked Joseph who the Democratic Party would blame if they lost,
and we already knew the answer:

“As they always do, the establishment will blame progressives instead of
taking a serious look in the mirror and acknowledging their failure to lay
out a clear vision for addressing the very real economic pain folks are
feeling,” Joseph said.

Like clockwork, Bernie is being attacked by corporate Democrats for
pointing out the obvious. Joseph summarized it well when he told Axios:
“Voters want a leader who will take on corporate interests to improve
their standard of living. The struggle is real, whether you’re Gen Z or a
laid-off factory worker.”

Now, more than ever, we must transform the Party to be more democratic and
responsive to the working class in order to beat back Trump and rising
rightwing authoritarianism. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20450?t=1018&akid=7210%2E5885482%2EsM9cDR ]Help us build our network of organizers and
make sure we are prepared for 2025. Thank you.

★ ★ ★

In our post-election survey of more than 12,000 progressives, 85% told us
they’re feeling Angry, Sad, and Depressed. The rest told us they’re
Shocked or Confused.

While some ranked misogyny, racism, and xenophobia as factors in the
election, many pointed to the neglect of working people, the failure of
the Democratic Party, the late switch from Biden to Harris, and the
campaign’s misguided focus on Cheney Republicans and celebrities.

76% said they believe the Democratic Party has lost its way, and 91% said
they believe the Party has long neglected the multiracial working class.

★ ★ ★

You’re not alone. The election results are devastating. This is a setback,
but here’s the truth: we can’t let this defeat us.

We’re going to do everything in our power to hold Trump and his fossil
fuel cronies accountable — every step of the way. We're building a climate
movement that is 365 days strong, and together, we can make a difference.

Join us on Wednesday (Nov. 13) for a special virtual event Beyond the
Ballot with Jane Fonda, Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph
Geevarghese, and Sunrise Movement Executive Director Aru Shiney-Ajay.

Be in good company as we break down the results and strategize our next
steps to turn this moment into a powerful push for change. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20457?t=1019&akid=7210%2E5885482%2EsM9cDR ]It’s time to
turn our anger into action. Will you join us? RSVP HERE.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

BALLOT MEASURE WINS!

Ballot measures were a critical part of our work because we knew we wanted
to use this election to deliver real change for people’s lives and make
our communities more resilient in case of a Trump victory.

Here are just a couple of the winning propositions from Tuesday night:

In Denver, all public workers will finally have union rights they’ve been
denied for far too long thanks to passage of 2U. We were proud to
phonebank, text, and email voters to help fix Denver’s broken laws so
librarians, sanitation workers, and others could take their rightful seat
at the table to advocate for their safety, pay, and benefits.

In Massachusetts, Our Revolution worked to get out the vote for YES ON 3
which allows Uber and Lyft drivers to join a union in Massachusetts if
they want to!

This will now empower rideshare drivers with the option to form a union,
while maintaining flexibility and independence. AND, it will help drivers
negotiate for better pay, working conditions and job protections.

Missouri voted for a handful progressive ballot measures - including a
minimum wage increase and paid family leave. And Missouri joined 6 other
states in passing abortion rights!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

DOWN BALLOT CHAMPIONS

Silver linings this election come from crucial down ballot wins — which is
why Our Revolution is dedicated to building progressive power from the
bottom up!

Here are just a few highlights from our many down ballot victories:

Lateefah Simon will be the next member of our growing Progressive Caucus
in Congress — joining some of our top progressive leaders like Ilhan Omar,
Rashida Tlaib, and Pramila Jayapal, all vocal advocates for peace who won
their races by a wide margin.

Our Revolution has been in Lateefah’s corner since she announced her run
to replace retiring Congresswoman Barbara Lee in California’s 12th
District. And she’s a strong voice for healthcare, worker rights, and
housing.

“These are local issues, but the federal government has an opportunity to
bring back resources to the ground in our communities. The old party line
isn’t working anymore,” Lateefah told us. “We don’t need to be scared of
folks who are on the other side of our politics because we have been here
before.”

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is continuing to build progressive power in the heartland.
Over multiple election cycles in St. Louis, we worked with President Megan
Green of the Board of Alders to build a governing majority on the city
council. This Election Day, we grew our influence by organizing to elect
Marty Murray to the Missouri House and Alfred Montgomery as Sheriff of St.
Louis City.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution partnered with the Chicago Teachers Union to fight against
the Charter School billionaires and elect a slate of 4 new members to the
School Board. Our progressive voting bloc includes public education
champions Jennifer Custer, Ebony Deberry, Jitu Brown, and Yesenia Lopez.

“Project 2025-aligned billionaires lost big in Chicago. Despite all they
invested to block our union's vision for public schools, they won’t be
able to stop Chicago’s commitment to finally delivering for communities
who have been told to go without for generations,” CTU president Stacy
Davis Gates said.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution endorsed candidate Jackie Fielder handily won her race to
succeed San Francisco Supervisor Hillary Ronen, also an Our Revolution
ally. Our Revolution backed Jackie’s first run for state senate in 2020
which she lost to the establishment Dem.

★ ★ ★

NEW ENDORSEMENT

There’s a special election in Virginia on Nov. 16, and Our Revolution is
proud to endorse Ibraheem Samirah for VA State Senate District 32.

Big problems require bold solutions like the ones Ibraheem championed in
the Virginia House of Delegates — including state-level Medicare for All,
a Virginia Green New Deal, and quality, affordable housing.

The SD-32 primary is the national progressive movement’s opening salvo
against Trump. We need to win elections by sending in a new generation of
leaders who are unafraid to take the fight to MAGA extremists and will
offer a bold vision for the future.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

In our post-election survey of more than 12,000 progressives, one of the
top fears of progressives is that Trump will roll back climate protections
and double down on his pledge to drill baby drill.

We’re going to do everything in our power to hold Trump and his fossil
fuel cronies accountable — every step of the way. We’re building a climate
movement that is 365 days strong, and together, we can make a difference.

Join us on Wednesday (Nov. 13) for a special virtual event Beyond the
Ballot with Jane Fonda, Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph
Geevarghese, and Sunrise Movement Executive Director Aru Shiney-Ajay.

Be in good company as we break down the results and strategize our next
steps to turn this moment into a powerful push for change. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20457?t=1020&akid=7210%2E5885482%2EsM9cDR ]It’s time
to turn our anger into action. Will you join us? RSVP HERE.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Bernie founded Our Revolution to take on corporate power, elect progressives, and transform the party — which is exactly what we’re going to do in 2025 as we fight back against Trump every step of the way. [ ]Chip in to the resistance here. Our Revolution made more than 5,000,000 voter contacts into the battleground states — door knocking, calls, texts, emails, and more — flipping many folks who weren’t planning to vote for VP Harris — but it wasn’t enough. For weeks, Our Rev Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese spoke out to the [ ]AP and [ ]NPR about the campaign’s dangerous strategy to court Republicans at the expense of the base, as our surveys and voter conversations revealed a worrying motivation gap for Harris. “We were seeing clear evidence that buddying up with the Cheneys and parroting conservative talking points rather than leaning into a strong, populist economic message was turning off voters,” Joseph told the [ ]NYT. "We sounded the alarm,” he said to [ ]Axios. “But the party wouldn’t listen. They took the base for granted. People were voting their self-interest, which is their pocketbooks. Trump had an economic story, though flawed, while Harris’ narrative was vague.” That’s why Our Revolution “aggressively worked to engage these voters on issues like job creation, wages, housing and health care to close the narrow margin,” [ ]Axios reported. In the end, [ ]just 5% of Republicans voted for Harris — less than voted for Joe Biden. The Times asked Joseph who the Democratic Party would blame if they lost, and we already knew the answer: “As they always do, the establishment will blame progressives instead of taking a serious look in the mirror and acknowledging their failure to lay out a clear vision for addressing the very real economic pain folks are feeling,” Joseph said. Like clockwork, Bernie is being attacked by corporate Democrats for pointing out the obvious. Joseph summarized it well when he told Axios: “Voters want a leader who will take on corporate interests to improve their standard of living. The struggle is real, whether you’re Gen Z or a laid-off factory worker.” Now, more than ever, we must transform the Party to be more democratic and responsive to the working class in order to beat back Trump and rising rightwing authoritarianism. [ ]Help us build our network of organizers and make sure we are prepared for 2025. Thank you. ★ ★ ★ In our post-election survey of more than 12,000 progressives, 85% told us they’re feeling Angry, Sad, and Depressed. The rest told us they’re Shocked or Confused. While some ranked misogyny, racism, and xenophobia as factors in the election, many pointed to the neglect of working people, the failure of the Democratic Party, the late switch from Biden to Harris, and the campaign’s misguided focus on Cheney Republicans and celebrities. 76% said they believe the Democratic Party has lost its way, and 91% said they believe the Party has long neglected the multiracial working class. ★ ★ ★ You’re not alone. The election results are devastating. This is a setback, but here’s the truth: we can’t let this defeat us. We’re going to do everything in our power to hold Trump and his fossil fuel cronies accountable — every step of the way. We're building a climate movement that is 365 days strong, and together, we can make a difference. Join us on Wednesday (Nov. 13) for a special virtual event Beyond the Ballot with Jane Fonda, Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese, and Sunrise Movement Executive Director Aru Shiney-Ajay. Be in good company as we break down the results and strategize our next steps to turn this moment into a powerful push for change. [ ]It’s time to turn our anger into action. Will you join us? RSVP HERE. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ BALLOT MEASURE WINS! Ballot measures were a critical part of our work because we knew we wanted to use this election to deliver real change for people’s lives and make our communities more resilient in case of a Trump victory. Here are just a couple of the winning propositions from Tuesday night: In Denver, all public workers will finally have union rights they’ve been denied for far too long thanks to passage of 2U. We were proud to phonebank, text, and email voters to help fix Denver’s broken laws so librarians, sanitation workers, and others could take their rightful seat at the table to advocate for their safety, pay, and benefits. In Massachusetts, Our Revolution worked to get out the vote for YES ON 3 which allows Uber and Lyft drivers to join a union in Massachusetts if they want to! This will now empower rideshare drivers with the option to form a union, while maintaining flexibility and independence. AND, it will help drivers negotiate for better pay, working conditions and job protections. Missouri voted for a handful progressive ballot measures - including a minimum wage increase and paid family leave. And Missouri joined 6 other states in passing abortion rights! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ DOWN BALLOT CHAMPIONS Silver linings this election come from crucial down ballot wins — which is why Our Revolution is dedicated to building progressive power from the bottom up! Here are just a few highlights from our many down ballot victories: Lateefah Simon will be the next member of our growing Progressive Caucus in Congress — joining some of our top progressive leaders like Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and Pramila Jayapal, all vocal advocates for peace who won their races by a wide margin. Our Revolution has been in Lateefah’s corner since she announced her run to replace retiring Congresswoman Barbara Lee in California’s 12th District. And she’s a strong voice for healthcare, worker rights, and housing. “These are local issues, but the federal government has an opportunity to bring back resources to the ground in our communities. The old party line isn’t working anymore,” Lateefah told us. “We don’t need to be scared of folks who are on the other side of our politics because we have been here before.” ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is continuing to build progressive power in the heartland. Over multiple election cycles in St. Louis, we worked with President Megan Green of the Board of Alders to build a governing majority on the city council. This Election Day, we grew our influence by organizing to elect Marty Murray to the Missouri House and Alfred Montgomery as Sheriff of St. Louis City. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution partnered with the Chicago Teachers Union to fight against the Charter School billionaires and elect a slate of 4 new members to the School Board. Our progressive voting bloc includes public education champions Jennifer Custer, Ebony Deberry, Jitu Brown, and Yesenia Lopez. “Project 2025-aligned billionaires lost big in Chicago. Despite all they invested to block our union's vision for public schools, they won’t be able to stop Chicago’s commitment to finally delivering for communities who have been told to go without for generations,” CTU president Stacy Davis Gates said. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution endorsed candidate Jackie Fielder handily won her race to succeed San Francisco Supervisor Hillary Ronen, also an Our Revolution ally. Our Revolution backed Jackie’s first run for state senate in 2020 which she lost to the establishment Dem. ★ ★ ★ NEW ENDORSEMENT There’s a special election in Virginia on Nov. 16, and Our Revolution is proud to endorse Ibraheem Samirah for VA State Senate District 32. Big problems require bold solutions like the ones Ibraheem championed in the Virginia House of Delegates — including state-level Medicare for All, a Virginia Green New Deal, and quality, affordable housing. The SD-32 primary is the national progressive movement’s opening salvo against Trump. We need to win elections by sending in a new generation of leaders who are unafraid to take the fight to MAGA extremists and will offer a bold vision for the future. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ In our post-election survey of more than 12,000 progressives, one of the top fears of progressives is that Trump will roll back climate protections and double down on his pledge to drill baby drill. We’re going to do everything in our power to hold Trump and his fossil fuel cronies accountable — every step of the way. We’re building a climate movement that is 365 days strong, and together, we can make a difference. Join us on Wednesday (Nov. 13) for a special virtual event Beyond the Ballot with Jane Fonda, Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese, and Sunrise Movement Executive Director Aru Shiney-Ajay. Be in good company as we break down the results and strategize our next steps to turn this moment into a powerful push for change. [ ]It’s time to turn our anger into action. Will you join us? RSVP HERE. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Reader,**It wasn 't long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. ****In the short time that 's passed, the Sun's mission has become more urgent than ever.****

**It 's been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted.

More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we're left with precious few to hold our country's most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity.

The Sun is brave and relentless.Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account.

It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people.

The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833.

The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we're up against some of the world's largest media conglomerates. To win, we need you to join us. Every single person counts.
---

name: Bob Casey
subject: I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Bob Casey needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from him, and [**rush a split donation between Bob's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-casey.xo6YZe&refcode=em241021-1-30&t=1&akid=5924%2E6688874%2ExGC4k1)
---
Hello, friend.
This Senate race is still too close to call, and my team needs your help to ensure every Pennsylvanian has their voice heard.
**[DONATE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-casey.xo6YZe&refcode=em241021-1-30&t=2&akid=5924%2E6688874%2ExGC4k1)**
It has been made clear there are more than 100,000 votes still to be counted. Pennsylvania is where our democratic process was born. We must allow that process to play out and ensure that every vote that is eligible to be counted will be counted. That is what Pennsylvania deserves.
My team is working hard to make sure every ballot is properly counted, but we’ll need the resources to make sure we can keep up this work.
[**So please, split $3 or more between Mark Kelly and myself today to ensure we have what it takes to count every last vote.](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-casey.xo6YZe&refcode=em241021-1-30&t=3&akid=5924%2E6688874%2ExGC4k1)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-casey.pHiyW-&refcode=em241021-1-30&t=22&akid=5924%2E6688874%2ExGC4k1)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-casey.ZIU5Vu&refcode=em241021-1-30&t=23&akid=5924%2E6688874%2ExGC4k1)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-casey.iLvtYw&refcode=em241021-1-30&t=24&akid=5924%2E6688874%2ExGC4k1)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-casey.4hrcw2&refcode=em241021-1-30&t=25&akid=5924%2E6688874%2ExGC4k1)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-casey.5m8FjS&refcode=em241021-1-30&t=26&akid=5924%2E6688874%2ExGC4k1)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-casey.ZACjpL&refcode=em241021-1-30&t=27&akid=5924%2E6688874%2ExGC4k1)**
---
****
I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard, whether on the floor of the Senate or in a free and fair election.
Now, let’s finish the job.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=5924%2E6688874%2ExGC4k1).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Will you support the ACLU today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
In the coming years we are going to have to fight to protect our basic
rights, from reproductive freedom to the freedom to protest and openly
dissent.

We cannot give in to despair, as much as these election results may hurt
or depress us. When I think about the future, I think about my three
children and the country they are inheriting.

Giving up on our work for a brighter future would cede our country to
Trump and his cruelty, which is why I am reaching out to today. Our future
is worth fighting for.

The ACLU needs our support as they gear up for legal challenges in the
days, months, and years ahead. They filed 434 legal challenges against the
2016-2020 Trump administration and obstructed some of his worst policies
like the Muslim ban.^1

So today, I am asking: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241109-aclu.BSIiRR&refcode=ema20241109-239895&t=1001&akid=239895%2E444211%2ETfa7y6 ]Will you turn your anger into action and make a
contribution to the ACLU to ensure they have the resources to fight back
against Trump on day #1?

I’m grateful to be in this fight with you,

Beto

^1
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/63846?t=1002&akid=239895%2E444211%2ETfa7y6 ]aclu.org/news/civil-liberties/the-aclu-is-fighting-back-against-trump

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=239895%2E444211%2ETfa7y6

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
clean_body: In the coming years we are going to have to fight to protect our basic rights, from reproductive freedom to the freedom to protest and openly dissent. We cannot give in to despair, as much as these election results may hurt or depress us. When I think about the future, I think about my three children and the country they are inheriting. Giving up on our work for a brighter future would cede our country to Trump and his cruelty, which is why I am reaching out to today. Our future is worth fighting for. The ACLU needs our support as they gear up for legal challenges in the days, months, and years ahead. They filed 434 legal challenges against the 2016-2020 Trump administration and obstructed some of his worst policies like the Muslim ban.^1 So today, I am asking: [ ]Will you turn your anger into action and make a contribution to the ACLU to ensure they have the resources to fight back against Trump on day #1? I’m grateful to be in this fight with you, Beto ^1 [ ]aclu.org/news/civil-liberties/the-aclu-is-fighting-back-against-trump

| We know that political emails have a reputation for being hyperbolic or “over the top”. **That’s why this election, we’ve emailed you with one primary message:** That control of the U.S. House will come down to California and we need grassroots support to organize in the critical seats. Now, with votes still being counted, that message has been proven true beyond any doubt. Control of the U.S. House is still up for grabs. And every hope of a Democratic takeover of the chamber depends on us flipping the outstanding California tossup seats. **[We know you are probably tired, frustrated, and disheartened. Many of you have already generously donated this election. We have come this far because of *YOU*. And we can’t quit now, not with the possibility of winning a powerful check on Donald Trump. clean_body: update for you — | = | We know that political emails have a reputation for being hyperbolic or “over the top”. That’s why this election, we’ve emailed you with one primary message: That control of the U.S. House will come down to California and we need grassroots support to organize in the critical seats. Now, with votes still being counted, that message has been proven true beyond any doubt. Control of the U.S. House is still up for grabs. And every hope of a Democratic takeover of the chamber depends on us flipping the outstanding California tossup seats. = = = = = = We’ve been honest this whole election season, and we will be honest now: It is not a glide path to win back the U.S. House at this stage. A lot of things have to go right in these uncalled California races. But, we have a critical window where we can ensure that every vote is counted. Many ballots will need to be “cured” (have errors corrected) in order to be counted. We are keeping our operations fully running to help reach out to voters at risk for their votes not counting. = = Thank you, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. If this email was forwarded to you, We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to . | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Fellow American,

The first $41,300/$15,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to the DNC. The next $3,300/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Harris for President’s Recount Account. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting **info@kamalaharris.com**.The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
clean_body: We have to do what we can to win those critical races, and defend the outcome of the ones we have won in court. | | | Right now, there are a number of very important races that are yet to be called or have been won by small margins and will be subject to legal challenges.We have to do what we can to win those critical races, and defend the outcome of the ones we have won in court. . If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you and we'll be in touch, Kamala HQ | | | |

name: Daniele Monroe-Moreno
subject: BREAKING: Jacky Rosen WINS!

## AP has officially called our Senate race for Jacky Rosen.
We could not do this without all of your support.
Every dollar donated, door knocked, phone called, social media posted, and more moved the needle to make this win possible.
**_Thanks to your support, Nevada will have Democratic champions fighting for us in Washington in the House and the Senate. We also held our majorities in the state legislature!_**
Make no mistake, we are clear eyed and battle ready for what lies ahead with Donald Trump as President and Joe Lombardo as Governor. There are no off-cycles in the fight for Nevada’s working families and __in two years, Joe Lombardo is up for reelection.__
**Here’s the reality: our fundraising is going to hit a slump over the next several months, weeks, even days.**
If we want to build lasting infrastructure that can support Democratic victories at every level of office, we need early and sustained resources today, not a few months out from Election Day. **_The best investment you can make right now towards the MAGA Resistance effort in Nevada is a recurring donation to the state party >>_**
[**_So please, , chip in to celebrate our 2024 victories and make a monthly recurring donation to help us prepare for the fight ahead._**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTJlt19Y7PjKZrieRTJx1PBaZ4VzY_KRrJ4JX-x_nBitNiwbN-hsXGZeysmOFM6oGigqmyDhK8oI138rcgX-CGQxnKe3Df7ow34k266_wCD9JTBd37TjuVgHtJSqppWywKAwS9EQv1QjsHQWF65U3WAYR0RL4MDalRqQ7fg0q5OQjn8hRRhgRM02eK110czbwPi_Tub5yMY4s6Em5ezwQrJSx0A_iG-Wzjfl1kZEJn9x_ycjmVq0UoDBBEQ8TkPzNQPq7gVCeYqdJ5sI3LQ18ywkOl2CVkCUEf4RNj9UeJVduWKnTPD33yhxnPol3Nku54Oq2hRQgNNP-FdaOhe9VDAb_v7TM0uKgV4dur7je64DqQlDSj0zzvokuSScT-fzG6/4bb/YEFRcaxdS_Geukz-mUCH7w/h1/h001.QoDaPu0CIxGgQsLtCfb7Hqe0O5Eb9ECdubxKeLYzINA)

body:
First Pennsylvanians voted. Now? We urgently need your help.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4817%2E552475%2EUCQaGq)
**FIRST:** Pennsylvanians cast their vote in Pennsylvania’s Senate race.
**THEN:** The polls closed, but this race isn’t over. The count in PA continues with tens of thousands of votes left.
**NOW:** **We urgently need your help while votes are being counted!**
[**Please, Peter, rush $5 or as much as you can today to give us the resources to keep our operation running.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241109-3?refcode=em20241109-3&refcode2=4817_552475_UCQaGq&akid=4817%2E552475%2EUCQaGq)

[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBj~gLWJ4/aExpazlIZ3N3N3FCS2Fnd3U3cTRIWVp2NDRMRW5sL2NXNnBXQTY4RjMrWER5c3ZROFdPcGxwdXpLbGsvTFRMcU9jOERCTHk5S2M4SlR1cWxPUTc1bHhwMkJ2MWVEVHdwS2VxQ3VPblBaT0E9S0/T2ZTZHNYd2xtaWJZWVIxbWcrZkV3OEZKSmNjQ0dCYlZhSmZmVWlyeDhmdXk4YVFia0lxNFVtdGp4ZTY0YTBJZGkzSnpCWFhOeWhrbFRqT2J1eFBXRUxDRjB2N2RDNk5GS0)

[**Help Honor Marine Corps Heroes**](https://links.e.uso.)

| [SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Dear USO Supporter,
As a proud U.S. Marine Corps veteran, I know from firsthand experience that many of our service members are currently facing long deployments far from home. Deployed Marines often work exhausting days in dangerous conditions, missing countless special moments with family.
That's why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Please join me in honoring the bravery of the Marine Corps by signing the official USO Marine Corps birthday card.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/7P90hV03-RMY/aExpazlIZ3N3N3FCS2Fnd3U3cTRIWVp2NDRMRW5sL2NXNnBXQTY4RjMrWER5c3ZROFdPcGxwdXpLbGsvTFRMcU9jOERCTHk5S2M4SlR1cWxPUTc1bHhwMkJ2MWVEVHdwS2VxQ3VPblBaT0E9S0/T2ZTZHNYd2xtaWJZWVIxbWcrZkV3OEZKSmNjQ0dCYlZhSmZmVWlyeDhmdXk4YVFia0lxNFVtdGp4ZTY0YTBJZGkzSnpCWFhOeWhrbFRqT2J1eFBXRUxDRjB2N2RDNk5GS0)
---
In 2010, I was leading a foot patrol in Afghanistan when an improvised explosive device detonated in my path, **resulting in the loss of my right leg**. My journey to recovery was challenging, involving treatment at Bethesda Naval Hospital and physical therapy at Balboa Naval Hospital.
**Through it all, I found the strength to keep pushing forward thanks to loved ones and Marine Corps supporters who encouraged me every step of the way.** Their support made all the difference -- and I've since went on to compete in the hopes of making the Paralympics, summited Mount Vinson in Antarctica and completed the Marine Corps Marathon. These experiences taught me the power of community support and how much it means to hear from folks back home.
That's why I'm asking for your support.
**The USO is looking to collect 50,000 signatures by midnight tomorrow to honor and celebrate the Marines Corps. I can tell you firsthand that it means so much to know that folks back home recognize the sacrifice and resilience that comes with being a Marine.**
**[Please join me in celebrating the Marine Corps and showing our heroes in uniform our unwavering support, especially in their toughest moments.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/7P90hV03-RMY/aExpazlIZ3N3N3FCS2Fnd3U3cTRIWVp2NDRMRW5sL2NXNnBXQTY4RjMrWER5c3ZROFdPcGxwdXpLbGsvTFRMcU9jOERCTHk5S2M4SlR1cWxPUTc1bHhwMkJ2MWVEVHdwS2VxQ3VPblBaT0E9S0/T2ZTZHNYd2xtaWJZWVIxbWcrZkV3OEZKSmNjQ0dCYlZhSmZmVWlyeDhmdXk4YVFia0lxNFVtdGp4ZTY0YTBJZGkzSnpCWFhOeWhrbFRqT2J1eFBXRUxDRjB2N2RDNk5GS0)
---
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for supporting our military.
Sincerely,
Cpl. Kionte Storey
Retired USMC Veteran
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBj~gLWJ4/aExpazlIZ3N3N3FCS2Fnd3U3cTRIWVp2NDRMRW5sL2NXNnBXQTY4RjMrWER5c3ZROFdPcGxwdXpLbGsvTFRMcU9jOERCTHk5S2M4SlR1cWxPUTc1bHhwMkJ2MWVEVHdwS2VxQ3VPblBaT0E9S0/T2ZTZHNYd2xtaWJZWVIxbWcrZkV3OEZKSmNjQ0dCYlZhSmZmVWlyeDhmdXk4YVFia0lxNFVtdGp4ZTY0YTBJZGkzSnpCWFhOeWhrbFRqT2J1eFBXRUxDRjB2N2RDNk5GS0)

Deployed Marines often work exhausting days in dangerous conditions, missing countless special moments with family. That's why I'm reaching out to you today. In 2010, I was leading a foot patrol in Afghanistan when an improvised explosive device detonated in my path, resulting in the loss of my right leg. My journey to recovery was challenging, involving treatment at Bethesda Naval Hospital and physical therapy at Balboa Naval Hospital. Through it all, I found the strength to keep pushing forward thanks to loved ones and Marine Corps supporters who encouraged me every step of the way. Their support made all the difference -- and I've since went on to compete in the hopes of making the Paralympics, summited Mount Vinson in Antarctica and completed the Marine Corps Marathon. The USO is looking to collect 50,000 signatures by midnight tomorrow to honor and celebrate the Marines Corps. I can tell you firsthand that it means so much to know that folks back home recognize the sacrifice and resilience that comes with being a Marine. name: Team Casey
subject: An update on Pennsylvania’s Senate race
body:

Derek, Here’s what we know: Pennsylvania’s Senate race is not over, and we still have work to do. | | I know this election has been the fight of our lifetimes. But the fate of our Democracy depends on what we do at this moments. And I am urging you to stay focused on the fight to win the House. [**I told you**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96856555/511423686/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241109_em_fr_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjEwNzhmOC1kMjllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8EQeWrPmk1knW_5xGcy94VwMwzPMyWAfJQLv0s_iB5Q=) many House races in swing districts are still too close to call. They need our help ASAP. [**Now I’m telling you a Democratic House Majority with Hakeem Jeffries as Speaker of the House is our one and final chance to ensure a Democratic check on Trump’s unfettered power.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96856558/511423689/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241109_em_fr_b1_np4c_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjEwNzhmOC1kMjllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8EQeWrPmk1knW_5xGcy94VwMwzPMyWAfJQLv0s_iB5Q=) [**_I know I have asked a lot of you in this election, and I couldn’t be more grateful for your support. But I just checked ActBlue, and we’re still 2,181 gifts behind our goal to rush emergency resources to states that are still counting votes and other Democrats who need it. I hate to ask this of you, but I know we would regret it for our lifetimes if we didn't do everything in our power to help replenish Democratic funds and help them finish these fights out strong. Hi Peter, We are reaching out with an urgent request. Election Day may be behind us, but votes are still being counted in Pennsylvania – and Senator Bob Casey’s race is still too close to call. There are tens of thousands of votes still to be counted across the Commonwealth, and multiple news outlets have not called the Senate race. **While votes are still being counted, we need your help to ensure that Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard.** We’re counting on you to help us protect the already-cast votes of Pennsylvania voters whose ballots have been rejected for a curable defect by their County Board of Elections. [_**Will you sign up for a shift this weekend to help us cure ballots in-person or virtually?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96856805/511424744/-190116893?tag_ids=25416&utm_source=padems&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20241109_ENG_CaseyVol_0_3MO_TeamCasey_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzFkMzM5YS1kNTllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1D3I96a2WMD489CuBXgOlFIKPV9sgASP_6IEer4rPKA=&emci=954d9f91-d59e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=a71d339a-d59e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=25616296) | [VOLUNTEER TO CURE BALLOTS >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96856806/511424745/-190116893?tag_ids=25416&utm_source=padems&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20241109_ENG_CaseyVol_0_3MO_TeamCasey_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzFkMzM5YS1kNTllLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1D3I96a2WMD489CuBXgOlFIKPV9sgASP_6IEer4rPKA=&emci=954d9f91-d59e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=a71d339a-d59e-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=25616296)

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Real change is coming
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
We’re taking the fight to the heart of the problem in Washington, D.C.

|
---
| | | | [**We’re on the verge of real change in Washington, D.C.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overhaul_11_9_24_1&n=1)

[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overhaul_11_9_24_1&n=4)
---

---
Kennedy Ready to Make America Healthy Again
[THE RECKONING HAS BEGUN](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overhaul_11_9_24_1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is ready to lead a transformative mission to overhaul America’s public health system. With a vision for bold reform, he’s set to dismantle corruption, restore true science, and address our nation’s chronic disease epidemic head-on.
Here’s the plan:
**1\. End Corruption in Health Agencies**
For too long, Big Pharma and food industry giants have controlled the agencies meant to protect us. We need to sever these corrupt ties and bring the agencies back to the people.
**2\. Bring Back Real Science**
Public health decisions must be grounded in real, unbiased science—not corporate agendas. Agency standards must be rooted in facts, accountability, and true data.
**3\. Reverse America’s Chronic Disease Epidemic**
Chronic illness has soared, especially among our kids. This is a fight to give every child a healthy future.
We’re on the verge of real change, and we’re taking the fight to the heart of the problem in Washington, D.C.
[**And... as you likely know, reaching this pivotal moment took immense sacrifice and unyielding resolve—and it came at a cost.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overhaul_11_9_24_1&n=6)
Despite relentless obstacles and underhanded efforts to stall our progress, we pushed forward, taking on a heavy financial burden to ensure RFK Jr.’s safety when Secret Service protection was unjustly denied. _Now, we need your help to close this debt_.
**Your contribution today** will help retire this debt and give RFK Jr. the peace of mind to focus fully on transforming America’s health system. Please give as generously as you can to help us cover this cost and secure the foundation for lasting change.
[Yes, I want to help with debt reduction](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overhaul_11_9_24_1&n=7)
With your support, we’ll make a healthier, brighter America a reality. Thank you for standing with Bobby.
Team Kennedy
[Mahanow.org](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=y_k5EP27yTOsxSw3tqBFMOXUy1MXBZnG7PhKqYOpRo0&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overhaul_11_9_24_1&n=8)
