name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Exciting Guest Speaker Coming To Sheridan.Church In 2025
body:
Over the last year at Sheridan.Church, we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. In
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9377.1.096a1700ea0ccd53d561aafc4e8539ee) |
---
Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9378.1.28f821efeb9e87f80f70e431f90d3250), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9379.1.684db971ea9c0a69af58d2d9ade654a2), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9380.1.97660735311fdd053ade293139c8adc9)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9381.1.22ab52ffb2a68631d61d91850324b0f5), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9382.1.9c6dd48f0451531799ed2759d4f1f4df), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9383.1.4713cbc47520aa9d6df474efdc62982d), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9384.1.9ca514c216d24241f9e961482509856d), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9385.1.8aafefd32adb74efddabd707fe42850c), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9386.1.b91cb9ca499b367c9b99fafc676bf1a5), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9387.1.390bc2ab00983488549eedcbd10dfb0b), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9388.1.94e69d5ce4ce979f6b7b39b3ac508744), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others... But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about! Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9389.1.e15187124ff549073237531bd800e424) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT. Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great! Be sure to make plans to join us tomorrow at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9390.1.799e1242c6e8c96c3757e9cc46abf5fc) for our 10am CT worship service as we continue our **verse-by-verse** series over the [Book of Acts.](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9391.1.69aca49b7435888b5f4837e7d5c16c74)
**Acts Pt. 58 - I'm So Happy!** Watch online: [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9392.1.4a11b42e53621f6cdd67242c6730154c) **Other Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church** -Sunday, November 24 @10am: **73rd Anniversary Service** -Sunday, December 22 @10am: **Sheridan Christmas Concert** -Wednesday, February 26 @7pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** Please consider partnering with the mission of [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9393.1.0322a2b6c9fcb2c920acb4f7f79a9228): [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9394.1.4ca97d0c90b32adc14f5f7f32db4e30f) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9395.1.e9526cae6c9a9273fa0c0a03898352d1)
---
---
## God's Plan For President Trump + America
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9396.1.a53e163c86851400d5969986fec3dc22)
---
Recently, I was on **Real America's Voice** with **David Broady** and he asked me an interesting question... ["What is God's plan for Donald Trump?"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9397.1.93948dc32e8c5f1c9b9a68e0d7d04c61) Check out my thoughts on that question here: [https://youtu.be/hoXHqBmSauc](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9398.1.74c729637587d28d9e771bd8f78f09bc) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ WATCH: God's Plan For President Trump ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9399.1.2f250b2202cd3f891d67ee32862917be)
---
---
## Eric Trump + Alina Habba
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9400.1.07990fe8ddb35e9e8e5f84282755b8e6)
---
It was a _BLAST_ with [Eric Trump + Alina Habba](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9401.1.601e17136553f4d49e8351dc3d5ce036) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9402.1.7cb0107db82af3733579d5887e4fd416) in Tulsa, OK! We talked about EVERYTHING... literally EVERYTHING. ICYMI: watch it here - [https://youtube.com/live/7cZneWLgSe8?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9403.1.62836a4fd94cd7300d611dd34a3dbe99) You will enjoy it! **God Bless America** Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Watch: Eric Trump + Alina Habba ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9404.1.7ce6f630aa8411647ed607b85c5389c8)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9405.1.358bc0f6a329ecea5cfe9585cbe0214b)
---
I was a BLAST with [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9406.1.0ed69ade04f1fd1f7b5ae09407d5e461) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9407.1.90231f4c7a54dfef3a02eb39f112af02) in Tulsa, OK! We discussed everything from _assassination attempts_ on **President Trump** to different _conspiracy theories_ and everything in-between. You can watch last night's event with [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9408.1.ab130fe9ec48d4c1dd901d6e567e115e) here: [https://youtube.com/live/wTh5UGzIQsY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9409.1.9310fd00a5c49f9eb37de0841634c77d)
---
| | [ WATCH: Donald Trump Jr @Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17228629.9410.1.891f5285b56f2ffea442b0e25b88685d)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19009/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/dddcb8768a1b8d2f7af2eead5445af2db9e54b9f). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19009/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/dddcb8768a1b8d2f7af2eead5445af2db9e54b9f?message_id=ImViYjE5ZmQwLTgxMmUtMDEzZC0wNGVhLTE2NmZiODk3YmVkMkBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).

| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19009/6374453/db31bf4de460d0c98e61d7c3c9c3f294444b5570/dddcb8768a1b8d2f7af2eead5445af2db9e54b9f)
---
---
|
---
**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!**
---
With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19009/6374453/db31bf4de460d0c98e61d7c3c9c3f294444b5570/dddcb8768a1b8d2f7af2eead5445af2db9e54b9f), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! name: 4Pats
subject: CIA Warns: Deadly Strike Coming To America's Power Grid
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19011/6374453/1f7a3e81769c417197341da4e770cefb14d2ab89/fc04397ad3c63c7a1673b178c26f99df505576e2)
---
| | _November 9th, 2024_
---
|
---
| | **FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS:** **DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID** _**Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?**_
---
---
**Former CIA Director stunned listeners with a stern warning...** An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._ In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19011/6374453/840409f2279a8f95bae6f5dfed40379f9af16491/fc04397ad3c63c7a1673b178c26f99df505576e2). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **FOX & FRIENDS FEATURES BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19011/6374453/840409f2279a8f95bae6f5dfed40379f9af16491/fc04397ad3c63c7a1673b178c26f99df505576e2)
---
Fox & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators.**_ Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19011/6374453/840409f2279a8f95bae6f5dfed40379f9af16491/fc04397ad3c63c7a1673b178c26f99df505576e2) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19011/6374453/840409f2279a8f95bae6f5dfed40379f9af16491/fc04397ad3c63c7a1673b178c26f99df505576e2)
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19011/6374453/840409f2279a8f95bae6f5dfed40379f9af16491/fc04397ad3c63c7a1673b178c26f99df505576e2)
---
**YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2000X** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2000X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,000 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight. Plug in the solar panel. Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun! Amazingly, it takes just 6 hours to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. **PLEASE DON'T WAIT
TO LEARN MORE** But don't delay. We can't keep these generators in stock. Once we run out, it could be a while before we can get you one. [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19011/6374453/840409f2279a8f95bae6f5dfed40379f9af16491/fc04397ad3c63c7a1673b178c26f99df505576e2) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **CUSTOMERS ARE RAVING ABOUT THEIR SOLAR GENERATOR**
---
---
**Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19011/6374453/840409f2279a8f95bae6f5dfed40379f9af16491/fc04397ad3c63c7a1673b178c26f99df505576e2)

name: Kamala Harris
subject: We can't ever give up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
We must continue to fight to ensure that every vote is counted and every voice is heard and that we win every race we can.
| | | It is okay to feel sad and disappointed about the outcome of the presidential election. But, as I said on Wednesday, _we can't ever give up._

There are critical Senate races where ballots are still being counted. These Senate seats will determine our ability to put a check on Donald Trump's power.

[**We must continue to fight to ensure that every vote is counted and every voice is heard and that we win every race we can. That is why I am asking you to support the Harris Fight Fund program and the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee today.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/20671?amount=5&t=3&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20241109-KamalaHarris-HarrisFinalFight-Pros&refcode2=khp_em_20241109_b1_kdh_dscc_fl&refcode=DPE-FM-20241109-KamalaHarris-HarrisFinalFight-Pros&refcode2=khp_em_20241109_b1_kdh_dscc_fl&akid=18887%2E9716520%2EjVUaLO)

name: Byron Donalds
subject: Cool as a cucumber
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
Here’s what MSNBC just said about this election
| | | | [](https://link.support.byrondonalds._HVg/s2l207e37d5)
---
[](https://link.support.byrondonalds._HVg/sftcf0c1cd0)
|
---
I’m as cool as a cucumber.
You have to be when the Fake News is calling our MAGA Movement “evil” on national television.
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds.
I got real tired of seeing them lying about us with no repercussions whatsoever.
So I thought to myself, why not just go on their shows, dismantle their lies, and set the record straight _**one-on-one**_?
That’s exactly what I did. This whole election, I’ve been one of the few MAGA Congressman to destroy their narratives LIVE - all thanks to folks like yourself.
But I just went on MSNBC & what I heard made me realize we still have _**[so much work to do.](https://link.support.byrondonalds._HVg/sblceea643c)**_
They interrogated me, demanding to know if I thought that President-Elect Trump was too dangerous to be in the White House, then even hinted that he wasn’t qualified to be President.
**I kept my cool and picked their phony narratives apart piece by piece like clockwork.**
Problem is, they’ll keep trying to push this nonsense every single day until he’s inaugurated, and if no one challenges them, their lies could seriously get out of hand.
I know the election is over, but we have to remain on the offensive all the way through the inauguration, and it’s your generous support that keeps me in the fight.
_**[So please, can you chip into Fake News Offensive Fund today?](https://link.support.byrondonalds._HVg/sch22c8f1b4)**_ _**[]()**__**[]()**_

|
---
[CHIP IN HERE](https://link.support.byrondonalds._HVg/s0i8a570846)
|
---
Thank you for your unwavering support,
Byron Donalds

Right now, hundreds of volunteers and staff members, including myself, are out in communities across Arizona, working to ensure that votes are counted and ballots are cured. It might be a senior whose preexisting condition made it a little harder to sign their name this time around. Or it might be a first-time voter who wasn’t quite sure which box to sign. No matter what, every Arizonan deserves to have their voice heard at the ballot box. That’s why I’m driving out to places like Sierra Vista and Gilbert to make sure we finish this job. **[Can I personally count on your support? Your grassroots contribution will help make sure our team has the resources we need to get every vote counted.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96857050/511425770/635150459?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZiMzYwZWUtZGE5ZS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r4b0bmHQixlcwe4XUQ1AA8xooqIjzrf7zuNXk_ijQpI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96857052/511425772/635150459?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZiMzYwZWUtZGE5ZS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r4b0bmHQixlcwe4XUQ1AA8xooqIjzrf7zuNXk_ijQpI=)

clean_body: | = Right now, hundreds of volunteers and staff members, including myself, are out in communities across Arizona, working to ensure that votes are counted and ballots are cured. It might be a senior whose preexisting condition made it a little harder to sign their name this time around. Or it might be a first-time voter who wasn’t quite sure which box to sign. No matter what, every Arizonan deserves to have their voice heard at the ballot box. That’s why I’m driving out to places like Sierra Vista and Gilbert to make sure we finish this job. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your help and for supporting our team this cycle. # FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Reader,**It wasn 't long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. ****In the short time that 's passed, the Sun's mission has become more urgent than ever.****

**It 's been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted.

More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we're left with precious few to hold our country's most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity.

The Sun is brave and relentless.Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account.

It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people.

The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833.

The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we're up against some of the world's largest media conglomerates. To win, we need you to join us. Every single person counts.
---

---

clean_body: It’s been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted. ...it’s needed now more than ever | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Dear Reader,It wasn 't long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. In the short time that 's passed, the Sun's mission has become more urgent than ever. It 's been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted. More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we're left with precious few to hold our country's most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity. The Sun is brave and relentless.Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account. It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people. The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833. The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we're up against some of the world's largest media conglomerates. To win, we need you to join us. Every single person counts. | | | | Join me and the Sun today in the fight to save American journalism. It's more urgent than ever. | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | The New York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10022, United States

name: Bob Casey
subject: I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Hello, Peter.
This Senate race is still too close to call, and my team needs your help to ensure every Pennsylvanian has their voice heard.
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84065?refcode=em20241109-8658&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8658%2E614464%2EtRCRwh)**
It has been made clear there are tens of thousands of votes still to be counted. Pennsylvania is where our democratic process was born. We must allow that process to play out. That is what Pennsylvania deserves.
My team is working hard to make sure Pennsylvanians' voices are heard, but we’ll need the resources to make sure we can keep up this work.
**[So please, split $10 or more between Lucas Kunce and myself today to ensure we have what it takes to keep this operation running.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84065?refcode=em20241109-8658&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8658%2E614464%2EtRCRwh)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84066?refcode=em20241109-8658&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=8658%2E614464%2EtRCRwh) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84066?refcode=em20241109-8658&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=8658%2E614464%2EtRCRwh) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84066?refcode=em20241109-8658&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=8658%2E614464%2EtRCRwh) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84066?refcode=em20241109-8658&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=8658%2E614464%2EtRCRwh) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84066?refcode=em20241109-8658&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=8658%2E614464%2EtRCRwh) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84066?refcode=em20241109-8658&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=8658%2E614464%2EtRCRwh) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84065?refcode=em20241109-8658&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8658%2E614464%2EtRCRwh)

I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard, whether on the floor of the Senate or in a free and fair election.
Now, let’s finish the job.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

subject: My friend Bob Casey needs our help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-casey?refcode=X_110924_BennetCasey_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-casey?refcode=X_110924_BennetCasey_act]
Hi friend,
I’m reaching out because my friend Bob Casey’s race is still undecided — and his campaign needs our support.
Bob is in a dead heat for Pennsylvania’s Senate seat against his Republican opponent. There are still votes that need to be counted before we can determine a winner.
This race is too important to lose.
His team is working around the clock to make sure every vote is counted securely and fairly. With so much on the line, we can’t let them fall short.
Can you split a donation between me and Bob now? Your support will ensure every lawful vote is counted in this critical tossup race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-casey?refcode=X_110924_BennetCasey_act]

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: We’re going to fight our way to the finish
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
|
---
Peter, I know the last few days haven’t gone how we’d hoped.

I’ve been through some tough times in my life. Times when it seemed foolish to hope, when the outcome was uncertain. I got through those tough times by fighting my way to the other side. Today, tomorrow, and the next day, we have to fight.

With Republican control of the Senate assured, every seat that we win is a check on their control. I won’t shy away from working with anyone if it’s in the best interest of Arizona, but whatever power we retain is a mechanism for fighting the worst that might come our way.

My race is still too close to call. There are hundreds of thousands of votes yet to be counted. We need to run through the tape and win this seat in Arizona.

[Please, make a split donation to my campaign and Democracy on the Line. One last push to victory in Arizona. This matters, Peter. clean_body: | Peter, I know the last few days haven’t gone how we’d hoped. I’ve been through some tough times in my life. Times when it seemed foolish to hope, when the outcome was uncertain. I got through those tough times by fighting my way to the other side. Today, tomorrow, and the next day, we have to fight. With Republican control of the Senate assured, every seat that we win is a check on their control. I won’t shy away from working with anyone if it’s in the best interest of Arizona, but whatever power we retain is a mechanism for fighting the worst that might come our way. My race is still too close to call. There are hundreds of thousands of votes yet to be counted. We need to run through the tape and win this seat in Arizona. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ruben Gallego and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: | **= = = = Thank you, Ruben | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and protect our fragile Democracy, make a=.**

body:
We’re putting together a BEAUTIFUL thank you note for President Trump- will you sign it?

Team,
We face a brutal reality: Donald Trump will once again be sworn into office, with a MAGA-powered Senate ready to implement his terrifying Project 2025 — a scheme to reshape our democracy into a dictatorship starting day one. We know there's a lot of information flooding you right now, so let's break down the situation:
Here’s what we know:
* **Donald Trump and the MAGA Senate majority will move swiftly to implement their radical Project 2025.** This plan is designed to gut essential government agencies, erase crucial protections, and serve only the ultra-wealthy and corporate interests.
* **Our battle will be uphill.** The path forward is hard, but we’ve been here before, and we can win if we’re united, focused, and funded.

But we’re staring into the unknown:
* _Who will control the House? _Countless races across the country are still close to call, leaving us in a democratic limbo.
* _How long will Trump’s grip extend?_ He’s promised to be a “dictator on day 1” — and he has the team to make it happen.
* _How many more extremists will line up behind him to dismantle the support systems that everyday Americans rely on?_

When Trump’s vision comes to life, we’re looking at an America where freedom is strangled by fear and authoritarian rule. Our only option is to fight — and fight NOW if we want a chance to one day set our country on a path to truly _Upset the Setup_.
If it works for you today, and only if you can, would you consider chipping in to power our work? Defeat may be tiring now, but we have a long fight ahead that we must prepare for. Elon Musk, Mike Johnson, and even Donald Trump rushed to try to win back this race – but we stayed strong and kept this thing in a dead-heat through Election Day. Now : Ballots are still being counted, and this race is STILL too close to call. We need resources to make sure every voice is heard. body:
I’m confident that – after all the votes are counted – we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close. | | |

It’s unbelievable, and I’ll always be grateful for everything we built together. Here’s where we’re at in Arizona: I’m confident that – after all the votes are counted – we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close. Unfortunately, my opponent has a history of fanning the flames of conspiracy and disinformation. She’s already done a ton of damage to my state and to our country, but I’m not about to back down. Maybe it’s the Marine in me, but I’ll always fight for our democracy. And you have a critical role in that fight, if you’re up for it. clean_body: I’m confident that – after all the votes are counted – we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close. | | | | | ---|--- My friend – When I first launched this campaign, I never would’ve dreamed that this many people would have my back. It’s unbelievable, and I’ll always be grateful for everything we built together. Here’s where we’re at in Arizona: I’m confident that – after all the votes are counted – we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close. Unfortunately, my opponent has a history of fanning the flames of conspiracy and disinformation. She’s already done a ton of damage to my state and to our country, but I’m not about to back down. Maybe it’s the Marine in me, but I’ll always fight for our democracy. name: Derek Marshall
subject: We Had a Feeling This Could Happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | |

Dear Supporters,
Thank you to everyone who supported our campaign, volunteered, donated, and believed in our vision for CA-23. While this isn’t the outcome we hoped for, I’m incredibly proud of the work we did together. Our movement has always been about standing up for working people, for justice, and for a fair and inclusive future—and that fight doesn’t end here.
I know many of us are feeling the weight of this moment. We’ve all felt it building for a while. A lot of people thought we had it in the bag, but I want to be real honest with you:
We had a feeling this could happen.
Every four years, rural America decides the fate of our country, yet somehow, we always seem to forget that. Democrats across the country have abandoned rural districts like my own. Republicans came in and took advantage of it. This election was a result of that negligence.
Let me be real with you: times might get tough, and yeah, we all saw how Trump split us in ways we’re still trying to fix. But running this campaign has shown me something I want you all to remember—we’re not as divided as they’d like us to believe.
Most of us just want a fair shot at an easier life.
To Jay Obernolte, I congratulate you on your victory, and I hope we can find common ground on the issues that matter to us all. Rural America is where our country’s biggest challenges collide—homelessness, addiction, crime—all symptoms of a lack of resources and support. And while we’re caught in these cycles, my commitment to this district remains strong.
During this campaign, we’ve partnered with local groups to tackle addiction, collaborated with nonprofits to provide mutual aid, and invested tens of thousands of dollars into a community that urgently needed jobs.
I cannot turn my back on what we have started here.
I’ll keep working alongside our community to make sure every voice is heard and represented. I’m taking a bit of a break to figure out my next steps, but I’ll leave you with this:
Don’t let this moment divide you. Don’t drown in despair or get lost in the noise. Reach out to each other, listen to each other. This is a step forward—for all of us who are ready to keep fighting for real solutions, for justice, and for each other.
It’s time to organize.
With gratitude,
Derek Marshall [Donate Now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvkP_qkVIdE665h6yyoYaT94bUOOIQgnkwo900aHwFGEVTZ2eUuJrYuV4lh8mX0PCcc-Pmzq9vhhQdzZuGP1b9o6hoUkQxOqOuQLiAwy1SAboLLkergIEGcAGlVfT75l69BG5dcAdkQ2l2c3rmWYnNTCysSfAUW_ytDoTZtajQXq46HNUilT-dREIQysd-qykybm4pcGqGWDn920SxN6dLTugp4ZQXAmhSE1jc1eSpQPAZR3weHh5k5zNG9xIs1qgIzt7OQIAH4h-elSCP-sOUI0BVtwmjUJKGSmb1ltUGk-30hqjscziJm7qQnOzZBQYbZty64X-ukqmrpc1FtI0u_eNrbbeRnR4w6MTn5LVJlkA/4bb/8A2oGD-wSOWNrD_F0t7F3A/h0/h001.xonynVuBVcqP_hOcs2shZ4yRji_sslbYyIKnXM1Rf8M)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: You have an important role to play right now
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close.
#

everybody, it’s Mark Kelly. Ruben Gallego needs our help as votes continue to be counted in Arizona. This will be close. [**Please, read this message Ruben, and then split a donation if you can.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-rg-nov24.XoCX8B&refcode=em241109-1-90&t=1&akid=5923%2E6688874%2EYfAYPr)
---

Friends —
When I first launched this campaign, I never would’ve dreamed that this many people would have my back.
It’s unbelievable, and I’ll always be grateful for everything we built together.
Here’s where we’re at in Arizona:
I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close.
Unfortunately, my opponent has a history of fanning the flames of conspiracy and disinformation. She’s already done a ton of damage to my state and to our country, but I’m not about to back down.
Maybe it’s the Marine in me, but I’ll always fight for our democracy. And you have a critical role in that fight, if you’re up for it.
I know you’ve already given so much, but I’ve got to ask you one more time.
[**If you’re looking for some way to have an impact and help us fight back against Kari Lake as we work to ensure the votes are counted, please make a split donation to my campaign and Mark Kelly.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-rg-nov24.XoCX8B&refcode=em241109-1-90&t=2&akid=5923%2E6688874%2EYfAYPr)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: We've been through a lot. But we're not done yet.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter — it's tough.
I’m not going to lie to you. Our lead in Arizona continues to shrink, and there are still a considerable number of uncounted ballots across my state.
I don’t want to rile you up unnecessarily after everything you’ve been through over the last week, but I need all hands on deck now to ensure we hold the line.
[**I need you to chip in to my campaign as we fight to the final result. We have to secure this seat. $5 or whatever you can afford to give helps us get there.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov24-overtime.lIuiiG&refcode=em241109-2-160e&t=1&akid=3554%2E734936%2EngN7cn)

name: House GOP Chair
subject: ATTN: Vote Counting Ongoing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
We need to ensure every legal ballot is fairly and properly counted.
| ATTN: Peter
---
**_President Trump has won the White House, but the election is NOT over._**
---
Ballots are still being counted and cured in key battleground congressional districts that could decide the fate of our House majority.
---
_We need to be certain that Republicans are present for**every instance of ballot counting and curing** to ensure a clean and honest process._
---
_As the House GOP Chair, I will not stop fighting until every legal ballot is fairly and properly counted._
---
Having transferred $15,000,000 to protect our House majority, I am now authorizing a **500% MATCH** for the **FINAL ballot counts.**
---
We’ve come so far. We’ve fought so hard. We can’t let up now. We can’t let Democrats be the only ones counting the final ballots!
---
_I’ve put in $15,000,000 to secure a victory. Now, I’m entrusting you to match my commitment as we fight to count every last LEGAL vote._
---

clean_body: We need to ensure every legal ballot is fairly and properly counted. | ATTN: Peter President Trump has won the White House, but the election is NOT over. Ballots are still being counted and cured in key battleground congressional districts that could decide the fate of our House majority. We need to be certain that Republicans are present forevery instance of ballot counting and curing to ensure a clean and honest process. As the House GOP Chair, I will not stop fighting until every legal ballot is fairly and properly counted. Having transferred $15,000,000 to protect our House majority, I am now authorizing a 500% MATCH for the FINAL ballot counts. We’ve come so far. We’ve fought so hard. We can’t let up now. We can’t let Democrats be the only ones counting the final ballots! I’ve put in $15,000,000 to secure a victory. Now, I’m entrusting you to match my commitment as we fight to count every last LEGAL vote. Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik House Republican Conference Chair Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 |

**Our next project in Alaska is to Remove All Electronic Voting Systems via Ballot Measure. Let’s end Dominion’s Dominion over Alaska Sign Up on the website** [907honest.com](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=672ff41d04eb0519aebed522&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2Ffuture-volunteer%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D672ff3017f2c1636550ed02a%26ss_email_id%3D672ff41d04eb0519aebed522%26ss_campaign_name%3DHuge%2Bwins%2Bagainst%2BRCV%2Bnationwide%252C%2Bstarting%2Bthe%2Bnew%2Bpetition%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-11-09T23%253A45%253A37Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_672ff3017f2c1636550ed02a&l=en-US&s=0XIiELNXPaZT6GriU81xzfDTIlk%3D)
---
---
|
---
**“So if the ultimate goal of these changes is to pass ranked-choice voting, it behooves us to know where this revolutionary idea came from and who is behind it. Not surprisingly, the supposedly non-partisan idea is funded by far-left donors like Kathryn Murdoch (wife of one of Rupert Murdoch’s sons) and Alex Soros (son of radical billionaire George Soros).”**
---
**Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.****The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**_**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**__**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**__**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_
---
This is who is funding the [#RankedChoiceVoting](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=672ff41d04eb0519aebed522&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_672ff3017f2c1636550ed02a&l=en-US&s=mZsRUx3qYFldsJzPL29uekJucgE%3D) group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,”
---
Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes.https://thefederalist.com/2024/04/18/dark-money-group-backed-by-foreign-billionaire-has-dumped-100-million-into-state-ballot-initiatives/1630 Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. As a citizen it saddens me to learn that millionaires and billionaires have more influence on a state and the way the state operates than the people who live here.Phil IzonPer State Statutes:**Sec. 15.13.068. Expenditures and contributions by foreign-influenced corporations and foreign nationals.
** (a) A foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national may not, directly or indirectly, in connection with an election under this chapter, make a contribution or expenditure or make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or expenditure.

(b) The provisions of this section prohibit a foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national from making a contribution or expenditure in connection with a state election only to the

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4815%2E552475%2ESbEfj_)
I have an important update out of Pennsylvania, Peter.
With tens of thousands of ballots left to count, this election is still too close to call.
We are committed to ensuring that Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard. This is where you come in, Peter.

She proved the importance of fighting for what we believe in, and from her first day as vice president to the last day of her campaign, she demonstrated what it means to be a champion for all Americans. **We're organizing a card to thank her for her public service -- and we want YOU to sign!**
